title: Research Fellow (Psychometrician)
description:
Interested applicants are invited to apply directly at the NUS Career Portal. Please note your application will only be processed if you apply via NUS Career Portal.

NUS Career Portal link https://careers.nus.edu.sg/job/Research-Fellow-%28Psychometrician%29/33833-en_GB/

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Job Description

About the Centre for Research in Health Systems Performance (CRiHSP)

Optimizing the performance of health systems is essential to ensuring the wellbeing and longevity of populations worldwide. Singapore is particularly well placed to lead research in this field as its health system has been consistently ranked as one of the best in the world based on independent evaluation with the Global Burden of Disease data. The Centre for Research in Health Systems Performance (CRiHSP) aims to advance research in this area within the Yong Loo Lin School of Medicine of the National University of Singapore (NUS) as the leading centre for research in health systems in Asia with the following core functions:

  1. Research: empirical and methodological research and evidence synthesis on health systems performance with a particular focus on Value Based Healthcare. For instance, the measurement, validation and automation of PROMs and PREMs.
  2. Health policy intelligence: health policy impact analysis aimed at policy makers, service providers, researchers, and the wider public.
  3. Capacity building: formal postgraduate programme (from certificates to PhD), fellowships, mentoring, on-the- job and ad hoc training
  4. Contributing to improving NUHS performance: expert advice on the development, implementation, and evaluation of flagship initiatives (including Healthier SG) aimed at making step changes in NUHS performance, and programme evaluation

The multidisciplinary team of researchers in health systems (health services and policy researchers, data scientists, social scientists, and others), and administrators working in CRiHSP will provide an exciting and dynamic place in which people of diverse backgrounds collaborate towards the common goal of achieving excellence in Health Systems Research. The team will further benefit from a significant expansion in related fields and collaborations with the Department of Family Medicine at the National University Health System (NUHS), the new Centre for Sustainable Medicine (CoSM) and the Centre for Behavioural and Implementation Sciences Interventions (BISI) at the School of Medicine and the Saw Swee Hock School of Public Health.

About the role

The Research Fellow will have the following duties:

  • Managing and leading research activities including grant and IRB/DSRB applications, budgeting, planning and monitoring project timelines and generally support project management and coordination and liaising with internal and external stakeholders
  • Conduct literature reviews, including collation and synthesis of the literature
  • Support the design, data collection, psychometric analysis and interpretation of quantitative surveys
  • Contribute to and lead (where appropriate) protocol, manuscript and report timely writing, editing and submission.
  • Present work for feedback and dissemination at workshops or conferences locally and/or internationally
  • Mentor students and junior researchers

The post holder will be expected to be flexible in their role as the CRiHSP´s capacity evolves.

NUS offers highly competitive remuneration packages. The successful applicant will be offered an annual salary plus benefits commensurate with his or her qualifications, experience and expertise and may have access to travel support to disseminate research outcomes at international academic conferences.

The position is full-time for 1 year in the first instance, depending on project commitments and candidate’s career objectives.

Qualifications

About you

Applicants will be evaluated based on the following selection criteria:

Qualifications

  • Doctoral degree in Psychometrics or Statistics or in related discipline with emphasis in psychometrics

Experience

  • Experience in planning, managing and implementing healthcare-related research projects, from conception to completion, in a University setting (essential)
    • Demonstrated experience in conducting psychometric analysis using a range of methods (essential)
    • Track record of publishing in international peer-reviewed journals (desirable)
    • Researchers with experience in the use of Item Response Theory methods and Computerized Adaptative testing are particularly encouraged to apply

Skills and Personal Attributes

    • Strong communication skills in English, both written and spoken (essential)
    • Strong leadership skills with the ability to work independently and as part of a multidisciplinary team (essential)
    • Highly developed problem-solving skills and adept at managing complex problems (essential)
    • Ability to generate and maintain an independent stream of funding (essential)
    • Outcome-orientation with excellent organizational and project management skills, and attention to detail (essential)
    • Ability to work with culturally diverse populations (essential)

Interested candidates should submit a detailed CV (personal particulars, academic and employment history, full list of publications, contacts details of three (3) referees) and cover letter outlining their motivation and suitability for the project addressing each of the criteria outlined above to this job portal. Only shortlisted candidates will be notified. Applications will be considered on a rolling basis until a suitable candidate is found.

The application should include a CV and a cover letter that describes the applicant’s specific interest in joining the team. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

Informal enquiries can be made to Prof Jose M Valderas at jmvalderas@nus.edu.sg.

title: Assistant Manager – Japanese Restaurant
description:
• Assist in managing the day to day restaurant operations.
  • Ensure smooth opening and closing procedures.
  • Monitor service quality to maintain exceptional guest satisfaction.
  • Ensure Japanese dining standards, presentation, and hospitality are consistently followed.
  • Handle guest concerns and resolve complaints professionally and promptly.
  • Supervise, motivate, and support restaurant staff during shifts.
  • Assist with recruitment, onboarding, and training of new employees.
  • Conduct daily briefings and communicate operational updates.
  • Monitor staff performance and provide coaching and feedback.
  • Prepare staff schedules and manage shift coverage.
  • Deliver outstanding customer service and promote a welcoming dining experience.
  • Build positive relationships with guests and encourage repeat business.
  • Respond to guest feedback and implement service improvements.
  • Ensure compliance with food safety, hygiene, sanitation, and HACCP standards.
  • Monitor food quality, presentation, and portion control.
  • Ensure cleanliness of the dining area, kitchen, and storage areas.
  • Support compliance with local health and safety regulations.
  • Assist in managing inventory levels and ordering supplies.
  • Conduct regular stock counts and minimize food waste.
  • Monitor operating costs and support cost-control initiatives.
  • Help prevent inventory loss through proper stock management.
  • Support daily cash handling and reconciliation procedures.
  • Assist in achieving sales targets and profitability goals.
  • Prepare operational reports as required.
  • Monitor labor costs and productivity.
  • Ensure compliance with company policies and standard operating procedures.
  • Promote workplace safety and maintain a positive work environment.
  • Bachelor's degree or Diploma in Hospitality Management, Business Administration, or a related field is preferred.

  • Strong leadership and team management skills.

title: Account Manager, Law Firm Referrals (Remote - Texas)
description:
About Us

Ovation Law Firm is building a national personal injury firm focused on operational excellence, speed, and client outcomes. We believe exceptional legal representation starts long before litigation - it starts with world-class marketing, intake, operations, and partnerships. We're building every function with long-term scale in mind, and we're looking for people who want to help build something exceptional, not simply maintain it.


About The Role

Ovation Law Firm is building one of the fastest-growing personal injury firms in the country, and we're looking for an Account Manager to own and strengthen our referral partner network.


This is not an account management role where you simply maintain relationships. You'll be responsible for identifying, onboarding, managing, and optimizing our law firm referral partners while ensuring every client receives exceptional representation. You'll work directly with firm leadership, operations, intake, and our attorney partners to maximize client outcomes and continually improve the performance of our referral network.


If you're analytical, proactive, relationship-driven, and thrive in fast-moving environments where ownership matters, we'd love to meet you.


What You'll Do

  • Source and evaluate potential referral partners, assessing fit with Ovation's business model and client needs.
    Lead the onboarding process for new partners, educating them on Ovation's underwriting standards, referral model, and operating expectations.
  • Own the ongoing management of our referral partner portfolio, monitoring performance, responsiveness, client outcomes, and operational metrics.
  • Build trusted relationships while holding partners accountable to agreed-upon performance standards.
  • Work closely with Intake, Operations, Marketing, and Legal teams to ensure smooth case routing, timely communication, and exceptional client experiences.
  • Monitor case progression, partner decisions, and operational performance to identify risks before they become problems.
  • Analyze referral data, identify trends, and recommend improvements that increase conversion, client satisfaction, and revenue.
  • Continuously improve systems, processes, reporting, and partner performance through critical thinking and cross-functional collaboration.
  • Help expand Ovation's national referral network as we continue to grow into new markets.


Why This Role Matters

Our referral partners directly impact client outcomes, brand reputation, and revenue. This role ensures every client who isn't handled internally is placed with the right law firm, receives outstanding representation, and experiences the same level of care they expect from Ovation. You'll become the trusted owner of one of the firm's most important relationships while helping build the operational infrastructure that supports our continued national expansion.


What Success Looks Like

Within your first year, you will:

  • Build strong, trusted relationships with referral partners.
  • Improve partner responsiveness, communication, and operational performance.
  • Identify opportunities to increase referral quality and signed case volume.
  • Continuously improve processes that reduce friction for both clients and partners.
  • Be viewed as the subject matter expert for Ovation's referral partner network.
  • Help expand and scale one of the highest-performing referral programs in the industry.


Qualifications

Required Qualifications:

  • Bachelor's degree.
  • 3+ years managing strategic accounts, partnerships, client relationships, or operational programs.
  • Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret performance metrics and identify opportunities.
  • Experience using CRM systems and spreadsheets to manage relationships and performance.
  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
  • Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple priorities.
  • Comfortable making independent decisions while collaborating across multiple departments.


Preferred Qualifications:

  • Experience within legal, healthcare, professional services, or other relationship-driven industries.
  • Personal injury or legal operations experience.
  • Experience working in high-growth organizations.
  • Experience building or improving operational processes.


Our Core Values
Relentless Problem Solvers
We don't stop at obstacles. We think critically, act decisively, and find solutions that create meaningful outcomes for our clients and our team.


Pursuit of Excellence
Excellence is our standard—not our goal. From communication to execution, we hold ourselves accountable to exceptional quality in everything we do.


Extreme Ownership
We take full responsibility for our actions, results, and commitments. We follow through without excuses and treat every client, relationship, and decision as if it were our own.


Driven by Passion
We bring energy, purpose, and heart into our work every day. Our passion fuels exceptional client experiences, strengthens our culture, and drives continuous improvement.


What We Offer

  • Health, dental, and vision insurance benefits.
  • Paid time off (PTO).
  • Opportunity to directly influence the growth and success of a rapidly expanding law firm.
  • Long-term growth opportunities within a fast-growing organization.


Work Location

This is a fully remote position open only to candidates residing in Texas. Applicants must currently live in Texas.

title: Steuerberater (m/w/d) in Oberstenfeld, auf Wunsch mit Partnerperspektive, gesucht - mindestens 90.000€
description:
TaxTalente ist die Nr. 1 Job-Matching Plattform für Jobsuchende in der Steuerberatung.

Sofern Sie sich in mindestens einem der genannten Punkte wiederfinden, sollten Sie sich bei uns melden. Wir haben die attraktivsten Arbeitgeber der Steuerberatungsbranche in unserem Netzwerk und bringen zusammen, was zusammengehört. Grenzenlose Entwicklungschancen mit Partnermöglichkeiten, vielschichtige Tätigkeitsbereiche, Gehälter wie in der Industrie und vieles mehr – melden Sie sich bei uns und wir unterstützen Sie auf Ihrem weiteren Karriereweg!

Derzeit suchen wir nach einem Steuerberater (m/w/d) für eine unserer Partner-Kanzleien in Oberstenfeld

Bei Rückfragen kannst du dich gerne jederzeit (auch nach deinem Feierabend) direkt telefonisch an Herrn Becker-Koch über folgende Nummer wenden: 015901431130

Aufgaben

Wir bringen zusammen, was zusammengehört. Dabei spielt das passende Tätigkeitsprofil natürlich eine entscheidende Rolle. Bei unserer Partnerkanzlei können Sie sich Ihren Aufgabenbereich auf Basis Ihrer persönlichen Stärken und Schwächen selbst zusammenstellen.

  • Erstellung und Review von Jahresabschlüssen
  • Erstellung von Steuererklärungen für Personen- und Kapitalgesellschaften
  • Steuerliche Sonderberatungsprojekte auf Basis individueller QualifikationenB. in den Bereichen der Erbschaftsteuer oder des Umwandlungssteuerrechts
  • Begleitung von Betriebsprüfungen
  • Teamleitung und Personalverantwortung (optional)
  • Weitere individuell wählbare Tätigkeitsbereiche, die Ihnen Freude bringen

Qualifikation

Am Ende sollte es für beide Seiten passen. Deshalb wäre es gut, wenn Sie sich in den folgenden Punkten wiederfinden.

  • Kommunikative Art und Freude am Austausch mit Mandanten
  • Sorgfältige, effiziente und gewissenhafte Arbeitsweise
  • Offen für eine digitale Arbeitsweise
  • Führungsverständnis und Verantwortungsbewusstsein gegenüber Mitarbeitern (optional)
  • Ein erfolgreich abgeschlossenes Steuerberaterexamen
  • Leidenschaft für steuerliche Themen

Benefits

Sie haben genug von 0815 Benefits, von denen Sie nicht wirklich profitieren? Dann sollten Sie einen Blick auf die nachfolgenden Benefits werfen.

  • Außerordentliche Vergütung von 90.000 € bis 130.000 € / Jahr, auf Wunsch auch Partnerperspektive
  • Flexible Gestaltung der Arbeitszeiten sowie die Option auf Home-Office
  • Nettolohnoptimierung mit monatlichen 50,00€ Sachbezugsgutscheinen
  • Umfangreiche Unterstützung bei Weiterbildungsmaßnahmen wie z.B. Fachberater Qualifikationen
  • Modernste Ausstattung mit digitalen Prozessen
  • Starker Teamzusammenhalt und regelmäßige Teamevents

Schnell, unkompliziert und effizient Ihren Traumjob finden – ein Versprechen an Sie, dass wir aufgrund unseres selektiven, breit gefächerten und deutschlandweiten Kanzleinetzwerks halten werden. lhre Vorteile mit uns auf einen Blick:

  • Sie führen keine unsinnigen Bewerbungsgespräche mehr, bei denen Sie während des Bewerbungsprozesses merken, dass es (bspw. wegen des Gehalts) sowieso nicht passt - wir klären vor Ihrem Bewerbungsgespräch all Ihre mit uns besprochenen Kriterien mit der Kanzlei ab.
  • Wir führen Ihre Gehaltsverhandlungen und kennen die Gehaltsstrukturen der Branche dabei bestens.
  • 100% Anonymität – solange Sie uns nicht das „Go“ geben und einem Kennenlernen mit Ihrem neuen potentiellen Arbeitgeber zustimmen, erfährt niemand von Ihrem Namen oder Ihren bisherigen Arbeitgebern – Ihre Ihnen wichtigen Kriterien können wir auch zunächst anonym mit unseren Partnerkanzleien klären.
  • Attraktive Kanzleien – die Kanzleien in unserem breit gefächerten Kanzleinetzwerk sind selektiv ausgewählt und heben sich klar von “normalen” Kanzleien ab (z.B. hinsichtlich der Vergütung, Benefits, Hierarchien, Digitalisierungsgrad, Ausstattung etc.).
  • Und das Beste: Unser gesamter Service ist unverbindlich und völlig kostenfrei für Sie.

title: Area Manager
description:
1. PRIMARY FUNCTION

Work closely with the General Manager for the daily operations, manpower management, marketing and sales and profitability of all outlets.


ROLES AND RESPONSIBILITIES

Operations

-Ensure compliance with the company’s policies and procedures

-Responsible for staff rostering to ensure adequate manpower across outlets

-Influencing and decision making on aspects such as recruitment, discipline, termination of employment and performance assessment

-Perform outlet inspection at least once a week

-Share relevant and pertinent news/information with the outlet staff on a regular basis

-Conduct regular outlet meeting for feedback on strategies to achieve sales targets

-Ensure that quality of products, service, and outlet ambience consistently meets and/or exceeds company standards.

-Ensure the accuracy and timely submission of all monthly documents and reports of outlets to Head Office

- To undertake any other duties and responsibilities assigned by the management


Training and Development

-Ensure that all new employees undergo onboarding and training according to SOP

-Develop, coach and train employees on knowledge and skills with the objective of improving service quality and outlet operation sales.

-Review outlets' learning and career development initiatives to align with organization’s learning agenda

-Conduct performance appraisals for all outlet employees

-Coach, Motivate, Train, Retain and Develop staff’s performance so as to achieve company’s objectives.


Sales and Profit

-Responsible for the Sales and Profit performance of every outlet

-Conduct monthly sales analysis and implement action plan for areas of improvement

-Responsible for outlets’ petty cash expenditure

-Monitor and be responsible for outlets’ maintenance and repair costs

-Ensure proper cash handling controls such as accurate daily cash reports, change funds and petty cash funds.


Marketing

-Monitor and track industry and market trends as well as consumer spending habits; develop and present action plans to achieve and/or exceed sales forecast

-Ensure smooth implementation of new products, promotions and other sales and marketing activities through proper planning, organization and coordination of activities.

-Maintain a record of each outlet’s sales trend before, during and after the launch of any marketing activity

-Serves as a quality controller for all signage, posters and decoration of the outlets to ensure that they are aligned with the company’s branding.


Recruitment

-Recruit employees through an objective selection and interview process

-Ensure that all staff are oriented and trained according to SOP

-Ensure all outlets have sufficient manpower to achieve business needs and a smooth operational flow.


Environment Conditions

Kitchen environment.

title: Application Specialist
description:
Ben jij de schakel tussen hospitality en IT die zorgt dat systemen altijd veilig en soepel draaien? Zet jouw skills in en maak dagelijks impact op meer dan 70 hotels!

Jouw werk

Als Application Specialist krijg je de kans om je verder te ontwikkelen tot systeemspecialist binnen onze hotelapplicaties. Je werkt dagelijks met systemen die belangrijk zijn voor de operatie van onze hotels en leert steeds beter begrijpen hoe deze applicaties samenhangen met hotelprocessen, derde partij systemen en ons eigen Valk Development.

Wij zijn de schakel tussen de hotels, externe leveranciers en interne development. Dat betekent dat je niet alleen vragen oplost, maar ook meedenkt over de juiste werkwijze in het hotel, verbeteringen bespreekbaar maakt en helpt om processen duidelijker en slimmer in te richten. De bedoeling is dat je steeds meer eigenaarschap krijgt over systemen (specialist worden in jouw domein), koppelingen en structurele verbeteringen.


Waar hospitality en IT samenkomen, sta jij centraal.

In deze functie groei je stap voor stap uit tot specialist in systeemkennis, applicatiebeheer en procesoptimalisatie. Je onderzoekt complexe systeemvragen en functionele vraagstukken, voert oorzaakanalyses uit en zorgt voor duurzame oplossingen. Daarbij bewaak je escalaties richting leveranciers of het interne developmentteam en denk je actief mee over efficiënte werkwijzen voor onze hotels, die je vertaalt naar praktische en gebruiksvriendelijke systeemoplossingen.

Je bent de schakel tussen de hotels, externe leveranciers en onze developers. Je stemt af met derde partijen over incidenten, bugs, koppelingen en optimalisaties en vertaalt de wensen en behoeften van de hotels naar concrete feature requests en verbeteringen voor Valk Development of externe leveranciers.

Daarnaast ben je verantwoordelijk voor het configureren en beheren van systemen. Je beheert gebruikers, rollen en autorisaties, monitort de security-instellingen en ondersteunt de hotels bij gebruikersbeheer en toegangsrechten. Ook zorg je ervoor dat documentatie, standaardwerkwijzen (SOP's) en processen altijd actueel en duidelijk zijn.

Je deelt jouw kennis met collega's door input te leveren voor trainingen en documentatie. Bovendien signaleer je trends, knelpunten en structurele verbetermogelijkheden en draag je actief bij aan projecten, implementaties en de introductie van nieuwe releases. Zo speel je een belangrijke rol in het continu verbeteren van onze systemen en processen voor alle Van der Valk hotels.

Je team

Als Application Specialist maak je deel uit van het Operations-team: een hecht team van 10 collega’s dat dagelijks meer dan 75 Van der Valk Hotels ondersteunt. Binnen het team werken we nauw met elkaar samen, helpen we elkaar wanneer dat nodig is en is er ruimte om vragen te stellen, mee te denken en van elkaar te leren. De sfeer is informeel. Jouw rol als Application Specialist voegt daar een specialistische focus aan toe. Je verdiept je in onze hotelapplicaties, configuratie, user beheer en systeemprocessen, en kijkt steeds hoe deze beter kunnen aansluiten op de praktijk in het hotel. Wat het werken in dit team leuk maakt, is de combinatie van hospitality, IT en samenwerking. Je schakelt met hotelcollega’s, leveranciers, Valk Development en je eigen team, waardoor geen dag hetzelfde is en je echt ziet welke impact jouw werk heeft op de hotels.

De organisatie

Werken bij de toekan betekent werken bij de meest gastvrije hotels van Nederland. Een stralende glimlach op de gezichten van onze gasten, daar doen we het voor! Je komt te werken bij het Valk Service Center. Dit is de faciliterende organisatie voor meer dan 70 Van der Valk hotels in het binnen- en buitenland. In verschillende teams zoals marketing, Revenue management en HR ondersteunen we samen onze hotels op de best mogelijke manier. Dit doen we op ons moderne kantoor in het mooie Van der Valk Hotel in Breukelen.

Jij

Jij bent servicegericht, communicatief sterk en schakelt moeiteloos tussen verschillende stakeholders. Met jouw gestructureerde manier van werken en oog voor detail weet je prioriteiten te stellen en houd je overzicht, ook wanneer het druk is. Je bent proactief, denkt in oplossingen en voelt je verantwoordelijk voor een veilige en soepel werkende digitale omgeving.

Verder:

  • Mbo+/hbo werk- en denkniveau, bij voorkeur aangevuld met ervaring binnen hospitality of hotelprocessen;

  • Affiniteit met IT, applicatiebeheer, softwareconfiguratie of digitale procesverbetering;

  • Je begrijpt hoe een hotel werkt en kunt systeemoplossingen vertalen naar de dagelijkse praktijk van hotelcollega’s;

  • Je bent communicatief sterk, analytisch en gestructureerd, en werkt graag samen met hotels, leveranciers, en interne teams (development, projects);

  • Je bent een sociale IT’er: benaderbaar, servicegericht, proactief en nieuwsgierig naar hoe systemen en werkwijzes continu beter kunnen werken;

  • Je bent minimaal 30 uur per week beschikbaar.

Arbeidsvoorwaarden

  • Afhankelijk van je achtergrond en ervaring ontvang je een salaris tussen €2.800,- tot €3.000,- o.b.v. 38 uur;

  • Mogelijkheid om in overleg deels thuiswerken;

  • Een pensioenregeling. Wij hanteren een pensioenregeling bij het Pensioenfonds Horeca & Catering;

  • Vitaliteit en gezondheid vinden wij belangrijk, daarom bieden we gratis onbeperkt sportlessen samen met je collega’s aan. Ook is er dagelijks vers fruit op kantoor;

  • 25 vakantiedagen;

  • Reiskostenvergoeding;

  • Toegang tot ons Van der Valk Benefits at Work platform, waarbij je korting krijgt op merken zoals Adidas, JBL, Philips, Walibi en nog veel meer;

  • Aantrekkelijke personeelskortingen binnen onze prachtige hotels;

  • Flexibele werktijden.

Meer weten?

Eerst een dag(deel) meelopen of vragen? Neem gerust contact met ons op!

  • Bo van Honschoten (HR & Office Coördinator) via 0880246300 of hr@valkservices.nl.

  • Jesse Mulder (Teamlead Application Support) via j.mulder@valkservices.nl

    Als onderdeel van de sollicitatieprocedure kunnen wij openbare, zakelijk relevante informatie raadplegen, zoals een LinkedIn‑profiel. Indien wij dergelijke informatie betrekken bij de beoordeling, bieden wij de sollicitant de gelegenheid deze toe te lichten.

    Een reactie van ZZP’ers, uitzend- of wervingsbureaus op deze vacature wordt niet op prijs gesteld, deze partijen hoeven zowel telefonisch als via e-mail geen contact met ons op te nemen.

title: Assistant Manager – CuiScene Restaurant
description:
• Deliver exceptional and personalized service to guests, ensuring memorable dining experiences aligned with Fairmont’s Heartist philosophy.
  • Welcome and engage with guests, anticipate their needs, and handle feedback or concerns professionally and promptly.
  • Ensure consistent service standards are maintained throughout the restaurant operation.
  • Monitor guest satisfaction and implement improvements to enhance the overall dining experience.
  • Assist the Restaurant Manager in managing daily buffet operations, including breakfast, lunch, and dinner services.
  • Ensure smooth opening and closing procedures, including restaurant readiness, cleanliness, and service setup.
  • Monitor buffet presentation, food replenishment, hygiene standards, and overall guest flow.
  • Coordinate closely with the Culinary team to ensure timely replenishment and quality presentation of buffet items.
  • Supervise, coach, and motivate restaurant colleagues to deliver excellent service standards.
  • Conduct daily briefings, assign duties, and ensure proper staffing allocation according to business levels.
  • Support training and development of colleagues, promoting continuous improvement and professional growth.
  • Assist in performance management and provide constructive feedback to team members.
  • Support the Restaurant Manager in achieving departmental financial goals, including revenue targets and cost control.
  • Monitor operating supplies, inventory levels, and minimize wastage.
  • Ensure proper handling of billing procedures, cash handling, and POS operations.
  • Assist with scheduling, attendance monitoring, and administrative tasks as required.
  • Ensure compliance with hotel policies, safety regulations, and brand standards.
  • Maintain high standards of cleanliness, hygiene, and workplace safety.
  • Promote sustainable practices and support hotel environmental initiatives.
  • Work closely with Kitchen, Stewarding, Engineering, Housekeeping, and other departments to ensure seamless operations.
  • Maintain effective communication with management and colleagues.
  • Support hotel events, promotions, and special dining experiences when required.

  • Minimum 2–3 years of experience in a assistant managerial role within a luxury hotel or high-volume restaurant environment.
  • Strong knowledge of buffet operations and international dining concepts.
  • Excellent leadership, communication, and problem-solving skills.
  • Ability to work under pressure in a fast-paced hospitality environment.
  • Strong understanding of guest service standards and Food & Beverage operations.
  • Knowledge of HACCP and food safety procedures.
  • Proficiency in English; additional languages are an advantage.

title: Finance Administration Analyst
description:
Galileo is a fast-growing renewable energy IPP, investor and operator, currently in the very dynamic start-up phase. Since our foundation in 2020, we have secured a pipeline of over 16 GW of solar PV, onshore wind, offshore wind and storage projects across 10 markets in Europe.

We are looking for a Finance Administration Analyst to manage payment activities and support accounting and administrative processes for all legal entities of the Galileo Group across Europe. The role will work closely with the company’s Treasury team to ensure that payments are accurate, properly authorized, and processed within the agreed deadlines. This person will be based in Milan (with the possibility of hybrid remote working) and report to the Accounting Manager.

What you’ll do:

  • Prepare and manage payment proposals for suppliers and other company obligations;
  • Verify the completeness and accuracy of payment documentation;
  • Ensure that purchase orders, invoices and payments have followed the appropriate approval process;
  • Coordinate payment schedules and deadlines with the Treasury team;
  • Reconcile payment transactions and investigate any discrepancies;
  • Manage relationships with internal and external stakeholders regarding payment status and administrative matters;
  • Associate purchase invoices with orders and verify their approval;
  • Support accounting activities related to accounts payable and bank transactions;
  • Assist with month-end and year-end closing activities;
  • Contribute to the improvement and automation of payment and administrative processes.



#LI-Hybrid

Requirements

What you'll need:

  • At least 2 years of experience in procurement, finance or accounting roles;
  • Diploma in Accounting and/or Degree in Accounting or Finance subjects;
  • Good knowledge of the English Language (especially written);
  • Very good communication skills;
  • Aptitude for problem solving and ability to work in a team.


Benefits

What we offer:

  • Competitive compensation: 38,000 – 46,000 € gross annual total compensation package, composed of fixed gross annual salary (RAL) and annual performance bonus, based on experience, skills and role responsibilities.
  • Collective agreement: Primo livello CCNL Commercio.
  • Comprehensive healthcare screening and healthcare insurance.
  • Flexibility: a hybrid remote-working policy designed for autonomy and outcomes — plus a strong Diversity & Inclusion focus to support different needs and life situations.
  • Growth: continuous learning & development opportunities and a supportive environment that fosters initiative and ownership.
  • Front-row seat to the energy transition: you'll play an active role in Galileo's renewable energy developments, contributing to projects that support the energy transition and collaborating across multidisciplinary teams.
  • International environment: you’ll collaborate with colleagues across Europe and thrive in an informal culture that values collaboration, ownership, and innovation.

Our commitment to diversity and inclusion: Galileo is a new and flexible employer, committed to providing equal opportunities, an inclusive work environment, and fairness for all. We encourage everyone who applies to emphasize what their passion, skills and mindset can bring to our company. In return we commit to evaluating your application fairly and objectively. This is the case no matter your race, gender identity, sexuality, age, family or civil status, disability, religion, or ethnicity.

title: Yard Manager
description:
Make your mark as a Yard Manager at Boskalis! Boskalis Westminster Ltd are looking to recruit a new team member to fulfil the role of Eastham Yard Manager, responsible for the safe, compliant, and effective day‑to‑day management of yard‑based activities at the Eastham Sands site. The role ensures that all operations are conducted in accordance with approved traffic management, safety, health, environmental management, emergency response arrangements, and environmental permit requirements applicable to the site.

As Eastham sands Yard Manager you will form part of the North-West project team and fulfil an integral role within the growing sand supply business in the region.

Main Tasks:

Operational Management

  • Manage day-to-day yard operations, including vehicle access, traffic control, loading activities, and compliance with the Site Traffic Management Plan.
  • Control vehicle movements, designated routes, speed limits, parking arrangements, and loading procedures.
  • Ensure all drivers, visitors, and contractors report to the site office and receive the required site induction before entering operational areas.
  • Oversee weighbridge operations, ticket issuance, daily sales reconciliation, and associated records.
  • Coordinate loading operations, material movements, and sand refill activities to maintain operational efficiency.
  • Ensure yard routes and working areas are safe, maintained, and appropriate dust suppression measures are implemented.
  • Obtain material samples and carry out quality control testing in accordance with site requirements.
  • Provide operational support by operating loading equipment when required and trained to do so.
  • Manage and supervise yard personnel to ensure efficient and effective operations.

Health, Safety and Environment

  • Ensure all yard activities are carried out safely and in line with company SHE-Q policies, procedures, and the NINA safety management system.
  • Promote safe working practices and enforce compliance with PPE, traffic management, and site rules.
  • Identify, report, and manage hazards, risks, incidents, and unsafe conditions within the yard.
  • Deliver or coordinate site inductions for employees, contractors, and visitors.
  • Maintain effective segregation of vehicles, plant, pedestrians, and operational activities.
  • Ensure all yard operations comply with environmental permits, environmental management plans, and site procedures.
  • Implement environmental controls relating to dust, noise, emissions, spills, housekeeping, and material handling.
  • Support environmental inspections, audits, monitoring activities, and incident investigations.

Emergency Response and Compliance

  • Support implementation of site emergency and business continuity arrangements within the yard.
  • Coordinate and assist with emergency responses relating to vehicle incidents, spills, or other operational emergencies.
  • Ensure clear communication and adherence to site emergency procedures during incidents.
  • Maintain compliance with company policies, permit-to-work requirements, and all relevant legal and site obligations.

Stakeholder Management

  • Act as the primary operational lead within the yard for day-to-day activities.
  • Liaise effectively with site management, supervisors, operators, drivers, contractors, customers, and emergency services as required.
  • Promote the Boskalis Way of Working and uphold company values and standards at all times.

Required Knowledge & Experience:

Essential

  • SMSTS / SSSTS or equivalent
  • CPCS or equivalent training for wheel loader / bulldozer and 360 excavators
  • Proficient in Microsoft products (word/excel/email/share point/teams)
  • Experience in managing similar aggregate load and sales operations.
  • Proficient in Weighbridge software and invoicing.
  • Proven track record managing reports and operations.

Desirable

  • Environmental management training related to aggregate operations
  • SEATS
  • Based in Liverpool
  • Construction / Marine related work experience

What you can expect:

  • A dynamic environment: A job where you can make an impact as part of a diverse, international team of experts.
  • Rewarding conditions: As well as offering a competitive salary we give industry leading benefits, including 25 days holiday plus bank holidays (based on a full-time contract), a generous pension package, with the opportunity to add flexible benefits, free parking and beverages. Conveniently located office with a friendly, supportive team.
  • Career development: Plenty of opportunities to realise your full potential with training and development through our Boskalis Academy

Extra Information:

  • Your team: Reporting to the North-West Project Manager, you will work as a Yard Manager, in the Operations Business Unit.
  • Where you will work: You will be working at our site in Liverpool.
  • Full/part-time job: The position of Yard Manager is a full-time job - 45 hours a week. You will work Monday - Friday, 07:00am - 17:00pm with a 1-hour lunch break.
  • Permanent/Fixed Term: This is a 3 year (36 months) fixed term position.
  • Next steps: Apply easily by completing the online application form. Interviews are held online and in the office. Once it’s clear we’re a good match, we’ll make you an offer – and look forward to welcoming you to the company.

Interested?

Please apply by filling in your details and by uploading your motivation letter and CV on our careers site.

We will be reviewing applications and conducting interviews on a rolling basis, so we encourage you to apply early. Please note that the position may be closed as soon as a suitable candidate is found.

Disclaimer for recruitment and selection agencies
We don’t accept any unsolicited applications or CVs from recruitment and selection agencies.

title: Klaviyo Email Marketing Assistant (Part-Time)
description:
About Us

Buddle was founded to address the growing demand for reliable and efficient staffing solutions across diverse industries globally. Our mission is to seamlessly connect businesses with skilled professionals, fostering long-term partnerships that benefit both parties. At Buddle, we prioritise trust, value, and sustainability in every staffing solution we provide.

About the Role

We are looking for a detail-oriented and reliable Klaviyo Email Marketing Assistant to support our client's marketing team on a part-time basis (1 day / 8 hours per week). This role is ideal for someone with hands-on experience building email campaigns in Klaviyo who enjoys creating polished, responsive email campaigns while ensuring every detail is accurate before launch.

You'll work from provided campaign briefs, approved copy, and creative assets to build engaging email campaigns that are optimized for both desktop and mobile devices. A strong eye for detail and commitment to quality assurance are essential, as you'll play an important role in ensuring campaigns are delivered accurately and professionally.

Key Responsibilities

  • Build email campaigns in Klaviyo using supplied campaign briefs, approved copy, and creative assets.
  • Format emails to ensure a consistent and visually appealing experience across desktop and mobile devices.
  • Add and verify alt text, hyperlinks, and other campaign elements.
  • Conduct preview sends and perform comprehensive quality assurance (QA) checks prior to campaign deployment.
  • Identify and resolve formatting or content issues before campaigns go live.
  • Maintain a high level of accuracy and consistency across all email campaigns.
  • Collaborate with the marketing team to ensure campaigns are delivered according to specifications and deadlines.

Other Responsibilities

  • Make necessary process suggestions and improvements which can help the team.
  • Contributes to team effort by accomplishing related results as needed.
  • Perform other related tasks and duties that may be assigned by the client later on.


About You

  • Previous experience building email campaigns in Klaviyo.
  • Strong attention to detail with the ability to identify formatting and content issues before launch.
  • Understanding of email marketing best practices, including responsive design and accessibility considerations such as alt text.
  • Experience working with campaign briefs, approved copy, and creative assets.
  • Excellent organizational and time management skills, with the ability to meet deadlines independently.
  • A proactive mindset and commitment to delivering high-quality work.
  • Strong written communication skills and the ability to collaborate effectively with remote teams

Nice to Have

  • Experience working with eCommerce brands.
  • Familiarity with email marketing metrics and campaign performance.
  • Experience with other email marketing platforms is an advantage.

Finer Details

Schedule: 8am - 5pm AEST
Available to work 1 day a week, (8 hours)

Start Date:
TO BE AMENDED

title: Internal Support
description:
As an Internal Support at Ireckonu, you will own and maintain the company's internal IT environment, ensuring employees have secure, reliable access to the systems, devices, and infrastructure they need to work effectively. You will be responsible for identity and access management, endpoint administration, Microsoft 365, networking, servers, and security, while continuously improving our internal IT landscape. Your main scope will be an internal-facing role supporting Ireckonu employees and infrastructure, with a possibility to delve into Technical Support tasks as you grow in the role.

You will
  • Own identity and access management across Microsoft Entra ID and core business applications, including user provisioning, permissions, SSO, and Conditional Access.
  • Manage employee onboarding and offboarding, devices, software deployment, and Microsoft Intune.
  • Administer Windows Server, Active Directory, DNS, DHCP, Group Policy, file servers, and certificates.
  • Manage network infrastructure, including switches, firewalls, VLANs, VPNs, and office Wi-Fi.
  • Administer Microsoft 365, Exchange Online, SharePoint, Azure, licensing, and mail security.
  • Plan and maintain backups, disaster recovery, hardware lifecycle, assets, and vendor relationships.
  • Maintain endpoint security, security baselines, access reviews, and support infrastructure-related security incidents.
  • Provide day-to-day IT support for employees, resolving access, tooling, and device issues.
  • Manage office IT infrastructure, including meeting room technology, printers, inventory, and customer hardware environments.
  • Maintain documentation and continuously improve internal IT services, security, and operational processes.
  • Over time, you will have the chance to be more involved in general technical support engineer tasks as well; helping troubleshoot access issues, diagnosing environment-level problems, and sharing knowledge that bridges internal IT and platform operations.
  • Deepen your understanding of a SaaS product environment and build strong cross-team relationships, with the possibility of taking more Technical Support Engineer tasks in the future.

  • 3–5 years of experience in systems administration, infrastructure, or internal IT.
  • Experience managing Microsoft Entra ID, Microsoft Intune, Microsoft 365, Windows Server, and Active Directory.
  • Good understanding of networking, VPNs, firewalls, DNS, DHCP, Group Policy, and endpoint management.
  • Experience with identity and access management, security best practices, backups, and disaster recovery.
  • PowerShell or other scripting experience is a plus.
  • You take ownership, communicate clearly, and enjoy solving technical challenges.
  • You are organised, proactive, and comfortable managing multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.
  • You create clear documentation and continuously look for ways to improve internal IT operations.

title: Entrepreneur in Residence – B2B Venture Building & Sales
description:
Was passiert, wenn Unternehmen händeringend Fachkräfte suchen – während sich gleichzeitig ganze Berufsbilder schneller verändern, als klassische Bildungswege darauf reagieren können?

Unternehmen stehen heute unter massivem Transformationsdruck. Künstliche Intelligenz, Automatisierung und digitale Geschäftsmodelle verändern Branchen grundlegend. Themen wie digitaler Vertrieb, datengetriebenes Marketing, Automatisierung von Geschäftsprozessen und der Einsatz von KI-Tools werden für Unternehmen immer wichtiger – gleichzeitig fehlen häufig genau die Kompetenzen, um diese Veränderungen erfolgreich umzusetzen.

Viele Unternehmen stehen deshalb vor einer zentralen Herausforderung: Sie müssen ihre Mitarbeitenden weiterentwickeln, neue Fähigkeiten aufbauen und bestehende Teams fit für die Anforderungen der digitalen Wirtschaft machen.

Genau hier setzen wir an: Mit staatlich geförderten Weiterbildungen, die Menschen beruflich neu aufstellen und Unternehmen dabei helfen, ihre Mitarbeitenden gezielt für die Anforderungen der Zukunft zu qualifizieren.

Die Talentspring Academy Group ist ein dynamisch wachsender Verbund staatlich anerkannter, digital-first Bildungseinrichtungen mit klarem Fokus auf digitale Berufsfelder. Wir qualifizieren Beschäftigte für Tätigkeiten in Bereichen wie Künstliche Intelligenz, Online Marketing und Digital Sales – praxisnah, arbeitsmarktorientiert und mit klarem Fokus auf reale Arbeitsmarktanforderungen.

Was uns besonders macht: Wir verbinden die Geschwindigkeit und Innovationskraft eines EdTechs mit der Reichweite und Glaubwürdigkeit etablierter Bildungsstrukturen. Durch strategische Partnerschaften im Bildungssektor verfügen wir über eine bundesweite Infrastruktur mit mehreren hundert Standorten, tiefem institutionellem Vertrauen und direktem Zugang zu unseren Zielgruppen – über digitale wie lokale Kanäle. Das schafft Marktzugang, Vertrauen und nachhaltige Skalierbarkeit in einem regulierten Umfeld.

Der Markt wächst rasant – und wir bauen gerade unsere B2B-Sparte für Unternehmensweiterbildungen auf.

Daher ist jetzt ist der perfekte Zeitpunkt, um einzusteigen – und mitzugestalten, wie Unternehmen und Mitarbeitende in Deutschland für die Arbeitswelt von morgen qualifiziert werden.

Du möchtest nicht nur in bestehenden Strukturen arbeiten, sondern selbst etwas aufbauen?

Als Entrepreneur in Residence entwickelst du gemeinsam mit unserem Head of Business Development eine neue B2B-Business-Unit für staatlich geförderte Unternehmensweiterbildungen.

Dein Projekt ist es, aus einem vielversprechenden Geschäftsmodell einen skalierbaren Geschäftsbereich zu entwickeln. Dafür analysierst du Zielgruppen und Marktpotenziale, testest unterschiedliche Go-to-Market-Ansätze und entwickelst unsere Vertriebsprozesse kontinuierlich weiter.

Dabei arbeitest du nicht nur strategisch und konzeptionell: Ein zentraler Bestandteil deiner Rolle ist der operative B2B-Vertrieb. Du sprichst mit Geschäftsführer und HR-Verantwortlichen, identifizierst konkrete Weiterbildungsbedarfe und begleitest Unternehmen vom ersten Kontakt bis zum erfolgreichen Abschluss.

So erhältst du die Möglichkeit, unternehmerische Verantwortung zu übernehmen und eine neue Business Unit aktiv mitzugestalten – mit einem erfahrenen Team und der Infrastruktur eines wachsenden Unternehmens im Rücken.
  • Du baust gemeinsam mit unserem Head of Business Development eine neue B2B-Business-Unit auf.
  • Du analysierst relevante Zielgruppen, Branchen und Marktpotenziale.
  • Du entwickelst und testest unterschiedliche Go-to-Market- und Vertriebsansätze.
  • Du übernimmst qualifizierte Inbound-Leads und sprichst potenzielle Unternehmenskund auch proaktiv an.
  • Du führst Beratungs- und Verkaufsgespräche mit Geschäftsführer, HR-Verantwortlichen und weiteren Entscheider.
  • Du begleitest Unternehmen von der Bedarfsanalyse über die Angebotserstellung bis zum erfolgreichen Abschluss.
  • Du wertest deine Aktivitäten und Ergebnisse aus und leitest daraus konkrete Optimierungsmaßnahmen ab.
  • Du entwickelst gemeinsam mit Marketing, Produkt und Operations skalierbare Prozesse für den weiteren Aufbau des Geschäftsbereichs.
  • Du hast ein Studium im Bereich BWL, International Business, International Management, Entrepreneurship, Wirtschaftswissenschaften oder einem vergleichbaren Fachgebiet abgeschlossen oder stehst kurz vor deinem Abschluss.
  • Du konntest bereits erste praktische Erfahrungen sammeln, beispielsweise im Business Development, Venture Building, Consulting, Vertrieb, Recruiting oder Account Management.
  • Du hast Lust, unternehmerisch zu arbeiten, Verantwortung zu übernehmen und einen neuen Geschäftsbereich aktiv mit aufzubauen.
  • Du arbeitest gerne analytisch und konzeptionell, möchtest deine Ideen aber auch direkt in der Praxis umsetzen.
  • Du hast Freude an Kommunikation und kannst dir vorstellen, regelmäßig Gespräche mit Unternehmenskund zu führen.
  • Du arbeitest strukturiert, eigenverantwortlich und ergebnisorientiert.
  • Du bringst eine ausgeprägte Hands-on-Mentalität mit und entwickelst gerne eigene Lösungsansätze.
  • Du sprichst fließend Deutsch und kannst dich auch in anspruchsvollen Business-Gesprächen sicher und überzeugend ausdrücken.
  • Dein eigenes Aufbauprojekt: Du entwickelst gemeinsam mit unserem Head of Business Development eine neue B2B-Business-Unit und gestaltest sie von Anfang an mit – von der Marktvalidierung über den Go-to-Market bis hin zu skalierbaren Vertriebsprozessen.
  • Unternehmerische Verantwortung ohne Gründungsrisiko: Du kannst Ideen entwickeln, direkt am Markt testen und anhand echter Ergebnisse weiterentwickeln – mit einem festen Gehalt, einem erfahrenen Team und der Infrastruktur eines wachsenden Unternehmens im Rücken.
  • Direkte Zusammenarbeit mit Entscheider:innen: Du arbeitest eng mit unserem Head of Business Development, dem Gründerteam und der Geschäftsführung zusammen und erhältst unmittelbare Einblicke in Strategie, Produktentwicklung und zentrale Business-Entscheidungen.
  • Steile Lernkurve mit echtem Business Impact: Statt theoretischer Projektarbeit übernimmst du operative Verantwortung. Du analysierst Märkte, sprichst mit Unternehmenskund, entwickelst Lösungen und siehst direkt, welchen Einfluss deine Arbeit auf den Aufbau der Business Unit hat.
  • Ein Wachstumsmarkt mit starkem Rückenwind: Du unterstützt Unternehmen dabei, ihre Mitarbeitenden für die digitale Wirtschaft weiterzuqualifizieren und Fachkräfte langfristig zu sichern. Staatliche Fördermöglichkeiten erleichtern den Zugang zu unseren Programmen und schaffen eine starke Grundlage für den Aufbau des Geschäftsbereichs.
  • Attraktives Gehaltspaket mit Erfolgsbeteiligung: Neben einem festen Grundgehalt erhältst du eine leistungsorientierte variable Vergütung auf Basis transparenter und fairer Zielstrukturen. So profitierst du unmittelbar vom Erfolg, den du mit aufbaust.
  • Langfristige Entwicklungsperspektive: Mit dem Wachstum der Business Unit kann auch deine Verantwortung wachsen – beispielsweise in Richtung Venture Lead, Business Development Manager oder einer späteren Führungsrolle.
  • Teamkultur mit Ownership: Bei uns zählen Eigenverantwortung, Umsetzungskraft und Wirkung. Du erhältst den Freiraum, eigene Ideen einzubringen, Entscheidungen mitzugestalten und Verantwortung für deine Ergebnisse zu übernehmen.
Wir bei Talentspring sind stolz auf die Vielfältigkeit unseres Teams. Weder bei der Einstellung noch während des Beschäftigungsverhältnisses werden Entscheidungen auf Basis von Hautfarbe, Religion oder religiösen Glaubens, ethnischer oder nationaler Herkunft, Nationalität, Geschlechtsidentität, sexuelle Orientierung, Behinderung oder Alter getroffen. Talentspring steht für einen sicheren Arbeitsplatz und geht gegen Diskriminierung und Belästigung jeglicher Art vor. Uns ist es besonders wichtig, das jede:r sich zu seinem/ihrem vollsten Potential entwickelt und in keinster Weise Benachteiligung erfährt. Wir sind stolz auf unser diverses Team und stellen sicher, dass wir in jeder Besetzung diese gelebte Diversität auch erfüllen. Bereit, mit uns Zukunft zu gestalten? - JETZT BEWERBEN IN UNTER 2 MINUTEN

Du möchtest mit Deiner Arbeit echten Impact schaffen und Unternehmen dabei helfen, ihre Mitarbeitenden fit für die Zukunft zu machen? Dann möchten wir Dich kennenlernen.

Sende uns einfach Deinen Lebenslauf (ohne Anschreiben) an karim@talentspring-academy.com oder bewirb Dich direkt über unser Karriereportal – wir melden uns innerhalb von 48 Stunden bei Dir zurück.

title: Temenos TAP developer
description:
Project description

This role is technology oriented, which includes defining development methodologies, hands on development for new projects/evolutions, Migration to latest version R24, production L3 support, providing technical solutions and performing POC for new relevant frameworks available in market. Knowledge and experience in the Wealth Management (Private Banking) domain is good to have. (Portfolio Analysis, Order Management and Advisory functions).

  • Propose solutions and improvements.
  • Contribute to key and strategic projects.
  • Contribute to Support Activities.
  • Validate solutions done by vendors / other team members and propose improvements.
  • Perform quality reporting and controls in line with the Team's QACMP.

SKILLS

Must have

Temenos certification or Banking Wealth Management certifications

title: Senior Site Engineer
company: SHANGHAI TUNNEL ENGINEERING CO (SINGAPORE) PTE LTD
description:
Job Description:

  • Liaising to LTA, QPS and other government authorities.

  • Attend to technical matters at site by developing solutions to problems with the application of engineering concepts, practices and techniques.
  • Planning of work and recourses with particular reference to work program to ensure timely progress.
  • Close coordination with sub-contractors, supervisors, surveyors, laboratory personnel, foremen and to ensure effective teamwork.

title: Credit and Collections Analyst (6-month Contract)
description:
Who we are

DigiCert is a global leader in intelligent trust. We protect the digital world by ensuring the security, privacy, and authenticity of every interaction. Our AI-powered DigiCert ONE platform unifies PKI, DNS, and certificate lifecycle management, to secure infrastructure, software, devices, messages, AI content and agents. Learn why more than 100,000 organizations, including 90% of the Fortune 500, choose DigiCert to stop today’s threats and prepare for a quantum-safe future at www.digicert.com

Job summary

We are looking for an experienced and highly motivated Credit and Collections Analyst who will take on the challenges of developing the Company's accounts receivable collection process and implementing best practices. This member of our team will take responsibility for and work to improve the collection effort by working with our customers and other departments to achieve success. This is a 6-month fixed term contract.

What you will do

  • Collections - ownership of AR aging: managing collections efficiency metrics to target, acting as a first point of contact to obtain full resolution on customer disputes or billing inquiries.
  • Meet defined department goals and activity metrics.
  • Participates in process improvement projects as assigned.
  • Recommend accounts for suspension after proper collection activities.
  • Communicate the status of designated accounts to the Collections Manager.
  • Cash management: effectively analyzes and resolves open cash (unapplied) amounts promptly.
  • Process and review account adjustments.
  • Reconcile customer disputes as they pertain to payment of outstanding balances due.
  • Monitor and maintain assigned accounts – customer calls, account adjustments, small balance write off, customer reconciliations, and processing credit memos.
  • Reduce delinquency for assigned accounts.
  • Perform other assigned tasks and duties necessary to support the Collections Department.
  • Enlist the efforts of sales and senior management when necessary to accelerate the collection process.
  • Must communicate and follow up effectively with Sales and Sales Operations departments regarding customer accounts on a timely basis.
  • Establish and maintain effective and cooperative working relationships with customers and sales.
  • Ensures compliance with all company policies.
  • Ad-Hoc projects.

What you will have

  • Currently pursuing a University degree in Business, Finance, Accounting or a related field (advantageous)
  • Must have experience in an accounting, budgeting or a finance role.
  • 3+ years of experience in B2B customer collections
  • Experience in reviewing company financials and establishing appropriate credit limits to mitigate company risk.
  • NetSuite ERP experience preferred.
  • Excellent account reconciliation skills.
  • Excellent communications skills, both telephone and written.
  • Proficient with MS Excel, MS Word, and/or any other products within the Microsoft Suite.
  • Strong organizational skills.
  • Attention to detail.
  • Ability to work and communicate among multiple teams and functions.

Benefits

  • Competitive compensation and comprehensive benefits package
  • Generous paid time off, including holidays and additional leave options
  • Family-friendly leave policies, including maternity, paternity, and other supportive leave programs
  • Health and wellness support, including medical cover (where applicable), gym reimbursements, and mental well-being resources
  • Pension, life insurance, and income protection benefits (location dependent)
  • Employee Assistance Program with 24/7 confidential support for employees and their families
  • Education assistance and professional development opportunities
  • Access to LinkedIn Learning and continuous learning resources
  • Employee referral bonus program and additional company perks and discounts
  • Business travel insurance and global employee support programs

To protect candidate information and maintain a secure hiring process, all applications must be submitted through our careers portal. Resumes or CVs sent directly via email will not be reviewed or considered.

title: ABM & Lead Gen Specialist (Bangkok-based, relocation provided)
description:
About Agoda

At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.

Today, we are part of Booking Holdings [NASDAQ: BKNG], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide.

No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.

About the role

Your center of gravity is deep 1:1 / 1:few ABM on your strategic accounts - that is the majority of your time and where the value is. Alongside it you carry a capped, automation-led 1:many (Lead Gen) responsibility across the tail of your archetype: templated, segment-level campaigns that open accounts and book first meetings for BD. The deep work comes first; the 1:many tier is deliberately bounded so it cannot crowd out the committee-level plays. This is not a high-volume MQL-factory role.

What you will do
  • Research & target your accounts and form a point of view on which product leads and how the relationship expands.
  • Run a capped 1:many motion over your tail. Templated, segment-level Lead Gen campaigns (built with the shared Marketing Ops Specialist) to open accounts and book BD meetings - and spot when a warming account should graduate into your 1:few tier. Kept deliberately bounded.
  • Map the buying committee, design the account plays, and create & adapt bespoke assets for your strategic accounts.
  • Partner with BD/Sales; run and optimize campaigns in the marketing automation platform; own your measurement layer.
What you will need (required)
  • 4+ years in B2B marketing, with 2+ years in ABM, strategic-account, or field marketing.
  • Account-research and buying-committee-mapping skill - you can build an account dossier and a stakeholder map and turn them into a plan.
  • Multi-channel campaign orchestration - multi-touch, multi-stakeholder campaigns (email, LinkedIn, events, direct).
  • Ability to sell a portfolio, not a single product - comfortable matching the right product to a buyer and articulating an expansion path.
  • Strong BD/Sales partnership instincts; comfortable working without direct authority.
  • CRM + MAP fluency - a major CRM (e.g., Salesforce) and a marketing automation platform (Pardot / Marketing Cloud Account Engagement, HubSpot, or Marketo).
  • Data-literate - comfortable defining KPIs and reading dashboards. Strong writing and executive communication. Long-cycle patience and ownership.
Nice to have
  • Travel, travel-tech, fintech/payments, loyalty, marketplaces, or B2B2C / partnership-led experience.
  • Exposure to intent-data / ABM platforms (6sense, Demandbase, ZoomInfo, Bombora). Event-based engagement (exec dinners, roundtables). ABM certification (ITSMA or equivalent).
  • Self-serve / PLG onboarding funnels, affiliate/partner-network programs (CJ), or SDR/BDR collaboration. SQL/BI comfort is a plus but not required.
How we will measure success
Primary (70%): buying-committee engagement depth, pipeline influenced, multi-product expansion, deal velocity, and BD-reported influence on strategic accounts. Secondary (30%): qualified leads/meetings generated from the capped 1:many tier and graduation of warming tail accounts into 1:few.

Please review our Hiring Process Guidelines before your interview — click here to learn how interviewing at Agoda works.

Equal Opportunity Employer

At Agoda, we pride ourselves on being a company represented by people of all different backgrounds and orientations. We prioritize attracting diverse talent and cultivating an inclusive environment that encourages collaboration and innovation. Employment at Agoda is based solely on a person’s merit and qualifications. title: TikTok Growth Strategy Analyst
description:
About TikTok

TikTok is the leading destination for short-form mobile video. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. TikTok's global headquarters are in Los Angeles and Singapore, and we also have offices in New York City, London, Dublin, Paris, Berlin, Dubai, Jakarta, Seoul, and Tokyo.​

Why Join Us

Inspiring creativity is at the core of TikTok's mission. Our innovative product is built to help people authentically express themselves, discover and connect – and our global, diverse teams make that possible. Together, we create value for our communities, inspire creativity and bring joy - a mission we work towards every day.​

We strive to do great things with great people. We lead with curiosity, humility, and a desire to make impact in a rapidly growing tech company. Every challenge is an opportunity to learn and innovate as one team. We're resilient and embrace challenges as they come. By constantly iterating and fostering an "Always Day 1" mindset, we achieve meaningful breakthroughs for ourselves, our company, and our users. When we create and grow together, the possibilities are limitless. Join us.​

​

Diversity & Inclusion​

TikTok is committed to creating an inclusive space where employees are valued for their skills, experiences, and unique perspectives. Our platform connects people from across the globe and so does our workplace. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. To achieve that goal, we are committed to celebrating our diverse voices and to creating an environment that reflects the many communities we reach. We are passionate about this and hope you are too.​

Responsibilities

Team Introduction: The User Growth (UG) team at TikTok is responsible for driving user acquisition, activation, and retention across TikTok's global platform. We are building platforms, leveraging data & ML models, and providing end-to-end solutions to power the global growth of TikTok products. The creative team at UG is looking for a talented and self-directed senior professional to generate, manage, and evolve the creative initiatives for our suite of industry-leading products.

- Responsible for growth and competitive analysis in the global TikTok market, identifying user growth potential, business objectives and specific competitive strategies, and providing mid-to-long-term business planning.- Conduct in-depth analysis of core growth-related initiatives (user acquisition, retention, engagement, etc.), identify opportunities, challenges and efficiency, establish standards and guidelines to maximize growth returns. Collaborate with relevant departments, drive implementation, track performance and iterate regularly.- Focus on user core data and metric insights, identify opportunities and issues, and develop key solutions. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to drive the implementation of specific initiatives.

Qualifications

Qualifications
Minimum Qualifications:
-Bachelor’s degree or above in Business, Finance, or related fields- 3+ years of internet industry experience, with preference for those with background in internet growth strategy/planning, business analysis, operations analysis, or consulting.
- 3+ years of experience leading end-to-end growth strategy projects, achieving measurable results (e.g., 15% user growth, 20% revenue increase quarterly)
- Proficient in business analysis frameworks (Revenue/CAC/ROI, etc.) and data analysis tools (SQL/Excel), independently produce executive-level analysis reports and exceptional communication skills with experience presenting to executives.
- Drive cross-functional collaboration across multiple departments (Product, Marketing, Data, Engineering, Finance) to align growth initiatives

Preferred Qualification:
- Passionate about the short video industry (e.g.,weekly deep dives into emerging content trends）

title: Robotics Co-Founder / CPO (100 % remote) (m/f/d)
description:
We are looking to hire ambitious entrepreneurs to start and scale their own startups.

We are serial entrepreneurs, for example Paul Müller (founder Adjust, €1.2B exit) and Petter Made (founder SumUp, €8B) who are eager to support outlier personalities and serial entrepreneurs to build €1B+ companies.

Our offer:

  • A salary while you build your startup as you will directly be employed by us. Alternatively, you can opt for up to €500k in funding.

  • 1:1 sparring with unicorn founders on a weekly basis

  • Community: Access to the top 0.1% of founders, peers and investors

  • Team building: Hiring top notch talent supported through our network (over 50,000 professionals)

  • Distribution: Support in reaching product-market-fit and building up a sales force / marketing machine

  • Funding support for securing a multi-million euro funding round within 12 months (on average, EWOR Fellows raise > €2M after our Grand Pitch)

One of our fellows set a record for Europe’s largest pre-seed round by a first-time founder, securing a €12M pre-seed investment.

Tasks

  • You will own, build, and run your startup in fields such as Robotics

  • You will embark on an extensive personal development journey crafted by unicorn founders and follow a fully customised programme enhancing your goal, time, and energy management

  • You will receive support in hiring through our network to over 50,000 professionals and advice as well as best practices from serial entrepreneurs

  • You will receive intensive coaching to make your startup ready to raise millions in funding

  • You will iterate your product with us until having reached product-market-fit and receive support in building up a sales force or creating a marketing engine respectively

  • You are based in Europe or the Americas or open to relocate

  • You are willing to take full responsibility for your own startup and scale it to €100M+ in revenues

  • You have excellent communication skills in the English language

title: Senior Process Engineer
description:
Wood is currently recruiting for an experienced Senior Process Engineer for ADNOC Sour Gas Project within our Operations EMEA business.

The Role

This is an exciting opportunity for an experienced Senior Process Engineer with a proven track record in overseeing the design, operation, and maintaining rotating equipment, ensuring performance, reliability, and compliance with industry standards for a high-profile client.

Our Clients and Projects

Designing the future. Transforming the world

Across EMEA, our teams are providing solutions and expertise to support our growing client base, focused on combining maintenance and operations with asset management, modifications and engineering services across the energy and materials markets.

We are focused on growth and our strategy is centered around building partnerships with our clients across the three regions: UK, Norway and the Middle East and Africa.

What we can offer

  • Meaningful and interesting projects: Delivered to high profile clients across the Energy Sector
  • Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion: We are an organization actively committed to diversity and inclusion across our business
  • Competitive renumeration package: With regular reviews to ensure we are rewarding at the right level in line with the market
  • Medical Insurance: Ensures inpatient, and outpatient medical care is available should you require treatment
  • Group Life and Personal Accident Insurance: The company provides Life Assurance cover
    End of Service Gratuity: In line with UAE Labor Law, all employees are eligible for an End of Service benefit
  • The Employee Share Plan: Gives you the opportunity to purchase Wood shares and receive a match from the company
  • Long Service Award: Wood values the commitment and loyalty of our people. Celebrating Long Service provides an opportunity for the business to demonstrate their appreciation of the hard work, dedication and many years’ services of our employees at 5-year service milestones
  • Commitment to continued professional development: Development plans that are tailored to your individual needs and interests
  • Global connections: Join experts around the world who are at the leading edge of our industry, shaping the standards of our profession
  • Energy Transition Academy: Join a community of experts sharing your knowledge and gaining more exposure to a variety of existing and emerging energy systems – delivered by experts in their field
  • Responsible for process design in preparation and review of specifications, data sheets, process drawings such as PFDs / P&IDs / DPTDs / PSFS etc. and other process deliverables on a project. for process design in preparation and review of specifications, data sheets and analysis of Process engineering requirements such as PFDs / P&IDs / DPTDs / PSFS etc. on a project
  • Prepare and review the basis of design, undertake detailed calculations to develop the design and be responsible for the accuracy of these calculations
  • Carry out process simulation using HYSYS, Flare System Analyzer, PipeNet and Pipesim etc. and prepare heat and material balance
  • Carryout equipment sizing, line sizing, pump hydraulics, safety relief calculations and produce process calculation report
  • Carryout dynamic simulation study, transient study, surge study, Minimum Metal Design Temperature (MDMT) study, etc.
  • Carryout depressurization studies, flare load estimation and flare system design
  • Ensuring that the design is carried out as per the industry standard practices and in conformance with the quality management system
  • Participate in PHA, HAZOP and other safety reviews
  • Be willing to mentor and engage in the training and development of junior engineers in the team.
  • Identification of issues that impede project progress and reporting to Lead Engineer / Discipline heads
  • Assimilating the evolution of new products and technology and updating oneself on the latest international standards in terms of engineering design practices and their applications
  • Ability to make independent decisions in the planning, organizing, and coordinating to develop solutions to complex problems and assist Project and client team for decision making
  • As Senior Discipline Engineer, when assigned on projects, responsible for managing the team of engineers and designers and delivering the engineering requirements of the project
  • Support on tender or proposal, as per client standards, international codes, and project scope of work
  • Assisting in the preparation of project proposals and pre - qualification documents in what relates to Process engineering design

What makes you remarkable

At Wood, we are committed to equal opportunities and welcome all talented individuals to consider joining our team. So even if you don't match every statement below but feel you have some of the experience, knowledge or skills needed for this role, we encourage you to apply. It will take all of us working together to deliver solutions to the world’s most critical challenges.

Expected:

  • Bachelor’s degree in chemical engineering
  • Minimum of 15 years of relevant experience in oil and gas industry
  • Previous experience in Sour Gas projects
  • Proficient in Process Simulation software’s such as HYSYS, Flare System Analyzer, PipeNet, Pipesim, OLGA etc.
  • Work experience in major offshore brownfield projects is an added advantage
  • Knowledge of engineering computer programs and general business software
  • Excellent written, verbal communication and interpersonal skills
  • Experience and detailed knowledge of relevant international codes and standards
