title: 🚛 Sidder du bedst bag rattet – og er du ikke bange for at tage fat? Chauffører med C-kørekort søges i Fredericia 📦
description:
Vi søger flere chauffører til flytte- og transportopgaver.

Nogle chaufførjobs handler om den samme rute dag efter dag.

Hos os er hverdagen noget helt andet.

Du bliver en del af en moderne vognmandsforretning, hvor arbejdsdagene byder på alt fra flytteopgaver og transport til håndtering af inventar og kundekontakt. Den ene dag hjælper du en virksomhed med at flytte kontor. Den næste dag løser du en transportopgave et helt andet sted i landet.

Virksomheden har gennem mange år opbygget et stærkt ry for kvalitet, ordentlighed og god service. Derfor søger vi chauffører, som ikke kun passer godt på bilen – men også på kundernes ejendele og virksomhedens gode navn.

Dine arbejdsopgaver bliver blandt andet:

🚛 Kørsel i forbindelse med flytte- og transportopgaver

📦 Læsning og aflæsning af inventar og gods

🏢 Flytninger for både private og erhverv

🤝 Kundekontakt og professionel service

🌍 Varierende opgaver i Danmark – og lejlighedsvis udlandet

Vi håber, at du:

▪ Har kørekort C

▪ Trives med en varieret arbejdsdag

▪ Er mødestabil og ansvarsbevidst

▪ Har en god fysik og er ikke bange for at tage fat

▪ Er serviceminded og møder kunderne med et smil

▪ Arbejder selvstændigt, men trives som en del af et team

Vi tilbyder:

💰 Løn efter kvalifikationer og erfaring

🚀 Hurtig opstart

🚛 En moderne og alsidig vognpark

🤝 Dygtige kollegaer og en uformel omgangstone

📦 En hverdag med afvekslende opgaver og stor frihed

📈 En veletableret virksomhed med mange års erfaring og fokus på kvalitet

😄 Kort fortalt

Det her er ikke et job, hvor du bare fragter gods fra A til B.

Du bliver en vigtig del af et hold, der hver dag hjælper både private og virksomheder med transport- og flytteopgaver, hvor tillid, kvalitet og god service er afgørende.

Kan du se dig selv bag rattet hos os, så send dit CV eller giv os et kald – vi glæder os til at høre fra dig.

📞 93 96 03 42

✉️ simon@entreprisegruppen.com

title: Pädagogische Fachkraft Inklusion (m/w/d) - Gartenstraße in 72074 Tübingen
description:
Du möchtest Kinder mit besonderen Bedürfnissen in ihrer Entwicklung begleiten, ihre Neugier fördern und gemeinsam mit einem engagierten Team einen Ort zum Wachsen schaffen? Dann bist Du bei uns genau richtig!

Für unsere Kita Gartenstraße in der Gartenstraße 205 in Tübingen suchen wir eine pädagogische Fachkraft mit dem Schwerpunkt Inklusion in Teilzeit mit 8 Stunden pro Woche zum nächstmöglichen Zeitpunkt.

Bei Partou steht die hochwertige Qualität der Kinderbetreuung an erster Stelle. Unsere pädagogische Haltung basiert auf dem Kinderperspektivenansatz: Wir sehen Kinder als aktive Gestalter:innen ihrer eigenen Entwicklung und schaffen Räume, in denen sie mitbestimmen, entdecken und gemeinsam lernen können. Ergänzt wird dies durch unser Konzept „Ein Haus für alle“ sowie projektorientierte Lernformate.

Unser Haus bietet Platz für 55 Kinder im Alter von einem Jahr bis Schuleintritt. Du wirst Teil eines multiprofessionellen Teams, das Kinder aufmerksam begleitet, eng mit Familien zusammenarbeitet und sich gemeinsam Schritt für Schritt weiterentwickelt.
Gemeinsam schaffen wir einen Ort, der weit über Betreuung hinausgeht – einen Ort zum Wachsen.
  • Du betreust und förderst Kinder mit besonderen Bedürfnissen mit viel Herz und Engagement
  • Du gestaltest den Kita-Alltag kreativ und spielerisch mit
  • Du bist Ansprechpartner:in für Eltern und Kolleg:innen
  • Du unterstützt die soziale und emotionale Entwicklung der Kinder
  • Du arbeitest aktiv im Team mit und bringst eigene Ideen ein
  • Abgeschlossene Ausbildung als Erzieher / Erzieherin mit staatlicher Anerkennung oder Studium der Kindheitspädagogik oder vergleichbare Ausbildung/Studium
  • Gute Kommunikationsfähigkeiten in Deutsch (mindestens B2) mit entsprechendem Nachweis / Zertifikat
  • Leidenschaft für die Arbeit mit Kindern
  • Einfühlungsvermögen, Geduld und Teamgeist
  • Kreativität und Freude an der spielerischen Förderung von Kindern
  • Kommunikationsstärke und Zuverlässigkeit
  • Attraktives Vergütungspaket in Anlehnung an den TVöD Sozial- u. Erziehungsdienst (SuE)
  • Gehaltsspanne (Vollzeit): 3.639,00 € - 4.798,00 €
  • Jahressonderzahlung (Weihnachtsgeld)
  • Teilnahme an Fortbildungen, Seminare und echte Entwicklung – über unsere Partou Akademie
  • Betriebliche Altersvorsorge mit überdurchschnittlich hohem Arbeitgeberanteil
  • 30 Tage Urlaub zzgl. zwei Regenerationstage
  • Intensive Einarbeitung, regelmäßige Feedbackgespräche
  • Arbeitgeberzuschuss zur Fitnessmitgliedschaft
  • (E-)Bike-Leasing
Bitte bewirb dich direkt über diese Stelle mit deinem Lebenslauf.
Bei Bewerbungen per E-Mail können wir leider keine zeitnahe Bearbeitung garantieren.
Bei Frage zur Stelle oder allgemein erreichst du uns gerne per E-Mail: jobs@partou.de

title: Manager, Commercial Operations & Governance
description:
We’re in an unbelievably exciting area of tech and are fundamentally reshaping the data storage industry. Here, you lead with innovative thinking, grow along with us, and join the smartest team in the industry.

This type of work—work that changes the world—is what the tech industry was founded on. So, if you're ready to seize the endless opportunities and leave your mark, come join us.

THE ROLE

Lead the Customer Satisfaction (CSAT) Center of Excellence within the Monetization organization to transform how Everpure measures and optimizes customer success. In this role, you will establish strategic governance frameworks across CapEx and subscription workflows, driving the end-to-end operational rigor needed to secure actionable customer insights. Collaborating closely with Business Intelligence, Legal, Finance, Customer Experience and Customer Success, you will serve as the core decision-maker for resolution strategies that directly impact global retention and monetization growth.

WHAT YOU'LL DO

  • Drive the CSAT Transformation Initiative: Own the design, milestones, and execution of the CSAT governance framework across CapEx and subscription workflows to ensure process integrity and mitigate operational risk.
  • Deliver Executive Visibility: Architect and oversee the delivery of weekly leadership reporting and real-time dashboards in Tableau and ServiceNow, translating complex customer data into actionable trend recommendations for senior stakeholders.
  • Lead and Scale Team Capabilities: Directly manage and coach a dedicated team of CSAT COE Analysts, defining clear roles, performance priorities, and professional growth pathways aligned with company objectives.
  • Orchestrate Cross-Functional Resolutions: Foster strategic alignments with Legal, Finance, and Business Intelligence to enforce documentation standards, complete system audits, and successfully operationalize complex customer resolutions.

WHAT YOU BRING

  • People & Program Leadership: Proven ability to manage, coach, and scale analytical professionals while successfully steering cross-functional transformation initiatives.
  • Subscription Services Ecosystems: Strong understanding of subscription services and recurring revenue models, including operational lifecycle management across CapEx and subscription workflows.
  • Strategic Governance & Analytical Frameworks: Deep expertise in operational process design, data governance, and lifecycle management within enterprise ecosystems like ServiceNow and Tableau.
  • Strategic Planning & CSAT Transformation: Strong capability to design end-to-end strategic planning frameworks and operational governance models that restructure, mature, and elevate CSAT tracking and performance methodologies across both product and subscription ecosystems.
  • Executive Communication & Influence: Strong capability to synthesize data trends and risk profiles into compelling presentations and frameworks for senior leadership and multi-disciplinary stakeholders.

In-Office Presence: We are primarily an in-office environment and therefore, you will be expected to work from the Prague office in compliance with Everpure’s policies, unless you are on PTO, or work travel, or other approved leave.

#LI-ONSITE

WHAT YOU CAN EXPECT FROM US:

  • Innovation: We celebrate those who think critically, like a challenge, and aspire to be trailblazers.
  • Growth: We give you the space and support to grow along with us and to contribute to something meaningful. We have been named Fortune's Best Workplaces in Technology™, Fortune's Best Workplaces in the Bay Area™, and certified as a Great Place to Work®!
  • Team: We build each other up and set aside ego for the greater good.

And because we understand the value of bringing your full and best self to work, we offer a variety of perks to manage a healthy balance, including flexible time off, wellness resources, and company-sponsored team events. Check out purebenefits.com for more information.

ACCOMMODATIONS AND ACCESSIBILITY:

Candidates with disabilities may request accommodations for all aspects of our hiring process. For more on this, contact us at TA-Ops@purestorage.com if you’re invited to an interview.

OUR COMMITMENT TO A STRONG AND INCLUSIVE TEAM:

We’re forging a future where everyone finds their rightful place and where every voice matters. Where uniqueness isn’t just accepted but embraced. That’s why we are committed to fostering the growth and development of every person, cultivating a sense of community through our Employee Resource Groups and advocating for inclusive leadership.

Everpure is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. title: Freelance Science Teacher
company: STAR DESTINY MANAGEMENT CONSULTANCY PTE. LTD.
description:
About Us

Star Destiny Education (星启航教育), a subsidiary of Star Destiny Group, specialises in supporting international students studying in Singapore. We provide structured academic programmes, AEIS preparatory courses, and personalised tuition to help students successfully adapt to Singapore’s education system.

Our mission is to equip students with strong academic foundations, confidence, and critical thinking skills so they can excel in Singapore schools and beyond.

Role Overview

We are seeking a passionate and dedicated Freelance Science Teacher to teach Upper Primary (P4–P6) and Lower Secondary (Sec 1–2) students.

The ideal candidate will have strong subject knowledge, be able to simplify complex scientific concepts, and deliver engaging lessons that build both conceptual understanding and examination skills aligned with the Singapore MOE Science curriculum and PSLE / Lower Secondary standards.

Experience teaching international students transitioning into Singapore schools will be highly advantageous.

Key Responsibilities

• Plan and deliver engaging Science lessons for Upper Primary (P4–P6) and Lower Secondary (Sec1–2) students.

• Teach one-to-one or in a small-group class settings.

• Explain scientific concepts clearly using structured explanations, examples, and visual demonstrations.

• Support students in developing scientific reasoning, answering techniques, and exam strategies.

• Provide clear explanations in English and Mandarin where required to support effective communication with international students from China.

• Develop and adapt worksheets, assessments, and teaching materials aligned with the MOE Science syllabus.

• Track student progress and provide constructive feedback to students and parents.

• Maintain a supportive, motivating, and structured learning environment.

Requirements

• Bachelor’s degree in Science, Education, or a related field.

• Prior experience teaching Upper Primary or Lower Secondary Science.

• Familiarity with the Singapore MOE Science curriculum and PSLE requirements.

• Able to communicate effectively in both English and Mandarin to liaise with Mandarin-speaking students, parents, and stakeholders from China.

• MOE / NIE-trained teachers are strongly encouraged to apply.

• Strong classroom management and communication skills.

• Passionate about working with young learners and helping them succeed academically.

• Able to conduct in-person classes and online lessons when required.

• Prior experience teaching Upper Primary or Lower Secondary Science.

• Familiarity with the Singapore MOE Science curriculum and PSLE requirements.

• MOE / NIE-trained teachers are strongly encouraged to apply.

• Strong classroom management and communication skills.

• Passionate about working with young learners and helping them succeed academically.

• Able to conduct in-person classes and online lessons when required.

What We Offer

· Competitive freelance hourly rates based on qualifications and experience.

· A collaborative and professional teaching environment.

· Long-term collaboration opportunities within the Star Destiny Education ecosystem, including tuition, education consultancy, and student lodging services.

title: Chauffeur Livreur, Paris
description:
À PROPOS DE DANCE

Dance est un service de vélos et scooters électriques par abonnement en pleine expansion. Nous sommes investis d’une mission: rendre les villes plus écologiques, en facilitant à toutes et tous l’accès à la mobilité électrique. Les abonné·es de Dance bénéficient d’un véhicule personnel, d’une assurance contre le vol et de réparations à la demande, le tout compris dans un abonnement mensuel flexible. Parce qu’une expérience client exceptionnelle est essentielle afin de satisfaire nos abonné·es, les équipes des opérations jouent un rôle fondamental dans chaque ville. En rejoignant Dance, vous intégrez une équipe dévouée de mécanicien·nes, de livreur·ses, de spécialistes assemblage, et de responsables d’équipe et de zone, qui veillent à ce que nos abonné·es bénéficient de la meilleure expérience possible sur la route.


Dance est actuellement disponible à Paris, Berlin, Hambourg, Munich et Vienne.

CE QUE NOUS VOUS PROPOSONS

  • Un package d’avantages compétitif

  • Jusqu’à 30 jours de vacances par an, car déconnecter est important!

  • De généreuses allocations d’apprentissage et de développement, afin de vous garantir une progression croissante et des perspectives d’évolution concrètes

  • Un accès aux services de nilo.health pour votre bien-être mental

  • Votre propre vélo électrique Dance

  • Chèques-repas avec SWILE, d'une valeur de 10 euros par jour travaillé.

  • Assurance maladie complémentaire avec ALAN


À PROPOS DU POSTE

En votre qualité de Chauffeur livreur, vous êtes chargé·e de :

  • Vous incarnez Dance auprès de nos client·es et leur expliquez le fonctionnement du vélo électrique

  • Vous livrez le vélo électrique de Dance directement à nos client·es, en van électrique

  • Vous nous aidez à rendre votre ville plus agréable!


À PROPOS DE VOUS

  • Un package d’avantages compétitif.

  • Vous aimez le contact avec la clientèle et faites preuve de sympathie et d’ouverture.

  • Vous parlez couramment le français et l’anglais.

  • Vous êtes titulaire d’un permis de conduire de classe B et d’un permis de travail valide en France.



Chez Dance, notre service est synonyme de rapidité et de grande qualité. Nos équipes de livraison sont donc essentielles pour satisfaire nos abonné·es. Rejoignez une équipe talentueuse de spécialistes de la livraison de vélos et de scooters, et aidez-nous dans notre mission de rendre les villes plus agréables.

title: Director of People Operations
description:
Why Coda
Coda is a global growth engine for commerce, connecting people, digital products, and payments through trusted monetization and distribution solutions.

With 600+ people from 57 nationalities across 23 locations, we’re a truly global team headquartered in Singapore, with offices in Amsterdam, Dubai, Bristol, Shanghai, Eindhoven, and across Southeast Asia.

We power global commerce through a dual model. Our B2B solutions, Codapay, Coda Webstore, Coda Links, Coda Distribution, and Giftcloud, enable publishers and brands to monetize and distribute digital content globally. On the consumer side, we operate a portfolio of trusted storefronts including Codashop, Recharge.com, Startselect.com, and mobiletopup.co.uk, that give customers secure and easy access to game top-ups, digital credits, vouchers, gift cards and prepaid products in over 70 markets.

Our culture is built on respect, ownership, and collaboration. We move fast, support each other, and celebrate wins together.

If you’re looking to grow your career and make a real impact in a global team, Coda is the place for you.


The Opportunity
We’re looking for a Director of People Operations and Experience to lead and evolve Coda’s global people operations team. This role owns the backbone of operational excellence across the entire employee lifecycle from payroll and compliance to mobility, systems, offboarding, and onboarding - with a relentless focus on making every interaction with the people team quick, reliable, and seamless.
Reporting to the SVP of People, you’ll lead a global team supporting a workforce of 600+ employees across 20+ countries, while partnering closely with internal stakeholders. This is a high-impact leadership role for someone who can roll up their sleeves, think strategically, and build for scale.

What you'll do

  • Lead, mentor, and scale a global people operations team that looks after:

  • HRIS administration and optimization (Rippling)

  • Payroll operations and vendor management

  • Employment compliance

  • Employee mobility, visas, and immigration processes

  • Day-to-day people operations and employee support (Jira)

  • Own the operations that power the employee experience across the lifecycle–define and meet SLAs for people ops requests, drive high CSAT, and optimize the employee journey from onboarding to offboarding
  • Design scalable processes, policies, and operating models that can grow with the business
  • Act as a trusted advisor to senior leaders on people operations risks, tradeoffs, process improvements, and best practices
  • Ensure strong controls, documentation, and audit readiness across payroll, compliance, and employee data
  • Partner with leaders in other people-related areas as needed–e.g., employee relations, total rewards, talent development
  • Play a key role in M&A integration, including due diligence, employee data migration, payroll and compliance alignment, and change management

    • What you'll bring

  • 8+ years of people operations experience, with a strong leadership track record of managing and developing distributed teams
  • Proven experience scaling people operations in a globally dispersed, mid-sized company (500–1,000 employees), preferably with some M&A experience
  • Proven ability to navigate and manage diverse employment laws, cultural nuances, and HR best practices across APAC and EMEA
  • Strong track record of building SLA- and CSAT-driven service models, with a mindset of operational excellence and employee satisfaction
  • Demonstrated success in influencing and driving action in a highly cross-functional environment, bridging cultures and teams across time zones
  • Strong strategic thinking skills paired with a roll-up-your-sleeves mindset
  • Excellent communication and collaboration skills
  • Tech savvy, with experience using AI, Google Workspace, Slack, and a breadth of HRIS platforms (experience with Rippling is nice to have)
    • We are proud to be an equal opportunity employer, embracing the unique qualities of every individual, regardless of gender, race, age, religion, disability, or other local protected classes. Our goal is to foster an inclusive environment where everyone feels welcome and valued.
    Due to the large number of exceptional applications we receive, we can only reach out to shortlisted candidates. If you don't hear from us, rest assured there may be another opportunity at Coda that aligns better with your unique abilities. Remember to check our Careers Page for more exciting job openings!

title: Business Support Administrator (MFG Business Support)
description:
Business Support Administrator (MFG Business Support)

About the role

We are looking for a Business Support Administrator to join our Manufacturing (MFG) Business Support team. In this role, you will help ensure the smooth flow of information, orders, inventory, reporting, and operational processes across our logistics and manufacturing operations.

Working closely with Operations, Production Control, Customer Service, customers, vendors, and carriers, you will play an important role in delivering accurate data, maintaining service levels, and supporting excellent customer experiences. Your work will contribute directly to operational efficiency, quality standards, and continuous improvement initiatives across the business.

This is an opportunity for someone who enjoys working in a fast-paced environment, solving problems, collaborating with different teams, and making a measurable impact through accuracy, reliability, and proactive support.

How you will contribute

  • Act as a primary point of contact for customers, vendors, and carriers, ensuring queries are resolved professionally and within agreed service levels (SLAs).
  • Prepare and distribute accurate daily, weekly, and monthly reports while maintaining high standards of data quality and attention to detail.
  • Maintain and update operational systems, including WMS, SFCS, SAP, and related business applications, ensuring information remains accurate and up to date.
  • Coordinate activities such as order management, stock transfers, inbound planning, outbound planning, new product introductions (NPI), billing support, and return merchandise authorization (RMA) processes.
  • Monitor operational performance and proactively identify issues, risks, or process gaps, escalating when appropriate and supporting timely resolution.
  • Plan and prioritize workload effectively to ensure reports, orders, requests, and operational tasks are completed within agreed timelines.
  • Collaborate closely with Production Control, Operations, Customer Service, and other cross-functional teams to support shared objectives and service delivery.
  • Perform quality checks on reports, transactions, and system updates before publication or completion.
  • Support shift handovers with clear communication to ensure continuity of service and operational reliability.
  • Contribute to continuous improvement initiatives by identifying opportunities to improve quality, efficiency, standardization, and cost effectiveness.
  • Create and maintain work instructions, process documentation, and reporting standards to support operational excellence.
  • Share knowledge and provide structured support, coaching, or cross-training to team members when required.
  • Support business reviews, customer meetings, presentations, and operational reporting activities as needed.

What you will bring

Must have

  • Experience working in an administrative, customer service, operations support, logistics, supply chain, manufacturing support, or similar environment, with strong attention to detail and a commitment to data accuracy.
  • Strong organizational and time management skills, with the ability to prioritize multiple tasks and meet deadlines in a dynamic environment.
  • Clear communication and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to build positive relationships with customers, vendors, carriers, and colleagues.
  • Proficiency with Microsoft Office applications, particularly Excel, Word, and Outlook, and confidence working with business systems and operational data.

  • Experience working with Warehouse Management Systems (WMS), SAP, SFCS, logistics operations, high-tech manufacturing environments, or continuous improvement initiatives.

#LI-SD2

title: Administrator mit Schwerpunkt ERP (Infor) (m/w/d)

title: (Senior) DevOps Engineer with Backend Development
description:
Global Risk Assessment Services (GRAS) is an innovative service and information provider offering environmental and social knowledge for fully traceable and sustainable supply chains. Our activities and impact are expanding, and our teams are growing exponentially since the last 3 years.

As part of our continued growth, we are strengthening our Technology Projects team and expanding our platform engineering capabilities.

To support this strategic step, we are looking forward to welcoming you as (Senior) DevOps Engineer with Backend Development Experience. In this role, you will work closely with our Cloud Engineer and Technology team to take shared ownership of our cloud platforms, strengthen our infrastructure, and actively contribute to the development of production-ready backend services and automation solutions.

If you are passionate about sustainability and would like to join a culturally certified Great Place to Work® company with highly motivated and diverse teams making a real difference, we look forward to your application!

Your main duties will be:

  • Share ownership of our cloud infrastructure (AWS and GCP) and ensure the reliable operation of our platforms and services
  • Design, implement, and continuously improve CI/CD pipelines and deployment workflows
  • Manage, maintain, and optimise containerised applications and environments using Docker
  • Develop, maintain, refactor, and review production code for backend APIs, automation workflows, and data processing pipelines, primarily in Python
  • Ensure the stability, performance, scalability, and security of our platforms and backend services
  • Contribute to strengthening our security architecture and support compliance with ISO-related requirements
  • Identify operational risks, troubleshoot incidents, and proactively improve system reliability and resilience
  • Collaborate closely with our GIS and software development teams to integrate geospatial systems and applications
  • Create and maintain technical documentation and contribute to the standardisation of infrastructure and deployment processes
  • Actively contribute to cross-functional projects and continuous improvement initiatives
Professional background
  • University degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, IT Security, or a comparable field
  • At least 3 years of experience in DevOps, backend development, or platform engineering
  • Experience working with or understanding secure systems / compliance environments (e.g. ISO 27001)

Technical skills
  • Strong experience with Docker and containerisation
  • Very good knowledge of Linux systems and shell scripting
  • Experience working with cloud platforms (preferably AWS and GCP)
  • Familiarity with CI/CD tools (e.g. GitHub Actions or similar)
  • Solid programming skills in Python
  • Hands-on experience with Infrastructure as Code (e.g. Terraform) is a strong advantage
  • Solid understanding of API design and backend architecture is highly desirable
  • Familiarity with data processing pipelines and automation workflows is considered an advantage
  • Exposure to geospatial data and tools (e.g. PostGIS, GeoPandas) is a plus
  • Knowledge of satellite data or environmental datasets is an advantage

Personal competencies
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with a structured and solution-oriented mindset
  • Ability to take ownership of critical systems and deliver reliable, high-quality solutions
  • Proactive, hands-on working style with a continuous improvement mindset
  • Strong communication and collaboration skills in interdisciplinary teams
  • Excellent English language skills (at least C1, written and spoken); German language skills are an advantage
We are an international and diverse team of passionate and experienced experts, joining forces for a sustainable future! We believe that our team is our core asset and we support our people as best we can.

To help you build your future and thrive with us, we offer:

Great Team Environment
  • Various team events throughout the year (Celebrating Diversity, Summer Team Event, Christmas Party)
  • Close collaboration with our sister companies ISCC System GmbH, Meo Carbon Solutions GmbH, 4C Services, ClimatePal, and TYC, giving you even more development opportunities

Individual learning and development plan
  • Professional onboarding to help you have an ideal start with us
  • Frequent feedback sessions to ensure a high quality of communication and mutual reflection
  • Many free language classes
  • Access to several trainings as well as specific technical courses
  • We promote from within!

Work-Life Balance
  • Hybrid set-up
  • 4 weeks remote work at a place of choice (after probation)
  • Flexible working hours and trust based working time
  • 30 vacation days and 3 additional vacation days (Christmas Eve, New Year’s Eve, Carnival Monday)
  • Sabbatical options

Financial benefits
  • A generous pension scheme (bAV) in line with our sustainability values
  • JobTicket/Deutschlandticket
  • Annual bonus scheme based on performance

Wellness Programs
  • Subsidized Urban Sports Club
  • Health weeks promoting healthy habits in personal and professional life
Then we would be happy to hear from you soon! Please apply via the button below with a meaningful cover letter, CV and any relevant certificates.

We are looking forward to your application and hope to welcome you in our team soon!

We are a company with equal opportunities for everyone and encourage applications from all suitably qualified candidates regardless of age, race, gender or any other criteria that is not a professional qualification for an open position.

  • Close work with existing campaigns.

title: Procurement Manager
description:
About Man Group

Man Group is a global alternative investment management firm focused on pursuing outperformance for sophisticated clients via our Systematic, Discretionary and Solutions offerings. Powered by talent and advanced technology, our single and multi-manager investment strategies are underpinned by deep research and span public and private markets, across all major asset classes, with a significant focus on alternatives. Man Group takes a partnership approach to working with clients, establishing deep connections and creating tailored solutions to meet their investment goals and those of the millions of retirees and savers they represent.

Headquartered in London, we manage $228.7 billion* and operate across multiple offices globally. Man Group plc is listed on the London Stock Exchange under the ticker EMG.LN and is a constituent of the FTSE 250 Index. Further information can be found at www.man.com

At Man Group, we respect your privacy and we are committed to protecting and safeguarding your Personal Data. We have developed policies and processes which are designed to provide for the security and integrity of your Personal Data. We are committed to Processing your Personal Data fairly and lawfully, and being open and transparent about such Processing. For further information on how we process your data, please see the privacy notice for applicants here

* As at 31 March 2026

Purpose of Role:

This is a hands-on management role at the heart of Man Group's Procurement function. The Procurement Manager is both an active commercial professional and the person responsible for leading and developing a team that is trusted, proactive and genuinely valued as a strategic partner by the business.

The function oversees approximately $100m of annual procurement spend across Man Group's indirect spend base. The Procurement Manager is accountable for ensuring that spend is visible, well-governed and delivering real value. We are looking for someone who builds Procurement's reputation by supporting the business in achieving its objectives, earning a seat at the table through the quality of relationships and the clarity of value delivered. Communication and stakeholder engagement are as important here as commercial expertise.

The ideal candidate will be CIPS qualified, with a strong commercial track record and a genuine belief that great procurement is built on communication, trust and fundamentals done well, supported by the right tools and technology.

Specific Responsibilities:

  • Lead and develop a team of three procurement professionals, setting clear direction, maintaining high standards and acting as a consultative escalation point to raise the quality and consistency of their outputs
  • Build trusted relationships with senior stakeholders across the business including Finance, Legal, Technology, Corporate Real Estate, COOs and business management teams across the investment management functions, providing sound commercial input and actively influencing demand upstream before commitments are made
  • Work with stakeholders to define requirements, design sourcing strategies and run go-to-market exercises; personally leading on complex sourcing projects, negotiations and commercial disputes
  • Manage supplier relationships across key categories, maintaining performance standards and providing project management structure on larger sourcing exercises to ensure timely and well-governed outcomes
  • Ensure savings are consistently captured and connected to a clear story of Procurement's value to senior management
  • Own the embedding of the Procurement Policy and controls framework, maintaining and improving Procurement MI, KPI reporting and governance touchpoints including Legal and TPRM
  • Drive continuous improvement of processes, tools and ways of working, proactively identifying new areas of opportunity

Technical Competencies:

  • CIPS qualified (essential)
  • Educated to degree level or equivalent
  • Extensive experience leading procurement and sourcing projects in financial services
  • Strong strategic sourcing, category management and contract management expertise
  • Proven ability to negotiate large, complex deals and manage senior supplier relationships
  • Man Group is a technology-focused organisation; whilst a dedicated category lead is in place, fluency across software, SaaS, data and technology vendor landscapes is a strong advantage
  • Appetite and aptitude for AI and new technologies

Core competencies:

  • Skilled communicator and relationship builder
  • Sets clear expectations and holds the line on standards
  • Proactive and delivery-focused
  • Open to new ideas; brings experience as a strength without letting it become a ceiling
  • Committed to continuous improvement in themselves, their team and the function

Inclusion, Work-Life Balance and Benefits at Man Group
You'll thrive in our working environment that champions equality of opportunity. Your unique perspective will contribute to our success, joining a workplace where inclusion is fundamental and deeply embedded in our culture and values. Through our external and internal initiatives, partnerships and programmes, you'll find opportunities to grow, develop your talents, and help foster an inclusive environment for all across our firm and industry. Learn more at www.man.com/diversity.

You'll have opportunities to make a difference through our charitable and global initiatives, while advancing your career through professional development, and with flexible working arrangements available too. Like all our people, you'll receive two annual 'Mankind' days of paid leave for community volunteering.

Our comprehensive benefits package includes competitive holiday entitlements, pension/401k, life and long-term disability coverage, group sick pay, enhanced parental leave and long-service leave. Depending on your location, you may also enjoy additional benefits such as private medical coverage, discounted gym membership options and pet insurance.

Equal Employment Opportunity Policy

Man Group provides equal employment opportunities to all applicants and all employees without regard to race, color, creed, national origin, ancestry, religion, disability, sex, gender identity and expression, marital status, sexual orientation, military or veteran status, age or any other legally protected category or status in accordance with applicable federal, state and local laws.

Man Group is a Disability Confident Committed employer; if you require help or information on reasonable adjustments as you apply for roles with us, please contact TalentAcquisition@man.com.

title: Maskinfører til genbrugsstation til dag- og aftenhold
description:
Har du erfaring med entreprenørmaskiner, og trives du med en alsidig hverdag? Så søger vi lige nu maskinførere til et længerevarende vikariat hos en af vores samarbejdspartnere.

Der er ledige stillinger på både dag- og aftenhold. Alle starter på daghold, hvor du får en grundig oplæring, inden der eventuelt skiftes til aftenhold.

Arbejdsopgaver

Du bliver en del af en virksomhed, der arbejder med håndtering og sortering af genanvendelige materialer. Dine primære opgaver vil være:

  • Kørsel med gravemaskine udstyret med sorteringsarm.
  • Kørsel med teleskoplæsser (certifikat er ikke påkrævet).
  • Presning og håndtering af pap.
  • Flytning og sortering af større mængder affald og genanvendelige materialer.
  • Bidrage til en sikker og effektiv drift.
Faglige kompetencer

  • Du har erfaring som maskinfører.
  • Du har minimum kørekort B.
  • Truckcertifikat er en fordel, men ikke et krav.
  • Erfaring med gravemaskine er en fordel.
  • Du kan arbejde på både dag- og aftenhold.
Personlige egenskaber

  • Du arbejder selvstændigt og tager ansvar.
  • Du har fokus på sikkerhed og kvalitet.
  • Du trives med fysisk arbejde og udendørs opgaver.
  • Du er mødestabil og fleksibel.
  • Du har en positiv indstilling og bidrager til et godt samarbejde.
Ansøgning

Har du spørgsmål til stillingen, kontakt JKS Aalborg på 96 35 07 50. Samtaler afholdes løbende.

Søg stillingen ved at trykke på "Søg stillingen" og udfyld ansøgningsformularen.

Grundet persondatalovgivningen modtager vi ikke CV og ansøgning på mail. Mails med CV og ansøgning vil blive slettet.

Vil du automatisk i betragtning til lignende stillinger? Så opret dit CV på jks.dk/cv – så kontakter vi dig, når der er relevante muligheder.

title: Credit and Collections Analyst
description:
Who we are

DigiCert is a global leader in intelligent trust. We protect the digital world by ensuring the security, privacy, and authenticity of every interaction. Our AI-powered DigiCert ONE platform unifies PKI, DNS, and certificate lifecycle management, to secure infrastructure, software, devices, messages, AI content and agents. Learn why more than 100,000 organizations, including 90% of the Fortune 500, choose DigiCert to stop today’s threats and prepare for a quantum-safe future at www.digicert.com

Job summary

We are looking for an experienced and highly motivated Credit and Collections Analyst who will take on the challenges of developing the Company's accounts receivable collection process and implementing best practices. This member of our team will take responsibility for and work to improve the collection effort by working with our customers and other departments to achieve success.

What you will do

  • Collections - ownership of AR aging: managing collections efficiency metrics to target, acting as a first point of contact to obtain full resolution on customer disputes or billing inquiries.
  • Meet defined department goals and activity metrics.
  • Participates in process improvement projects as assigned.
  • Recommend accounts for suspension after proper collection activities.
  • Communicate the status of designated accounts to the Collections Manager.
  • Cash management: effectively analyzes and resolves open cash (unapplied) amounts promptly.
  • Process and review account adjustments.
  • Reconcile customer disputes as they pertain to payment of outstanding balances due.
  • Monitor and maintain assigned accounts – customer calls, account adjustments, small balance write off, customer reconciliations, and processing credit memos.
  • Reduce delinquency for assigned accounts.
  • Perform other assigned tasks and duties necessary to support the Collections Department.
  • Enlist the efforts of sales and senior management when necessary to accelerate the collection process.
  • Must communicate and follow up effectively with Sales and Sales Operations departments regarding customer accounts on a timely basis.
  • Establish and maintain effective and cooperative working relationships with customers and sales.
  • Ensures compliance with all company policies.
  • Ad-Hoc projects.

What you will have

  • Currently pursuing a University degree in Business, Finance, Accounting or a related field (advantageous)
  • Must have experience in an accounting, budgeting or a finance role.
  • 3+ years of experience in B2B customer collections
  • Experience in reviewing company financials and establishing appropriate credit limits to mitigate company risk.
  • NetSuite ERP experience preferred.
  • Excellent account reconciliation skills.
  • Excellent communications skills, both telephone and written.
  • Proficient with MS Excel, MS Word, and/or any other products within the Microsoft Suite.
  • Strong organizational skills.
  • Attention to detail.
  • Ability to work and communicate among multiple teams and functions.

Benefits

  • Competitive compensation and comprehensive benefits package
  • Generous paid time off, including holidays and additional leave options
  • Family-friendly leave policies, including maternity, paternity, and other supportive leave programs
  • Health and wellness support, including medical cover (where applicable), gym reimbursements, and mental well-being resources
  • Pension, life insurance, and income protection benefits (location dependent)
  • Employee Assistance Program with 24/7 confidential support for employees and their families
  • Education assistance and professional development opportunities
  • Access to LinkedIn Learning and continuous learning resources
  • Employee referral bonus program and additional company perks and discounts
  • Business travel insurance and global employee support programs

To protect candidate information and maintain a secure hiring process, all applications must be submitted through our careers portal. Resumes or CVs sent directly via email will not be reviewed or considered.

title: Research Fellow (Chemistry)
description:
Interested applicants are invited to apply directly at the NUS Career Portal. Please note your application will only be processed if you apply via NUS Career Portal.

NUS Career Portal link https://careers.nus.edu.sg/job/Research-Fellow-%28Chemistry%29/33835-en_GB/?st=7CDD47F93D7F4AA683ED12119F4A4E3298BD528A

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Job Description

The successful candidate will join Asst. Prof. LI Xiaoyan’s group to advance research in AI-accelerated multiscale simulation and modeling for CCUS.


The main responsibilities of the position include:
• Kinetically simulate the reconstruction of metal oxides and alloying under the reaction conditions
• Involve AI/ML method into kinetic Monte Carlo model
• Publish research findings in high-impact journals and present at leading international conferences.
• Contribute to proposal writing and assist in preparing funding applications in support of group research activities.


Qualifications / Discipline:
• PhD in Chemical Engineering, Chemistry, Materials Science, Physics, Computational Science, or a related discipline.
• Proven research track record, evidenced by publications in peer-reviewed journals.
• Excellent communication skills and strong interest in interdisciplinary collaboration.


Skills:
• Expertise in computational materials science, including atomic kinetic mente carlo, molecular simulations, density functional theory (DFT), or other multiscale methods.
• Strong programming skills (Python, C/C++, MATLAB) with experience in AI/ML methods, such as MLIP.
• Skilled in scientific writing and communication, with experience preparing manuscripts for high-impact journals and delivering research presentations at international conferences.


Experience:
• Know about the structure transformation in the interface of nanomaterials under the reaction conditions
• Strong experience in machine learning and AI-driven modeling for scientific applications, such as machine-learned interatomic potentials and enhanced sampling approaches.
• Collaborated across computational and experimental teams to validate predictions and deepen understanding of structure–property relationships.

title: EY Teacher Assistant-ຜູ້ຊ່ວຍຄູອະນຸບານ
description:
PURPOSE OF ROLE:

A teacher assistant provides support to a teacher in charge of a classroom. Also known as teacher’s aides, these professionals reinforce lessons by tutoring individual students or small groups. Their duties include creating lesson plans, documenting progress, and overseeing lesson preparations.

The successful candidate must enjoy working with children and be devoted to building a nurturing and safe learning environment. To excel in this role, you must demonstrate excellent written and verbal communication skills, as well as in-depth knowledge of classroom activities and teaching methods.

KEY ACCOUNTABILITIES:

  • Working with the teacher to monitor the class schedule.
  • Assisting teachers with lesson preparation by getting materials ready and setting up equipment.
  • Revising lesson material with students individually or in small groups.
  • Ensuring the classroom environment is safe and clean.
  • Overseeing students during non-classroom times including in-between classes, during lunch, and on-field excursions.
  • Collaborating with teachers to recognize issues students are facing and recommend solutions.
  • Documenting student progress and communicating with parents to keep them informed.
  • Helping teachers to create lesson plans.
  • Complying with state, school, and class rules and regulations.
  • Attending all training classes, parent conferences, and faculty meetings

EDUCATION AND QUALIFICATION:

  • High school or equivalent qualification.
  • Teaching assistant or similar role is a plus.
  • Must have a compassionate and positive attitude.
  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
  • Outstanding interpersonal and presentation abilities.

title: Senior System Engineer
description:
iyzico
iyzico was founded in 2013 to provide online payment services and artificial intelligence-based payment technologies to businesses of various sizes in the world of e-commerce. By making the complex payment processes simple through its easy and secure platform, iyzico had achieved significant successes through supporting thousands of businesses in digitalization and was acquired by the global payment systems giant PayU in 2019. With such a robust structure, iyzico is operating on the principle of democratizing financial services and making them accessible for everyone alongside the services it provides to businesses.
Through iyzico Buyer Protection, consumers’ concerns regarding shopping online are resolved and better experiences are enabled. Control is handed back to the consumers by 24/7 live support through the iyzico mobile app and convenience in cancellation/returns processes. To this date, more than 2 million consumers shopped online under the security provided by iyzico Buyer Protection and this number is increasing daily. Via pay with iyzico, which is a blended payment solution, millions of consumers who do not use banking can safely shop online under the belt of iyzico Buyer Protection.
iyzico continues to simplify online shopping for both consumers and sellers by the simple, accessible, and innovative technologies it developed.

Key Responsibilities

  • Design, deploy, and maintain robust production/test environments across enterprise Linux and public Cloud platforms.
  • Manage and automate system configurations, provisioning, and environment builds using tools such as Terraform and Ansible.
  • Oversee enterprise storage solutions, define lifecycle policies, and manage reliable backup and disaster recovery strategies.
  • Help architect and maintain resilient system infrastructure optimized for AI agentic workflows and automated execution pipelines.
  • Support development teams by managing, automating, and maintaining CI/CD environments and application deployment pipelines.
  • Enforce server/network security policies, maintain proactive patch management, track CVEs, and apply system hardening standards.
  • Ensure 24/7 high availability using monitoring, centralized logging, and proactive incident response tooling.

Qualifications & Experience

  • Minimum 5 years of experience as a System Engineer, Systems Administrator, or Infrastructure Engineer.
  • Strong background in Linux-based environments, system administration, kernel tuning, and troubleshooting.
  • Hands on experience with at least one major public cloud provider (Google Cloud, AWS, Azure or Tencent Cloud).
  • Practical experience with Terraform for infrastructure management and Ansible (or Puppet/Chef) for configuration automation.
  • Solid knowledge of storage systems (SAN/NAS/Object Storage) and enterprise backup/restore operations.
  • Experience with container technologies (Docker, Podman) and orchestration engines (Kubernetes or Docker Swarm).
  • Familiarity with observability and logging stacks (Prometheus, Grafana, Zabbix, Elasticsearch, Splunk) and messaging systems (RabbitMQ, Kafka, etc.).

Nice to Have

  • Interest in or exposure to AI agentic architectures, workflow automation, and LLM deployment infrastructure.
  • Understanding of load balancing and caching mechanisms (Nginx, HAProxy, Redis).
  • Knowledge of VCS tools (Git/GitLab) and deploying Java/modern applications within CI/CD pipelines.
  • Strong documentation discipline and a structured, security-first approach to systems engineering.

What We Offer

• A culture of continuous development: conferences, in-house events & Tech Talks to stay up-to-date on current research and technology. P.S.:You do not need to wait to get on the stage and share your expertise with you teammates and the community

• Online Training Platform (Free access to Udemy, Harvard ManageMentor, Get abstract, etc.),

• Freedom under responsibility is our common mindset. That’s how we designed our flexible working model called,

• iyzico Homequarters. Our homequarters is in Altunizade,

• Meal & Internet Allowance,

• Transportation Allowance,

• A gift voucher to meet tech needs and ergonomic workspace at home,

• Macbook (and monitor if needed),

• Employee support program: free psychological counseling, legal advice, financial advice etc.

• Private health insurance,

• 1 day birth day leave,

• An iyzicoMate is assigned to help you with anything you may need on your onboarding,

• A detailed orientation program designed for you to fully grasp the iyzico culture.

Başvurunuzu göndererek, belgede ve eklerinde yer alan tüm bilgilerin, ayrıca hakkınızda diğer kaynaklardan elde edilecek bilgilerin (örneğin referans olarak gösterdiğiniz kişilerin vereceği bilgiler) iyzi Ödeme ve Elektronik Para Hizmetleri A.Ş. (kısaca “iyzico”) tarafından elde edilmesine, detaylı incelemeler yapılmasına, başvuruların sonuçlandırılması ve başvuru süreçlerinin iyileştirilmesi amaçlarıyla kullanılmasına, bu amaçlarla uyumlu makul bir süre boyunca saklanmasına ve iyzico çalışanları, danışmanları ve dış hizmet sağlayıcılarına aktarılmasına, ayrıca iş arayışınızla ilgilenebilecek diğer işverenlerin de aralarında bulunduğu 3. kişi ve kurumlarla paylaşılmasına rıza göstermektesiniz.
Yasal düzenlemelerde kişisel verileri işlenen ilgili kişilere sağlanan haklardan kişisel veri işleme süreçleri, veri işlemenin amaçları, verilerin aktarıldığı kişiler hakkında bilgi talep etme; verilerin düzeltilmesini, silinmesini ve yok edilmesini talep etme; kullanılan hakların üçüncü kişilere de bildirilmesini isteme; otomatik sistemlerle yapılan işlemeler sonucu ortaya çıkan olumsuz sonuçlara itiraz etme ve işleme sebebiyle uğranan zararların tazminini talep etme hakları sikayet@iyzico.com adresine e-posta gönderilerek, veya +90 216 599 01 00 numaralı telefonla iyzico’ya ulaşılarak kullanılabilir.

title: Senior Product Adoption Strategist, Shopping
description:
Reddit is a community of communities. It’s built on shared interests, passion, and trust, and is home to the most open and authentic conversations on the internet. Every day, Reddit users submit, vote, and comment on the topics they care most about. With 100,000+ active communities and approximately 126 million daily active unique visitors, Reddit is one of the internet’s largest sources of information. For more information, visit www.redditinc.com.

Location: Remote from NYC, Chicago, SF or LA

We’re growing our collaborative team of individuals to drive Reddit Ads product adoption within our Global Sales organization and with advertisers. The Product Adoption team’s mission is to accelerate and scale the adoption of priority products and features to drive advertiser success and revenue growth. Product Adoption Strategists are Reddit ads product evangelists and experts. We are looking for our next team member who can help us to innovate and scale across our major programs.

In this role, you will be responsible for scaling ads product adoption and scale across the Large Customer Sales advertisers in the United States. You will partner with Sales to pitch, onboard, activate, and grow advertisers on our most critical product solutions and activate high-priority business opportunities. Your close partners include Sales, PMM, Product, Strategy & Ops, Enablement, and other PA team members.

You will drive the activation of the most relevant lower-funnel ad products to meet our customers' performance goals. In particular, you will focus on Shopping products utilization. You will need to enable and equip Sales with the right knowledge, training, collateral, market insights, and tools needed to drive customer success. You will work directly with advertisers to pitch, onboard, and activate across a variety of our product solutions. And you will advocate for the needs, opportunities, and gaps that Reddit advertisers experience with Reddit’s PMM and Product teams.

Why Join Reddit’s Product Adoption Team?

  • Innovative Environment: Be part of a newly reimagined team at one of the most dynamic platforms worldwide, contributing to groundbreaking strategies that drive growth.
  • Career Advancement: Significant opportunities for career development and mobility as you help shape the future of product adoption at Reddit.
  • Collaborative Culture: Join a group of thoughtful, smart, and adaptable individuals who value collaboration and support each other's growth.

Responsibilities:

  • Drive Growth: Lead efforts to scale the adoption of Reddit’s priority ads products, increasing advertiser engagement and revenue.
  • Program Development: Develop and manage programs to support product adoption across Large Customer Sales (LCS) advertisers and sales teams in the United States.
  • Client Engagement: Work directly with advertisers to identify, pitch, activate, onboard, and grow clients with strategic product opportunities.
  • Collaborate Cross-Functionally: Partner closely with Sales, Product, Product Marketing Management (PMM), Revenue Strategy & Analytics teams, GTM Enablement, and more in alignment to strategic goals.
  • Sales Enablement: Equip sales teams with the necessary knowledge, training, collateral, and market insights to effectively position and implement Reddit's ad products.
  • Feedback Loop: Advocate for advertiser needs and identify opportunities and gaps, providing feedback to PMM and Product teams to inform ongoing product development.
  • Reporting and Measurement: Partner with Sales and Strategy/Ops leadership to understand progress to goal and identify steps that can be taken to accelerate outcomes.

Basic Qualifications:

  • 5+ years of experience in digital advertising, sales, marketing strategy, operations, or relevant industries
  • Industry Experience: A strong background in product adoption, growth, or sales strategy within the digital advertising industry.
  • Cross-Functional Collaboration: Proven ability to work effectively with partner teams, leveraging cross-functional expertise to drive program success.
  • Proficient in Google Suite and Salesforce.

Preferred Qualifications:

  • Client-Centric Approach: Passion for understanding client needs and delivering solutions that drive their success.
  • Analytical Skills: Solid familiarity with data analysis techniques and tools such as Mode, Tableau, and Salesforce to track key metrics and outcomes.
  • Project Management: Excellent program and project management skills, with the ability to prioritize and manage multiple initiatives concurrently.
  • AI Proficiency: Familiarity with AI tools and automation skills, including ability to leverage AI for workflow optimization and productivity.
  • Communication Skills: Strong written and verbal communication skills, capable of clearly articulating strategies and outcomes to internal and external stakeholders.

Benefits:

  • Comprehensive Healthcare Benefits and Income Replacement Programs
  • 401k with Employer Match
  • Global Benefit programs that fit your lifestyle, from workspace to professional development to caregiving support
  • Family Planning Support
  • Gender-Affirming Care
  • Mental Health & Coaching Benefits
  • Flexible Vacation & Paid Volunteer Time Off
  • Generous Paid Parental Leave

Pay Transparency:

This job posting may span more than one career level.

In addition to base salary, this job is eligible to receive equity in the form of restricted stock units, and depending on the position offered, it may also be eligible to receive a commission. Additionally, Reddit offers a wide range of benefits to U.S.-based employees, including medical, dental, and vision insurance, 401(k) program with employer match, generous time off for vacation, and parental leave. To learn more, please visit https://www.redditinc.com/careers/.

To provide greater transparency to candidates, we share base salary ranges for all US-based job postings regardless of state. We set standard base pay ranges for all roles based on function, level, and country location, benchmarked against similar stage growth companies. Final offer amounts are determined by multiple factors including, skills, depth of work experience and relevant licenses/credentials, and may vary from the amounts listed below.

The base salary range for this position is:
$168,000—$235,200 USD

In select roles and locations, the interviews will be recorded, transcribed and summarized by artificial intelligence (AI). You will have the opportunity to opt out of recording, transcription and summarization prior to any scheduled interviews.

During the interview, we will collect the following categories of personal information: Identifiers, Professional and Employment-Related Information, Sensory Information (audio/video recording), and any other categories of personal information you choose to share with us. We will use this information to evaluate your application for employment or an independent contractor role, as applicable. We will not sell your personal information or disclose it to any third party for their marketing purposes. We will delete any recording of your interview promptly after making a hiring decision. For more information about how we will handle your personal information, including our retention of it, please refer to our Candidate Privacy Policy for Potential Employees and Contractors.

Reddit is proud to be an equal opportunity employer, and is committed to building a workforce representative of the diverse communities we serve. Reddit is committed to providing reasonable accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities and disabled veterans in our job application procedures. If, due to a disability, you need an accommodation during the interview process, please let your recruiter know.

title: 2e Lijns Support Engineer - Delft
description:
Ben jij iemand die technische vraagstukken niet alleen oplost, maar ook écht doorgrondt? Krijg je energie van complexere IT‑issues, het verbeteren van omgevingen en het helpen van klanten én collega’s vooruit? Dan zou dit zomaar jouw volgende stap kunnen zijn.

Bij Interstellar zoeken we een 2e Lijns Support Engineer die overzicht houdt, eigenaarschap neemt en meebouwt aan stabiele en toekomstbestendige IT‑omgevingen.

Jouw missie

Als 2e Lijns Support Engineer zorg jij ervoor dat IT‑omgevingen van onze Managed Services klanten optimaal functioneren. Je pakt complexe incidenten op, analyseert de oorzaak achter het probleem en komt met duurzame oplossingen. Niet alleen door te herstellen wat stuk is, maar door structureel te verbeteren en vooruit te kijken. Je bent een belangrijk aanspreekpunt voor klanten en een inhoudelijke sparringpartner voor collega’s. In deze rol combineer je technische diepgang met verantwoordelijkheid en klantgerichtheid.

Wat ga je doen?

Je bent verantwoordelijk voor het oplossen en beheersen van tweedelijns IT‑vraagstukken. Concreet betekent dit dat je:

  • complexe incidenten, service requests en changes analyseert en oplost binnen SLA’s.

  • het overzicht bewaart op openstaande tickets en actief verwachtingen managet richting klanten.

  • proactieve controles uitvoert en verbetermogelijkheden signaleert in IT‑omgevingen.

  • fungeert als technisch aanspreekpunt voor klanten remote.

  • documentatie actueel houdt en uitgevoerde acties zorgvuldig vastlegt.

  • bijdraagt aan procesverbeteringen en kennisdeling binnen het team.

  • junior collega’s begeleidt en ondersteunt in hun ontwikkeling.

Zo werk je

Je werkt gestructureerd en behoudt rust, ook wanneer de druk toeneemt. Je schakelt makkelijk tussen verschillende omgevingen en prioriteiten, zonder het kwaliteitsniveau uit het oog te verliezen. Je communiceert helder, neemt verantwoordelijkheid en durft beslissingen te nemen op basis van jouw expertise.

Wat vragen wij?

Om succesvol te zijn in deze functie, herken jij jezelf in het volgende profiel:

  • Een afgeronde technische MBO4/HBO‑opleiding (bij voorkeur ICT).

  • Minimaal 3 jaar relevante werkervaring.

  • Woonachtig in de omgeving.

  • In staat om complexe technische vraagstukken te analyseren en oplossingen te implementeren.

  • Diepgaande kennis van Microsoft Windows, Microsoft 365, Azure en Intune.

  • Ervaring met VMWare en ITIL/ISM.


Interstellar – A Thriving Place to Work!

Nu je weet wat we van jou als kandidaat verwachten, wil je natuurlijk ook weten waar je terecht komt als je bij Interstellar komt werken. Daar vertellen we je graag meer over.

Over Interstellar

Interstellar is een next level IT service provider. Een ambitieuze club met professionals die geen uitdaging uit de weg gaat. Dagelijks opereren onze medewerkers vanuit verschillende locaties in heel Nederland om klanten te voorzien van advies, relevante oplossingen en IT-beheer. Door te werken met duurzame IT-oplossingen dragen we niet alleen bij aan een goede oplossing voor onze klanten, maar ook aan een betere planeet voor de volgende generatie! Bij gelijke vaardigheden/competenties streven we naar diversiteit in teams.


Wat bieden wij

Natuurlijk bieden we bij Interstellar arbeidsvoorwaarden. Want naast het hebben van leuke collega’s, begrijpen we dat er nog meer dingen heel belangrijk zijn. Om ervoor te zorgen dat jij je werk zo goed mogelijk kunt doen, krijg je van ons:

  • Een salaris gebaseerd op jouw kennis en ervaring. (€ 2817 - € 4150 o.b.v. fulltime)

  • Een eigen laptop.

  • Je krijgt 8% vakantiegeld per jaar en 25 vakantiedagen op basis van een werkweek van 40 uur;

  • Een contract voor bepaalde tijd, met uitzicht op een vast contract.

  • Voor het woon-werkverkeer van de medewerker geldt een vergoeding van € 0,23 netto per kilometer.

  • Gratis lunch en altijd vers fruit op al onze locaties.

  • Een informele werksfeer, waarbij je zelf de verantwoordelijkheid draagt voor de indeling van je werkdag.

  • Een groots zomer- en kerstfeest waar collega’s vanuit het hele land bij elkaar komen.

  • Mogelijkheid tot deelname aan verschillende sportevenementen.

Sollicitatieproces

Zie jij jezelf aan de slag gaan op onze supportafdeling en help jij onze klanten ervoor te zorgen dat IT echt om hén draait? Solliciteer dan snel via onze website! Zien wij dezelfde match, dan plannen we eerst een telefonische intake met je in, waarna een gesprek op ons kantoor in Delft volgt. Heb je nog vragen? Neem dan contact op met onze recruiter: luke.delgado@interstellar.nl. Bij gelijke vaardigheden/competenties streven we naar diversiteit in teams.

title: Mobility Co-Founder / Head of Engineering (100 % remote) (m/f/d)
description:
We are looking to hire ambitious entrepreneurs to start and scale their own startups.

We are serial entrepreneurs, for example Paul Müller (founder Adjust, €1.2B exit) and Petter Made (founder SumUp, €8B) who are eager to support outlier personalities and serial entrepreneurs to build €1B+ companies.

Our offer:

  • A salary while you build your startup as you will directly be employed by us. Alternatively, you can opt for up to €500k in funding.

  • 1:1 sparring with unicorn founders on a weekly basis

  • Community: Access to the top 0.1% of founders, peers and investors

  • Team building: Hiring top notch talent supported through our network (over 50,000 professionals)

  • Distribution: Support in reaching product-market-fit and building up a sales force / marketing machine

  • Funding support for securing a multi-million euro funding round within 12 months (on average, EWOR Fellows raise > €2M after our Grand Pitch)

One of our fellows set a record for Europe’s largest pre-seed round by a first-time founder, securing a €12M pre-seed investment.

Tasks

  • You will own, build, and run your startup in fields such as Mobility

  • You will embark on an extensive personal development journey crafted by unicorn founders and follow a fully customised programme enhancing your goal, time, and energy management

  • You will receive support in hiring through our network to over 50,000 professionals and advice as well as best practices from serial entrepreneurs

  • You will receive intensive coaching to make your startup ready to raise millions in funding

  • You will iterate your product with us until having reached product-market-fit and receive support in building up a sales force or creating a marketing engine respectively

  • You are based in Europe or the Americas or open to relocate

  • You are willing to take full responsibility for your own startup and scale it to €100M+ in revenues

  • You have excellent communication skills in the English language

title: Vendeurs (f/h) - CDI 25h/16h - Poitiers Centre
description:
CE QUE VOUS FEREZ

En tant que Vendeur chez H&M, vous jouerez un rôle clé en créant une expérience client exceptionnelle. Vous accueillerez les clients, les guiderez à travers votre magasin et les aiderez à trouver ce dont ils ont besoin tout en mettant en valeur nos produits. En agissant conformément à nos valeurs, vous contribuerez à votre propre succès ainsi qu'à celui de l'entreprise.

Vous allez :

  • Partager vos connaissances en matière de mode et de produits pour aider les clients à choisir les produits qui leur conviennent le mieux.
  • Collaborer avec votre équipe pour offrir un service exceptionnel à chaque étape du parcours client.
  • Veiller à ce que la surface de vente et le stock soient bien approvisionnés, organisés et accueillants.
  • Participer à l'ouverture et à la fermeture du magasin.
  • Représenter la marque de manière positive lors de toutes les interactions avec les clients.

AVEC QUI VOUS TRAVAILLEREZ

Nos magasins sont le cœur de notre groupe, où les clients découvrent notre marque en personne. En tant que membre de l'équipe du magasin, chaque collaborateur - Vendeurs, Responsables de Départements, Visuels Merchandisers et Responsable de Magasin - contribue à créer un environnement inspirant et accueillant.

Vous collaborerez entre magasins pour partager des idées et réussir ensemble. Aux côtés de l’équipe, vous jouerez un rôle essentiel en aidant les clients à exprimer leur personnalité avec les dernières tendances et les styles intemporels. En établissant un lien avec nos clients, nous rendons la mode accessible et durable pour tous.


QUI VOUS ÊTES

Nous recherchons des collaborateurs avec idéalement une expérience en service client dans les domaines de la mode, du commerce de détail ou des secteurs similaires.

Et des personnes qui sont…

  • Passionnées par la mode et par la quête d’une expérience client exceptionnelle tout en mettant en avant nos produits et en développant les ventes.
  • Épanouies dans des environnements collectifs, collaboratifs et stimulants.
  • Communicantes, créatives, curieuses de travailler avec les outils digitaux en magasin, avec une forte envie d'apprendre et de se développer.
  • Flexibles et orientées vers l'action.

QUI NOUS SOMMES

Le groupe H&M est une entreprise mondiale de marques de mode fortes. Notre objectif est de prouver qu'il n'y a pas de compromis entre un design exceptionnel, des prix abordables et des solutions durables. Nous voulons libérer la mode pour le plus grand nombre, et nos clients sont au cœur de chaque décision que nous prenons. Nous sommes composés de milliers de collaborateurs passionnés et talentueux unis par notre culture et nos valeurs communes. Ensemble, nous voulons utiliser notre influence et nos connaissances pour pousser l'industrie de la mode vers un avenir plus inclusif et durable.

CE QUE NOUS OFFRONS

Chez H&M Group, nous sommes fiers d'être une entreprise dynamique et accueillante. Nous offrons à nos collaborateurs des avantages attrayants avec de vastes opportunités de développement à travers le monde, ainsi qu’un programme de formation complet dès l’intégration.

  • une rémunération de 12,31 € brut/heure minimum, selon profil et expérience
  • Une remise personnelle de 25% sur l’ensemble des marques du Groupe H&M,
  • Une prime de 13ème mois,
  • La possibilité d’une part de rémunération variable supplémentaire dépendamment de la performance économique globale de l’Entreprise (Participation & Intéressement),
  • Un compte épargne salariale,
  • Un programme HIP (prime de départ à la retraite), Pour en savoir plus cliquez ici
  • Une mutuelle santé offrant des prestations de qualité dès ton arrivée,
  • Une prévoyance,
  • La possibilité de prendre des tickets restaurant de 9€ (prise en charge employeur de 55%),
  • Une prise en charge à hauteur de 75% des transports en commun,
  • L’accès aux avantages CSE,
  • Un Accord Qualité de vie au travail,
  • Une possibilité d’évolution sur toute la France et plus encore…

REJOIGNEZ-NOUS

Notre originalité vient d'une combinaison de nombreuses choses - notre culture inclusive et collaborative, nos valeurs fortes et les opportunités de croissance. Mais surtout, ce sont nos collaborateurs qui font de nous ce que nous sommes.

Faites le prochain pas dans votre carrière avec nous. L’aventure commence ici.

Encourageant la diversité sous toutes ses formes, le Groupe H&M est engagé dans une démarche en faveur de l'emploi des personnes en situation de handicap.

Évaluation des Postes en Magasin :
Pour gérer efficacement le volume élevé de candidatures pour le poste de Vendeur (H/F), nous utilisons une méthode d'évaluation en ligne basée sur les compétences pour la plupart de nos magasins. Cela signifie que vous passerez une évaluation en ligne dans le cadre de votre processus de candidature et de sélection.

Vos réponses seront évaluées par un outil appliquant des critères prédéfinis fixés par le Groupe H&M.

Après l'évaluation, vous avez la possibilité de donner votre avis et de poser des questions. Si vous rencontrez des difficultés ou des préoccupations concernant la méthode d'évaluation en ligne, vous pouvez demander une méthode alternative en contactant recruitment_support@hm.com.
Le choix d'une méthode alternative n'affectera pas vos chances d'être considéré pour le poste.

Pour plus d'informations sur la manière dont vos données personnelles sont traitées, veuillez consulter notre Avis de Confidentialité.

Nous nous engageons à un processus de recrutement équitable et basé sur les compétences. Nous vous demandons donc de ne pas joindre de lettre de motivation à votre candidature.
