title: Senior / Staff Data Engineer (BI) – CEG Team
description:
About Agoda

At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.

Today, we are part of Booking Holdings [NASDAQ: BKNG], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide.

No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.

Get To Know Our Team:

The Data department oversees all of Agoda’s data-related requirements. Our ultimate goal is to enable and increase the use of data in the company through creative approaches and the implementation of powerful resources such as operational and analytical databases, queue systems, BI tools, and data science technology. We hire the brightest minds from around the world to take on this challenge and equip them with the knowledge and tools that contribute to their personal growth and success while supporting our company’s culture of diversity and experimentation. The role the Data team plays at Agoda is critical as business users, product managers, engineers, and many others rely on us to empower their decision making. We are equally dedicated to our customers by improving their search experience with faster results and protecting them from any fraudulent activities. Data is interesting only when you have enough of it, and we have plenty. This is what drives up the challenge as part of the Data department, but also the reward.

The Opportunity:

As a Senior/Staff Data Engineer in CEG (Customer Experience Group), you will help design, build, and maintain the data and software foundations that power how CEG Business users serves customers and agents across all contact channels. You will work closely with Product, Operations, Analytics, Operations Efficiency, WFM, DevOps and engineering teams to deliver reliable data pipelines, scalable models, internal tools, and clear insights that improve customer experience and operational efficiency.

You are comfortable switching between engineering work (pipelines, data models, internal services, tooling, optimization) and analytics work (business questions, dashboards, deep‑dive analysis). You can talk to both engineers and business stakeholders in simple, clear language. At the Staff level, you will also shape CEG’s data and tooling strategy, influence cross‑team architecture, and raise the overall engineering and data bar for the team.

What You’ll Do:

Data Engineering

  • Design, build, and maintain scalable ETL/ELT pipelines to ingest, transform, and serve data from CEG systems (case management, telephony, chat, bots, QA tools, WFM, CRM) and third‑party tools and logs.
  • Develop and optimize data models (e.g., warehouse tables, marts, views) that power CEG reporting, monitoring, forecasting, QA, and experimentation.
  • Ensure data quality, reliability, and observability:
    • Implement validation checks, anomaly detection, and monitoring for key CEG datasets and metrics.
    • Work with stakeholders to define and enforce data definitions, SLAs, and ownership for critical tables and metrics.
  • Improve performance and cost efficiency of data jobs and queries (e.g., partitioning, indexing, query tuning, storage format optimization) for high‑volume CEG data (calls, chats, emails, cases, events).
  • Collaborate with data platform and engineering teams to standardize tooling and best practices (e.g., version control, CI/CD for data and services, code review, documentation, runbooks).

Data Tools & Product Development

  • Design and build data tools and internal products for CEG (e.g., self‑service analytics, case monitoring dashboards, alerting systems, investigator tools, QA/review tools, agent performance views).
  • Use languages such as Python, Java, Golang, or JavaScript/TypeScript to implement APIs, data services, and lightweight UIs that expose data in a usable way to agents, managers, and operations teams.
  • Work closely with CEG product managers and operations to translate operational pain points into concrete data tools, from problem framing to delivery and iteration.
  • Apply solid software engineering practices—testing, code reviews, CI/CD, observability—to data products so they are reliable, maintainable, and easy to extend.
  • At Staff level, define and drive the roadmap for key CEG data tools and platforms, ensuring reuse across regions, lines of business, and channels.

Data Analytics & Business Impact

  • Partner with CEG product and business teams to translate questions into data problems and design clear analytic approaches.
  • Build and maintain dashboards and reports (e.g., contact volumes, handling time, quality, customer outcomes, agent performance, spot alerts) that provide reliable metrics and self‑service access to data.
  • Perform deep‑dive analysis to understand trends in contact patterns, customer issues, agent performance, and operational efficiency; identify root causes and propose practical, data‑driven recommendations.
  • Define and maintain metrics and KPIs (e.g., CSAT, NPS, SLA, AHT, FCR, quality scores), ensuring consistent definitions across CEG teams and tools.
  • Communicate findings in simple, business‑friendly language, including clear implications and recommended next steps.

Stakeholder & Team Collaboration

    • Act as a trusted data partner for CEG stakeholders (operations leaders, product managers, WFM, QA, training, policy, and regional leadership).
    • Work with other data engineers, analysts, and scientists to align on data standards, reusable components, and shared datasets for CEG.
    • Mentor junior and mid‑level team members on data engineering, analytics, and software engineering best practices.
    • Contribute to continuous improvement of team workflows (code reviews, testing, documentation, runbooks, knowledge sharing, incident reviews).
    • At Staff level, influence cross‑team architecture and ways of working, making sure CEG’s data ecosystem scales with business growth.

Required Qualifications:

  • 8+ years working as a Data Engineer, Analytics Engineer, or Data Analyst in a data‑driven environment (Staff level typically 10+ or equivalent scope/impact).
  • Strong SQL skills (complex joins, window functions, aggregation, query optimization).
  • Experience with at least one major data warehouse / big data technology (e.g., BigQuery, Snowflake, Redshift, Hive, Spark, Vertica, StarRocks, or similar).
  • Solid experience with ETL/ELT tools or orchestration frameworks (e.g., Airflow, dbt, internal frameworks).
  • Proficiency in at least one programming language for data and services (e.g., Python, Java, Golang, Kotlin, or JavaScript/TypeScript).
  • Experience building production‑grade data pipelines and/or data services with attention to quality, monitoring, and maintainability.
  • Experience with BI / visualization tools (e.g., Tableau, Power BI, Superset, Metabase, Looker).
  • Strong analytical thinking: comfortable framing business questions, exploring data, and turning results into clear insights.
  • Ability to communicate complex topics in simple, concise language to non‑technical stakeholders.

Preferred Qualifications:

  • Experience with event‑driven data (logs, clickstream, customer journey, contact flows, tracking data).
  • Knowledge of data modeling techniques (e.g., dimensional modeling, Kimball, data vault, star/snowflake schema).
  • Experience with A/B testing, experimentation platforms, or causal analysis.
  • Familiarity with ML pipelines or working with data science teams (e.g., routing models, QA scoring, forecasting, recommendations).
  • Experience in online consumer products, travel, e‑commerce, or marketplaces.
  • Hands‑on frontend or backend development experience (e.g., building internal tools in React/Next.js, Node.js, or similar frameworks) used by operations or support teams.
  • Prior experience in a Staff or Tech‑Lead role, driving technical direction and mentoring multiple engineers/analysts.

Please review our Hiring Process Guidelines before your interview — click here to learn how interviewing at Agoda works.

title: Oberbauleiter Rohrleitungsbau (m/w/d)
description:
Wir bauen und erneuern die Infrastruktur, auf die Städte, Unternehmen und Menschen täglich angewiesen sind. Für den Betrieb in Essen suchen wir einen erfahrenen Oberbauleiter (m/w/d) mit dem Fokus Rohrleitungsbau (Gas, Wasser, Kanäle). In dieser Funktion sollen mehrere Bauprojekte sicher gesteuert, Führung übernommen und, gemeinsam mit der Betriebsleitung, der regionale Rohrleitungs- und Tiefbau weiterentwickelt werden.
In dieser Position verantwortest Du ein Portfolio parallel laufender Bauvorhaben in der kommunalen Versorgungsinfrastruktur. Du führst und entwickelst unsere Bauleiter und gewerblichen Mitarbeitenden, stellst den wirtschaftlichen Erfolg der Projekte sicher und bist ein kompetenter Ansprechpartner für Auftraggeber, Ingenieurbüros, Behörden und Nachunternehmer. Dabei berichtest Du direkt an die Betriebsleitung und erhältst den notwendigen Gestaltungsspielraum, um Entscheidungen zu treffen, Strukturen weiterzuentwickeln und den Standort nachhaltig voranzubringen.
  • Unbefristete Führungsposition in einem zukunftssicheren und wachsenden Infrastrukturmarkt
  • Eigener Verantwortungsbereich mit direkter Anbindung an die Niederlassungsleitung
  • Viel Gestaltungsspielraum, kurze Entscheidungswege und Rückendeckung bei der Umsetzung
  • Regionaler Tätigkeitsschwerpunkt in Essen und Umgebung
  • Attraktive Vergütung sowie Urlaubs- und Weihnachtsgeld
  • Dienstwagen, auch zur privaten Nutzung
  • 30 Tage Urlaub sowie flexible Arbeitszeiten und mobiles Arbeiten, soweit es die Aufgabe ermöglicht
  • Moderne Arbeitsmittel und zunehmend digitalisierte Projekt- und Unternehmensprozesse
  • Individuelle Weiterbildungs- und Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten
  • Betriebliche Altersvorsorge, vermögenswirksame Leistungen und Zusatzversicherungen
  • JobRad-Leasing, Teamevents und weitere attraktive Zusatzleistungen
  • Ein kollegiales Umfeld, in dem Fachkompetenz, Verbindlichkeit und Zusammenarbeit zählen!
  • Technische, wirtschaftliche und organisatorische Leitung mehrerer Bauprojekte im Rohrleitungs- und Tiefbau
  • Führung und Entwicklung der zugeordneten Bauleiter und Projektteams und Unterstützung insbesondere der jüngere Führungskräfte bei ihrer Weiterentwicklung
  • Sicherstellung der kosten-, termin-, qualitäts- und vertragsgerechte Ausführung der Bauprojekte
  • Steuerung des Personal-, Geräte- und Nachunternehmereinsatzes und Gewährleistung der wirtschaftliche Auslastung verfügbarer Ressourcen
  • Überwachung der Projektbudgets, Arbeitskalkulationen, Leistungsmeldungen, Prognosen und Abrechnungen, inkl. Maßnahmenergreifung bei Abweichungen
  • Identifikation von Chancen und Risiken und Zusammenarbeit mit den Projektteams im Vertrags- und Nachtragsmanagement
  • Durchführung von technischen und kaufmännischen Verhandlungen mit Auftraggebern, Planern, Behörden, Lieferanten und Nachunternehmern
  • Kontrolle der Einhaltung gesetzlicher, technischer und arbeitsschutzrechtlicher Anforderungen auf den Baustellen
  • Mitwirkung bei Ausschreibungen und Kalkulationen sowie der Kundengewinnung und -entwicklung
  • Optimierung der betrieblichen Abläufe, Führungsstrukturen und digitalen Prozesse des Standorts gemeinsam mit der Betriebsleitung
  • Studium im Bereich Bauingenieurwesen, Versorgungstechnik oder Wirtschaftsingenieurwesen; vergleichbare Qualifikationen sind ebenfalls willkommen
  • Mehrjährige erfolgreiche Berufserfahrung als Bauleiter, Senior-Bauleiter oder Oberbauleiter im Rohrleitungs-, Netz- oder Tiefbau
  • Führungserfahrung gegenüber Bauleitern, Polieren oder größeren Projektteams und Verständnis dafür, Verantwortung klar zu übertragen
  • Fundierte Kenntnisse der VOB, des Bauvertragswesens sowie der Kalkulation, Abrechnung und des Nachtragsmanagements
  • Unternehmerisches Denken, Ergebnisorientierung und Organisationsstärke, auch bei mehreren parallel laufenden Projekten
  • Verbindlichkeit und Verhandlungsgeschick gegenüber Auftraggebern und Projektpartnern
  • Entscheidungswille und Durchsetzungsvermögen verbunden mit einem wertschätzenden und verlässlichen Führungsstil
  • Sicherer Umgang mit gängigen, digitalen Arbeitsmitteln und ein Führerschein (Klasse B)
Wir freuen uns auf Deine Bewerbung!

title: Junior Inspection Technician
description:
NOV Egypt is seeking fresh or early-career candidates (0–2 years) with a Technical Diploma (Industrial/Mechanical or equivalent) or relevant higher technical education to join our Inspection Trainee Program. The role provides hands-on field experience assisting NDT Inspectors and Lifting Inspectors in inspection, testing, and technical support activities. Selected candidates will gain practical exposure to Non-Destructive Testing (NDT), lifting equipment inspection, and general inspection operations under supervision, followed by structured internal training and certification based on performance.

Key Responsibilities

• Assist NDT Inspectors in performing inspection activities including MT, PT, UT, ET, and VT under supervision.
• Assist Lifting Inspectors in inspection and verification of lifting equipment and accessories.
• Support field and workshop inspection activities.
• Assist in preparation of inspection reports and related documentation.
• Support preparation, verification, and handling of NDT and inspection equipment.
• Assist in equipment setup, basic maintenance, and operational checks.
• Ensure compliance with company procedures, industry standards, and HSE policies.
• Demonstrate strong commitment to safety, quality, and continuous learning.

Development Path

• Initial hands-on field exposure assisting NDT and Lifting Inspectors with structured performance evaluation.
• Enrolment in internal technical training and certification programs based on performance.
• Progressive qualification aligned with operational and inspection requirements.

Required Qualifications

• Technical Diploma (Industrial/Mechanical or equivalent) or relevant higher technical education.
• 0–2 years of experience (fresh graduates are encouraged to apply).
• Good English communication skills (written and spoken).
• Willingness to work in field and workshop environments.
• Strong attention to detail and safety awareness.

Location & Work Setup

• On-site position at assigned projects or company facilities.
• Regular field exposure required.
• Travel to project sites or client locations may be required.

title: Customer Engagement Executive (Showroom Experience)
description:
Location: Tampines 1

Employment Type:
12-Month Contract (Renewable)

Working Hours:
5 days work week (Rostered Schedule)

Monday – Friday:9:30am – 7:30pm

Saturday – Sunday: 9:30am – 6:30pm OR1:00pm – 10:00pm

2 Rest Days on Weekdays

Key Responsibilities

  • Deliver a warm, personalised and engaging showroom experience by proactively welcoming and interacting with walk-in customers.
  • Build genuine rapport with customers, understand their vehicle preferences and identify their purchasing interests.
  • Collect customer information, qualify sales opportunities and ensure all leads are accurately captured before handing them over to the Sales Team for follow-up.
  • Coordinate customer appointments, test drives and enquiries, working closely with the Sales Team to ensure a seamless customer journey.
  • Maintain accurate customer records and lead databases.
  • Create engaging content for TikTok, Instagram, Facebook and Xiaohongshu to enhance brand awareness and customer engagement.
  • Participate confidently in videos, livestreams and other digital marketing initiatives.
  • Support showroom events, roadshows, product launches and promotional campaigns by actively engaging customers.
  • Gather customer feedback and share insights to continuously improve the customer experience.
  • Assist with showroom merchandising, promotional materials, inventory coordination and ensure the showroom and vehicle displays are always well presented.
  • Collaborate closely with the Sales and Marketing teams to deliver a positive customer experience across both physical and digital touchpoints. The Sales Team will take ownership of sales consultations and purchase follow-ups after qualified leads have been handed over.

Requirements

  • Minimum 1 year of experience in hospitality, hotels, premium retail, luxury retail, automotive or other customer experience-focused environments.
  • A naturally outgoing, energetic and people-oriented personality with a genuine passion for delivering exceptional service.
  • Strong interpersonal and communication skills with the confidence to engage customers from diverse backgrounds.
  • Comfortable interacting with customers both face-to-face and through digital and social media platforms.
  • Passionate about social media, content creation and digital marketing trends.
  • Confident appearing in videos, livestreams and promotional content when required.
  • Able to communicate effectively in both English and Mandarin, as the role involves serving Mandarin-speaking customers and supporting Mandarin-language content creation and marketing activities.
  • Able to work weekends and public holidays when required.

Preferred Qualifications

  • Experience in hospitality, luxury hotels, premium retail, lifestyle or automotive industries.
  • Familiarity with TikTok, Instagram, Facebook and Xiaohongshu.
  • Basic photography, videography and video editing skills.
  • Experience in customer engagement, event support, brand promotions or lead generation.
  • Possession of a Class 3 Driving Licence will be an added advantage.

title: Kinderbegeleider buitenschoolse opvang Schilde
description:
Als kinderbegeleider bij Ferm Kinderopvang begeleid je kinderen van 2,5 tot 12 jaar in een warme en speelse omgeving. Dit is wat onze medewerkers ervan vinden:

“De waardering van de kinderen die ik elke dag voel, dat is het grootste compliment.”
Dean, kinderbegeleider.

Wil je graag al wat meer weten over het werken als kinderbegeleider? Neem dan zeker een kijkje op www.samenferm.be/word-kinderbegeleider

Jouw taken:

  • Je organiseert samen met jouw collega’s het middagtoezicht voor kinderen van 2.5 tot 12 jaar en helpt hen groeien op een speelse manier

  • Je zorgt dat kinderen en hun ouders zich thuis voelen

  • Je hebt oog voor hygiëne en veiligheid

Je bent de geknipte persoon, want …

  • Je voelt aan wat kinderen nodig hebben

  • Je houdt van samenwerken met je team

  • Je werkt elke middag, met uitzondering van woensdag: op onze locatie Sint-Lutgardis te Schilde van 12u25 tot 13u25 of op onze locatie Heilig Hart te ‘s Gravenwezel van 12u05 tot 13u05. Geef ons door welke locatie je voorkeur heeft.

  • Je begrijpt en spreekt Nederlands voor jouw gesprekken met ouders en kinderen

Je krijgt:

  • Een deeltijds bediendencontract van 4 uur per week van bepaalde duur van 1/09/2026 tot 30/06/2027. Je combineert deze job met een andere job zodat je in orde blijft voor sociale zekerheid.

  • Een loon in overeenstemming met de kinderopvangsector en een voordelenpakket met talrijke kortingen voor werknemers (voeding, kleding, uitstapjes …)

  • Overname van anciënniteit uit de kinderopvang

  • Vakantiegeld en eindejaarspremie

  • Kilometer- of fietsvergoeding

  • Persoonlijke begeleiding met oog voor jouw talenten

  • Interessante opleidingen op maat

  • Goed evenwicht tussen werk en privé dankzij:

    • een job dichtbij huis

    • gratis opvang van eigen kinderen (2.5 tot 12 jaar) tijdens de eigen werkuren

    • gunstige verlofregeling: extra verlofdagen en leeftijdsverlof

    • mogelijkheid om te combineren met een andere job of opleiding

Ferm werft aan op basis van competenties en talenten, ongeacht leeftijd, geslacht, origine, beperking …

Interesse in deze vacature?

Solliciteer via de link.

Voor meer informatie: SamenFerm.be of contacteer ons op 014 27 07 43 of via vverwerft@samenferm.be.

Wil je proeven van deze job? Je kan vrijblijvend eens meedraaien in de opvang.

Je krijgt van ons altijd een antwoord.
De selectie vindt online plaats of in je eigen regio.

title: Executive Assistant (Investment)
description:
• To be part of a globally recognised firm
  • Exciting career growth opportunities.

About Our Client

Our client is a globally established investment firm with a strong presence across globally. Operating a multi-manager platform, the organisation partners with portfolio managers across a range of strategies including quantitative, fundamental equity, and tactical trading.

Job Description

  • Provide comprehensive secretarial and administrative support to a team of Front Office executives/investment leaders
  • Manage complex calendars, meetings, and scheduling across time zones
  • Coordinate domestic and international travel, including itineraries and accomodation
  • Prepare meeting materials, agendas, and handle correspondence
  • Process expenses and support day-to-day operational needs
  • Assist with event planning, team activities, and ad hoc projects

title: Longverpleegkundige
description:
Wegens zwangerschapsverlof willen wij graag in contact komen met een Longverpleegkundige.

Als longverpleegkundige draai je je eigen spreekuur en werk je nauw samen met longartsen, medisch assistenten en andere collega’s binnen de polikliniek longgeneeskunde. Jij bent het vertrouwde gezicht voor patiënten met onder andere astma en COPD. Je begeleidt hen bij het vinden van de juiste inhalatiemedicatie en legt helder uit hoe deze gebruikt wordt.

Je geeft voorlichting over het ziektebeeld, maar ook over hoe patiënten zelf de regie kunnen nemen over hun gezondheid. Denk aan leefstijl, zelfmanagement en omgaan met klachten. Daarmee draag je bij aan de kwaliteit van leven van onze patiënten en ben je tevens ook het aanspreekpunt voor de patiënt wanneer er een toename is van (long) klachten. Samen zorgen we ervoor dat onze zorg steeds beter wordt.

Met wie werk je samen?

Je maakt deel uit van een deskundig en betrokken team bestaande uit:

  • 8 longartsen

  • 1 verpleegkundig specialist

  • 6 OSAS-consulenten

  • 4 researchverpleegkundigen

  • 3 coördinerend oncologieverpleegkundigen

  • 2 verpleegkundigen in de combinatierol long/oncologie

  • 5 longverpleegkundigen

Een hecht team waarin samenwerken vanzelfsprekend is en waarin ruimte is voor jouw inbreng en ontwikkeling.

Wat vragen wij van jou?

  • Een afgeronde opleiding tot (long)verpleegkundige;

  • Ruime ervaring in het verplegen en/of begeleiden van patiënten met longziekten;

  • BIG registratie;

  • Het is een pré als je ervaring hebt in het zelfstandig draaien van spreekuren.

  • Het heeft de voorkeur als je al in het bezit bent van een post hbo-diploma longverpleegkundig.

In jouw werk ben je patiënt- en service gericht, breng je een dosis enthousiasme mee, schakel je gemakkelijk en ben je positief kritisch. Ook sta je stevig in je schoenen, communiceer je op heldere wijze en werk je efficiënt. Tenslotte ben je iemand die graag initiatief toont en verantwoordelijkheid durft te nemen.

  • Een contract voor 6 maanden voor 24 - 24 uur per week. Werkzaamheden vinden zowel in Harderwijk als in Lelystad plaats.

  • Het salaris is ingedeeld volgens schaal 50 (FWG 3.0) en bedraagt minimaal € 3.463 en maximaal € 4.914 per maand op basis van 36 uur per week. Daarbij ontvang je 8,33% vakantietoeslag en een eindejaarsuitkering van 8,33%.

  • Je bouwt pensioen op bij Pensioenfonds Zorg & Welzijn. Daarnaast bieden wij interessante extra’s, waaronder korting op jouw zorgverzekeringspremie, bedrijfsfitness en de MKA (Meer Keuze Arbeidsvoorwaarden) regeling.

  • Via de St Jansdal academie kun je (online) werken aan jouw persoonlijke en professionele ontwikkeling. Ook zijn er regelmatig leuke initiatieven, waaronder workshops, om jou gezond en vitaal te houden.

  • Ook in het personeelsrestaurant is aandacht voor het gezond en vitaal houden van de medewerkers, je vindt er een breed assortiment aan gezonde voeding.

Ben je enthousiast?

Solliciteer dan via de sollicitatiebutton. Je kunt jouw sollicitatiebrief richten aan Debby van Dijk, bedrijfsleider. Wil je liever eerst meer informatie over deze functie dan kun je contact opnemen met Marja van de Brake of Maaike Becker (longverpleegkundigen) via telefoonnummer polikliniek longgeneeskunde: 0341-463743

We ontvangen jouw motivatie en cv graag zo spoedig mogelijk. Je ontvangt binnen een week na de sluitingsdatum een reactie op jouw sollicitatie. Om je een goed beeld te geven van de functie en het team, is een meeloopdag onderdeel van de procedure.

title: Renewable Energy Co-Founder / CSO (100 % remote) (m/f/d)
description:
We are looking to hire ambitious entrepreneurs to start and scale their own startups.

We are serial entrepreneurs, for example Paul Müller (founder Adjust, €1.2B exit) and Petter Made (founder SumUp, €8B) who are eager to support outlier personalities and serial entrepreneurs to build €1B+ companies.

Our offer:

  • A salary while you build your startup as you will directly be employed by us. Alternatively, you can opt for up to €500k in funding.

  • 1:1 sparring with unicorn founders on a weekly basis

  • Community: Access to the top 0.1% of founders, peers and investors

  • Team building: Hiring top notch talent supported through our network (over 50,000 professionals)

  • Distribution: Support in reaching product-market-fit and building up a sales force / marketing machine

  • Funding support for securing a multi-million euro funding round within 12 months (on average, EWOR Fellows raise > €2M after our Grand Pitch)

One of our fellows set a record for Europe’s largest pre-seed round by a first-time founder, securing a €12M pre-seed investment.

Tasks

  • You will own, build, and run your startup in fields such as Renewable Energy

  • You will embark on an extensive personal development journey crafted by unicorn founders and follow a fully customised programme enhancing your goal, time, and energy management

  • You will receive support in hiring through our network to over 50,000 professionals and advice as well as best practices from serial entrepreneurs

  • You will receive intensive coaching to make your startup ready to raise millions in funding

  • You will iterate your product with us until having reached product-market-fit and receive support in building up a sales force or creating a marketing engine respectively

  • You are based in Europe or the Americas or open to relocate

  • You are willing to take full responsibility for your own startup and scale it to €100M+ in revenues

  • You have excellent communication skills in the English language

title: Administration Manager
description:
Job Summary

The Administration Manager provides strategic leadership for the organisation's administrative and office operations, ensuring efficient, compliant, and scalable business support functions that enable organisational growth across the Singapore headquarters and international offices. This role oversees office administration, facilities management, procurement, vendor management, workplace engagement, governance, and continuous process improvement while delivering effective operational support to employees and senior management.

Responsibilities

  • Develop and execute administrative and office operations strategies aligned with business objectives to support organisational growth
  • Lead office administration, facilities management, procurement, and workplace operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
  • Monitor operational KPIs, analyse performance trends, and recommend actionable improvements to Senior Management
  • Review, develop, and standardise administrative policies, SOPs, and operational processes to enhance consistency and efficiency
  • Establish scalable administrative practices to support regional and international office expansion
  • Oversee daily administrative and office operations to maintain an efficient, safe, and well-maintained workplace environment
  • Forecast office resource needs including workspace, equipment, and administrative support to optimise utilisation
  • Manage procurement processes, office supplies, inventory, and vendor relationships to ensure cost-effective service delivery
  • Coordinate office maintenance, renovations, space planning, and facilities management projects to meet organisational needs
  • Manage employee onboarding logistics including workstations, equipment, office access, and administrative setup for seamless integration
  • Collaborate with department leaders to address operational and administrative requirements effectively
  • Lead employee engagement initiatives, company events, wellness programmes, and workplace activities to foster a positive culture
  • Manage employee welfare programmes and provide administrative support services to enhance employee experience
  • Resolve workplace-related issues professionally while maintaining confidentiality and promoting collaboration
  • Facilitate effective communication and collaboration across departments to support organisational goals
  • Drive continuous improvement initiatives to enhance administrative efficiency and service delivery
  • Implement and optimise office management systems and digital administrative solutions to streamline operations
  • Support organisational change initiatives, office relocations, and workplace improvement projects to ensure smooth transitions
  • Coordinate business continuity planning related to administrative and office operations to mitigate risks
  • Provide executive administrative support to Senior Management including meeting coordination and travel arrangements
  • Develop and manage annual administration and office operating budgets to control costs and optimise resource allocation
  • Oversee procurement activities and monitor administrative expenditure to ensure budget compliance
  • Evaluate vendor performance and negotiate contracts to achieve quality service and cost efficiency
  • Manage relationships with office service providers, contractors, and suppliers to maintain service standards
  • Identify and implement cost-saving initiatives while maintaining operational effectiveness
  • Develop and maintain administrative governance frameworks, office policies, and standard operating procedures to ensure compliance
  • Ensure adherence to workplace health and safety regulations, PDPA requirements, and other applicable legislation
  • Maintain accurate administrative records and documentation to support internal and external audits

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Business Management, or a related discipline
  • Minimum 5 years of progressive experience in administration management, office management, or workplace operations
  • Proven experience leading administrative functions, operational improvements, and organisational change initiatives
  • Strong knowledge of office administration, facilities management, procurement, vendor management, and workplace operations
  • Experience implementing office management systems and digital workflow solutions
  • Exposure to supporting multi-country administrative operations is an advantage
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office, Google Workspace, and office management platforms

title: Flexijob kinderbegeleider buitenschoolse opvang Schilde
description:
Als kinderbegeleider bij Ferm Kinderopvang begeleid je kinderen van 2,5 tot 12 jaar in een warme en speelse omgeving. Dit is wat onze medewerkers ervan vinden:

“De waardering van de kinderen die ik elke dag voel, dat is het grootste compliment.”
Dean, kinderbegeleider.

Wil je graag al wat meer weten over het werken als kinderbegeleider? Neem dan zeker een kijkje op www.samenferm.be/word-kinderbegeleider

Jouw taken:

  • Je organiseert samen met jouw collega’s het middagtoezicht voor kinderen van 2.5 tot 12 jaar en helpt hen groeien op een speelse manier

  • Je zorgt dat kinderen en hun ouders zich thuis voelen

  • Je hebt oog voor hygiëne en veiligheid

Je bent de geknipte persoon, want …

  • Je voelt aan wat kinderen nodig hebben

  • Je houdt van samenwerken met je team

  • Je werkt elke middag, met uitzondering van woensdag: op onze locatie Sint-Lutgardis te Schilde van 12u25 tot 13u25 of op onze locatie Heilig Hart te ‘s Gravenwezel van 12u05 tot 13u05. Geef ons door welke locatie je voorkeur heeft.

  • Je begrijpt en spreekt Nederlands voor jouw gesprekken met ouders en kinderen

  • Je voldoet aan de voorwaarden om een flexijob uit te oefenen

Je krijgt:

  • Een loon in overeenstemming met de kinderopvangsector (belastingvrij)

  • Enkel vakantiegeld

  • Kilometer- of fietsvergoeding

Ferm werft aan op basis van competenties en talenten, ongeacht leeftijd, geslacht, origine, beperking …

Interesse in deze vacature?

Solliciteer via de link.

Voor meer informatie: SamenFerm.be of contacteer ons op 014 27 07 43 of via vverwerft@samenferm.be.

Wil je proeven van deze job? Je kan vrijblijvend eens meedraaien in de opvang.

Je krijgt van ons altijd een antwoord.
De selectie vindt online plaats of in je eigen regio.

title: Senior EHS Engineer
company: THE LYCRA COMPANY SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
description:
Job Responsibilities:

  • Implement and maintain Environment, Health, and Safety (EHS) policies, procedures, and programs in compliance with local regulations and company standards.
  • Lead the implementation of industrial hygiene (IH) and occupational health (OH) programs in compliance with applicable local regulatory requirements.

title: Business Improvement Manager
description:
The Business Improvement Manager will be responsible for supporting the business core teams in initiating and implementing improvement projects and initiatives across all elements of warehouse and transport operations, as well as supporting functions.

Working hours: Monday to Friday, 08.00-17.00

We are flexible for this role to be based at any of our sites across the country: Kent (Teynham), Evesham, Washington, Hilsea, Newton Abbot or Broxburn.

Key Duties of a Business Improvement Manager:

  • Co-ordinate and work with site senior teams to identify improvement opportunities, which have a positive impact on operational and business performance across quality, cost, service and safety elements.
  • Identify, agree and deliver improvement initiative objectives and timescales with site & regional leadership teams (Including as appropriate, local C.I. Champions).
  • Produce clear operational improvement proposals, change plans and communicate to the relevant stakeholders as required, ensuring consideration for the cost benefit and complexity of delivering the change.
  • Liaise with key stakeholders and subject matter experts to ensure the creation of fully considered and objective proposals and manage effective change processes where necessary.
  • Ensuring plans and teams maintain structure, focus and deliver on the identified improvement projects for the region.
  • Ensure savings generated through improvement initiatives are quantified and validated by Finance.
  • Complete in depth and complex analysis to identify current performance and/or warehouse/transport trends used to support any improvements.
  • Support the operational improvement implementation process; ensuring relevant operational teams have support and coaching throughout the change cycle.
  • Utilise business central support teams including IT expertise to develop potential new ways of working as part of a depot / business improvement initiative.
  • Complete analytical activity to measure potential and delivered benefits of any operational improvement proposal at either site, regional or business level ensuring capture of actual vs expected value.
  • Provide regular communication updates on the progress of improvement initiatives at either depot, regional or business level.
  • Act as a business control point to identify best practice and facilitate information sharing across the business, ensuring “lessons learned” are identified and shared.
  • Ongoing collaboration - sharing best practice and generating ideas for future projects across the FW business, as well as wider Chill Division peers
  • Support and evolve tools and techniques to improve the business continuous improvement agenda.
  • Logistics/Industry experience is highly desirable
  • Ability to apply Project Management and LEAN Methodologies to support the delivery of any given improvement initiative to completion.
  • High level of communication and influencing skills required to ensure business stakeholders deliver the required savings and productivity initiatives.
  • A proven track record managing project change within warehouse/transport operations.
  • Ability to stay focused and proactively prioritise initiatives.
  • Flexibility within the role to be able to contribute to a variety of areas within the operation.
  • Able to demonstrate a high level of attention to detail.
  • A strong operational warehousing/transport background.
  • Able to work to tight deadlines.
  • High level of expertise in MS Word, Excel, Power Point and Outlook.
  • Literate in warehouse/transport management systems
  • A proactive self-starter with the ability to be work remotely.
  • Should demonstrate the drive and desire to progress.
  • Excellent time management and problem-solving skills.
  • Strong interpersonal, communication skills and the capability to interact at local to Senior levels.

As part of our drive to make Fowler Welch a great place to work. We are proud to be an inclusive and diverse organisation where we are committed to employee development and recognising success for hard working performers.

Our dedicated learning and development programmes are open to every employee to give you the opportunity to shape your own future within logistics and continue to work in an environment where team culture thrives.

Our People are the driving force behind our success, which is why we offer a wide range of benefits which include:

  • Annual Leave – Competitive holiday entitlement of 25 days plus the normal bank bank holidays.
  • Company Bonus – We do our best work to succeed together. When we achieve our goals you'll be rewarded through our bonus scheme.
  • Private Medical Cover – This gives you peace of mind, you have choice, flexibility and speed of access to the most clinically appropriate care via Bupa.
  • Pension scheme – we want colleagues to enjoy a comfortable retirements so we offer a great contribution of 4.5% employee and 8% employer.
  • Life Assurance - x3 your annual salary.
  • Wellness – Via our Employee Assistance Programme we offer immediate access to a confidential telephone counselling and legal information service that operates 24 hours a days, 365 days a year.
  • Eye Care Vouchers – We can provide you with substantial savings with free eye tests and discounts on prescription glasses.
  • Reward & Recognition – We recognise that employees have gone the extra mile via Employee of the month and year, special recognition and long service awards.
  • Everyday discounts - via our benefit platform you will have access to over 50 retailer discounts for everyday savings!

If you meet the requirements for the above role and are looking for your next career opportunity please apply now and become a part of our #WinningTeam!

title: MASTER
description:
Job Summary

Ensure safe and compliant vessel operations by managing navigation, training, crisis response, and regulatory adherence. Provide technical maritime expertise and collaborate with authorities to uphold operational excellence and environmental standards.

Responsibilities

  • Operate vessels consistently following SOPs, operations manuals, and company/client policies during marine operations, berthing, and mooring
  • Review navigational and vessel handling assessments to design and optimize systematic training programs that meet company and client operational requirements
  • Develop and implement crisis management plans to mitigate risks and coordinate with authorities during incidents, accidents, or investigations
  • Ensure compliance with international maritime laws, regulations, and conventions to maintain legal and regulatory standards
  • Collaborate with local authorities to align operations and training documentation with Singapore’s industrial and recommended standards
  • Provide technical advice on ship construction, general arrangement, deck, and bridge systems to support maritime operations
  • Maintain quality and standards for vessel platforms, Officer-on-Watch assessments, safe navigation, and vessel command
  • Participate in maritime incident investigations and contribute to work-related inquiries to improve safety and operational procedures
  • Review and plan sailing routes for drills, day/night sorties, and actively participate in sea sorties as required
  • Implement environmental regulations and best practices to minimize the vessel’s ecological impact in line with international standards
  • Support marine training initiatives by providing expertise and guidance on training-related matters

Required competencies and certifications

  • Master Mariner STCW qualification, supported by GMDSS and STCW Basic Safety Training
  • Certificate of Competency (CoC) Class 1 with at least three years of sailing experience within Singapore Port Limit (SPL)
  • Ship Security Certificate
  • Familiarity with the International Convention on Standards of Watchkeeping, Training, Certification, and Seafarers
  • Experience in maritime risk auditing and incident investigations
  • STCW Advanced Fire Fighting Certificate
  • Valid health certificate
  • Proficient in English, both oral and written
  • Computer literate with knowledge of Microsoft Office applications

title: Senior Woonbegeleider
description:
Voor onze nieuwe woonvorm voor jeugdigen in Vijfhuizen zijn wij op zoek naar een senior woonbegeleider. Als senior woonbegeleider draag je bij aan de kans voor deze jeugdigen om zichzelf te ontwikkelen en naar vermogen te participeren in de maatschappij.

Wat ga je doen als senior woonbegeleider?

Je gaat aan de slag als senior woonbegeleider op een nieuwe woonlocatie voor jongeren tussen de 14 t/m 17 jaar met ontwikkelingsproblematiek (zoals autismespectrumstoornissen of ADHD) en eventuele bijkomende problematiek. Als senior woonbegeleider ben je naast het dagelijk actieveren en motiveren van de bewoners bezig met het doorgaans verbeteren van de woonvorm. Dit wordt o.a. gedaan met het coachen van de aanwezige woonbegeleiders, het schrijven van verbetervoorstellen en relatiebeheer met de omwonenden. Daarnaast ben je verantwoordelijk voor dagelijkse verslaglegging, stem je regelmatig af met de mentor en woon je teamoverleggen bij. Samen met al je collega’s draag je zorg voor een prettig, veilig en ontwikkelingsgericht pedagogisch klimaat.

Je bent onderdeel van het vaste team dat bestaat uit een gedragsdeskundige, locatieleider, mentoren en woonbegeleiders. De locatie bevindt zich midden in een woonwijk. De cliënten wonen in twee geschakelde woningen die via 1e verdieping met elkaar verbonden zijn. Er is 24 uur per dag, 7 dagen in de week begeleiding aanwezig.

Wat wij jou bieden

  • Een salaris tussen € 3183,02 en € 4.440,62 bruto o.b.v. 36 uur. Inschaling op basis van kennis en ervaring;

  • Je krijgt 8,33% vakantiegeld en ruim 5 weken vakantie bij een fulltime dienstverband. Dus genoeg ruimte om op te laden en te genieten;

  • Een opleidingsbudget van 1,5% van je jaarsalaris dat je kunt inzetten voor jouw persoonlijke ontwikkeling via bijvoorbeeld de Prodeba Academy;

  • Een individueel keuzebudget van 8,33% van je jaarsalaris dat je kunt gebruiken voor extra verlofdagen, extra opleidingsbudget of je kunt het laten uitbetalen;

  • Een mooie regeling voor het leasen van een fiets naar keuze;

  • Uitgebreide onboardingsdag met alle nieuwe collega’s;

  • Budget voor een teambuildingsactiviteit met jouw team;

  • Traditiegetrouw een kerstfeest waarbij partners van harte welkom zijn;

  • Altijd een verrassing op jouw verjaardag!\

Wat wij jou vragen

  • Je hebt minimaal een mbo niveau 4 diploma op zak in de richting van Zorg & Welzijn of maatschappelijk werk;

  • 32-36 uur beschikbaarheid. Je werkt onregelmatige diensten, doordeweeks en in het weekend in de vorm van dag-, avond- en nachtdiensten volgens een rooster dat van tevoren wordt vastgesteld;

  • Je bent oplossingsgericht en innoverend;

  • Je beschikt over een zelfoplossend vermogen en weet goed contact te leggen met de bewoners en omwonenden;

  • Je hebt een registratie bij het registerplein of bent bereid deze binnen 8 weken te behalen;

  • Je hebt 10 jaar werkervaring als begeleider;

  • Het is een pré als je in het bezit bent van een diploma van de opleiding tot ervaringsdeskundige.

Werken bij Prodeba

Bij Prodeba kom je te werken in een krachtige en vooruitstrevende omgeving, waar passie en nabijheid centraal staan in de zorg die we bieden en de omgeving die we creëren. De cultuur is open, direct, innovatief, mensgericht en (positief) kritisch met ruimte voor eigen inbreng en ideeën. Prodeba denkt vooral in mogelijkheden.

Solliciteer nu!

Zie jij jezelf aan de slag gaan als senior woonbegeleider? Solliciteer dan snel via de sollicitatiebutton! Heb je nog vragen over de vacature bel dan gerust met Glenn Brabander via 06-

Wat heb je nodig?

title: Cleaner
company: LEE HUAT YAP KEE & CO PTE. LTD.
description:
Job Description:

1. Cleaning of Surrounding Premises / Compound.

  • Sweep and clear rubbish, dust, dirt, and debris.
  • Remove unwanted items as instructed.
  • Sweep and clean the internal fencing and surrounding areas.

2. Cleaning of Car Park and Tanker Parking Area.

  • Sweep and clear litter at all parking area.
  • Clear rubbish / litter at diesel pump area
  • Remove unwanted items as instructed by the Management

3. Cleaning of Main Entrance Lobby.

  • Sweep and mop the main lobby and staircase area daily.
  • Clean and wipe the entrance glass panels.

4. Rubbish / Waste Disposal Management.

  • Collect and dispose of rubbish and unwanted items into the rubbish bin.
  • Manage and ensure rubbish point area are always clean.

5. Cleaning of Male and Female Toilets.

  • Wash and clean wash basins and taps.
  • Wash and clean toilet urinals bowls and cubicles.
  • Wipe cubicle doors, partitions, walls and toilet mirror.
  • Wash and clean toilet wall tiles.
  • Remove and clear all cobwebs.
  • Clear and dispose of rubbish.
  • Replenish toilet consumables (if provided by the Company).

6. Grass Cutting and Weed Control.

  • Cut and trim grass around the premises.
  • Remove and dispose dried leaves from the landscaped areas.
  • Ensure all rubbish are dispose properly into the rubbish bin provided.

7. Drain Cleaning and Maintenance.

  • Clean surrounding drains using a high-pressure water jet.
  • Remove leaves, sand, and debris from drains to prevent blockages / chokes.

8. Tanker Washing and Cleaning.

  • Assist washing and cleaning of tanker as scheduled by Transport and Workshop department.

9. Roof-top Cleaning.

  • Sweep rooftop areas.
  • Remove dried leaves and other debris from the roof area.
  • Ensure no blockage to the rainwater outlet.

10. Warehouse Cleaning.

  • Sweep warehouse floors area where applicable
  • Remove and clear rubbish from the work area.

Requirements:

  • Always ensure safe and clean working environment.
  • Report any defects, leaks, safety hazards, or abnormal findings to the Facilities / Safety Department immediately.
  • Use appropriate cleaning equipment’s and PPE while on duty.
  • Ensure all cleaning equipment and tools are properly keep and stored after use.
  • Follow all workplace safety rules and company regulations.
  • Work At Height certified is preferred
  • Any other assignments instructed by the Superior.

5.5 days 8.30am - 5.30pm

title: セールスアドバイザーアルバイト（H＆M池袋）
location: 豊島区, 東京都, jp
description:
仕事内容​

セールスアドバイザー（H&Mアパレル販売スタッフ）は、ストアの売上と利益に貢献する最高のカスタマーエクスペリエンスを提供する役割を担っていまます。セールスアドバイザーとして、常にカスタマーを第一に考え、サポートを提供し、商品やファッションの知識を共有。店舗運営やカーメント（衣類）ケアを通じて、カスタマーが買い物をしやすい環境を整えます。​
また、自分の知識やスキルをチームメンバーと共有し、必要な時には助け合いながら、前向きな職場環境を築いてください。​

​

主な業務​

  • 優れたカスタマーエクスペリエンスを提供する。​

  • ガーメント（商品）の陳列、補充、フロアの整理整頓、ディスプレイを行う。​

  • 販売フロアや在庫室で積極的に商品を処理、補充、在庫管理を行う。​

  • 商品を開封し、セキュリティタグを付けてラベルを貼る。​

  • レジにてお客様の購入や返品をサポートし、店内業務全般を担当。​

求める人材​

  • チームプレーヤーであり、協力と集団の成功を促進する積極的で助けになるアプローチを持っていることが重要です。​前向きな心構えを持ち、同僚や顧客と接する際に熱心で楽観的であり、モチベーションが高い方。​また、変化する状況や顧客のニーズに柔軟に対応でき、迅速かつ効果的に顧客のニーズに対応するために自主的に行動できることが求められます。​らに、コミュニケーション能力が高く、社交的で、同僚や顧客との積極的な交流を促進すること方。​​

応募資格

  • 小売業、商品陳列、またはカスタマーサービスの経験がある方​

  • 効果的な時間管理 - ストレスに強く、優先順位をつけるのが得意であること​

  • ブランドアンバサダーとして、常にお客様のニーズを優先するカスタマーサービスマインドを持つこと。​

  • ファッションの知識があり、ファッショントレンドに興味があること。​

  • 販売のマインドセットを持ち、顧客のニーズにアプローチし、満たす能力があること。​

雇用契約期間：有期労働契約（アルバイト）​

試用期間:3～6か月間（試用期間中の給与・勤務時間：本採用と同じ）​

就業場所:（雇い入れ直後）H&M（池袋店舗名）、もしくは提示のあったそのほかの店舗​

　　　　 （変更の範囲) 販売及び本社における会社の定める業務​

就業時間 :シフト制（8時間労働・休憩60分）週2日～、1日4時間〜OK​

時間外労働の詳細：ワークライフバランスを徹底するため残業には店長の事前承認が必要​

時給：1,226円～​

加入保険：社会保険、雇用保険、労災保険、厚生年金、健康保険　​

待遇：交通費一部支給（社内規定により支給）・社員割引あり（社員は25％割引）・社員登用制度あり・車通勤可（店舗により異なる）・服装/髪型/ネイル自由・深夜手当・研修制度・有給休暇・提携施設の割引・永年勤続表彰のお祝い（勤続5年ごとに雇用形態にかかわらず 記念品と賞与を贈呈してます。）​

有休消化率：80%以上​

title: Supply Chain Co-Founder / COO (100 % remote) (m/f/d)
description:
We are looking to hire ambitious entrepreneurs to start and scale their own startups.

We are serial entrepreneurs, for example Paul Müller (founder Adjust, €1.2B exit) and Petter Made (founder SumUp, €8B) who are eager to support outlier personalities and serial entrepreneurs to build €1B+ companies.

Our offer:

  • A salary while you build your startup as you will directly be employed by us. Alternatively, you can opt for up to €500k in funding.

  • 1:1 sparring with unicorn founders on a weekly basis

  • Community: Access to the top 0.1% of founders, peers and investors

  • Team building: Hiring top notch talent supported through our network (over 50,000 professionals)

  • Distribution: Support in reaching product-market-fit and building up a sales force / marketing machine

  • Funding support for securing a multi-million euro funding round within 12 months (on average, EWOR Fellows raise > €2M after our Grand Pitch)

One of our fellows set a record for Europe’s largest pre-seed round by a first-time founder, securing a €12M pre-seed investment.

Tasks

  • You will own, build, and run your startup in fields such as Supply Chain

  • You will embark on an extensive personal development journey crafted by unicorn founders and follow a fully customised programme enhancing your goal, time, and energy management

  • You will receive support in hiring through our network to over 50,000 professionals and advice as well as best practices from serial entrepreneurs

  • You will receive intensive coaching to make your startup ready to raise millions in funding

  • You will iterate your product with us until having reached product-market-fit and receive support in building up a sales force or creating a marketing engine respectively

  • You are based in Europe or the Americas or open to relocate

  • You are willing to take full responsibility for your own startup and scale it to €100M+ in revenues

  • You have excellent communication skills in the English language

title: TechOps Engineer (Domain, Infrastructure)
description:
Шукаємо TechOps Engineer, який відповідатиме за управління доменною інфраструктурою проєктів, роботу з DNS, Cloudflare, серверами та автоматизацію технічних процесів.

Якщо ви маєте досвід адміністрування доменів, розумієте принципи роботи мережевої інфраструктури та хочете працювати з масштабними проєктами — будемо раді познайомитися!

Що потрібно буде робити:

Реєструвати, продовжувати та масово керувати доменами.
Працювати з реєстраторами (Namecheap, GoDaddy, GCore та іншими).
Налаштовувати DNS, Cloudflare, SSL-сертифікати, CDN і проксіювання.
Замовляти, налаштовувати та супроводжувати VPS/VDS і хостинг.
Контролювати продовження, оплати та вести технічну документацію.
Автоматизовувати рутинні процеси за допомогою скриптів і API.
Підтримувати стабільну роботу технічної інфраструктури проєктів.

Обов'язкові вимоги:

Досвід роботи з доменами та DNS від 1,5–2 років.
Практичний досвід роботи з кількома реєстраторами доменів.
Впевнене знання Cloudflare або аналогічних CDN-сервісів.
Досвід роботи з DNS, SSL, проксіюванням і хостинг-панелями.
Базові знання Python та/або JavaScript для автоматизації.
Досвід роботи з API та базові навички адміністрування VPS/Linux.

Буде перевагою:

Досвід у affiliate marketing, iGaming, AdTech або SaaS.
Знайомство з Keitaro, Binom та іншими трекерами.
Досвід роботи з антидетект-браузерами, проксі та масовим
керуванням доменами.

Ми пропонуємо:

Заробітну плату $1500–1800.
Роботу в сучасному офісі в Києві.
Графік 09:00–18:00, 3 кава-брейки по 15 хвилин та 1 година на обід.
Цікаві технічні задачі та можливість впливати на розвиток інфраструктури.
Роботу в сильній команді та довгострокову співпрацю.

title: Health Checkup Coordinator
description:
The Health Checkup Coordinator is responsible for managing and coordinating patient health screening services, ensuring a seamless and efficient experience for patients and corporate clients. The role involves appointment coordination, patient communication, coordination with clinical departments, and ensuring timely completion of health checkup processes in line with hospital standards and quality requirements.

  • Coordinate end-to-end health checkup appointments for individual patients and corporate health screening programs.
  • Contact patients/clients to schedule appointments, provide pre-checkup instructions, and confirm attendance.
  • Welcome and guide patients throughout the health checkup journey, ensuring excellent patient experience.
  • Register patients accurately and verify required documents and information.
  • Coordinate with physicians, nursing teams, laboratory, radiology, and other departments to ensure smooth patient flow.
  • Monitor the progress of health checkup activities and ensure all required investigations are completed.
  • Address patient queries, provide accurate information regarding health screening packages, and escalate concerns when required.
  • Ensure timely follow-up for pending reports, consultations, and completion of health assessment results.
  • Maintain accurate patient records and ensure confidentiality of medical information.
  • Support corporate clients by coordinating group health screening schedules and requirements.
  • Prepare and maintain daily/monthly reports related to appointments, patient volumes, and service performance.
  • Ensure compliance with hospital policies, DHA regulations, quality standards, and patient safety guidelines.
  • Contribute to improving patient satisfaction and operational efficiency within the health checkup unit.

Qualifications & Experience

  • Bachelor’s degree or diploma in Healthcare Administration, Nursing, Business Administration, or a related field preferred.
  • Minimum 2–3 years of experience in healthcare coordination, patient services, medical administration, or executive health screening.
  • Experience working in a hospital or healthcare facility in the UAE is preferred.
  • Knowledge of healthcare processes, patient registration, and medical terminology.
  • Experience handling corporate clients and health screening programs is an advantage.

Required Skills

  • Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
  • Strong customer service and patient relationship management skills.
  • Good organizational and time management abilities.
  • Ability to coordinate with multiple departments and manage priorities.
  • Attention to detail and accuracy in documentation.
  • Proficiency in MS Office and hospital information systems.
  • Ability to work effectively in a multicultural healthcare environment.

Key Competencies

  • Patient-focused approach
  • Professionalism and confidentiality
  • Teamwork and collaboration
  • Problem-solving skills
  • Adaptability and flexibility
  • Commitment to quality healthcare service delivery

title: Steuerberater (m/w/d) in Siegen, auf Wunsch mit Partnerperspektive, gesucht - mindestens 90.000€
description:
TaxTalente ist die Nr. 1 Job-Matching Plattform für Jobsuchende in der Steuerberatung.

Sie suchen eine positive berufliche Veränderung? Sie möchten den nächsten Schritt in Ihrer Karriere gehen und streben möglicherweise sogar eine Partnerschaft in einer zukunftsorientierten Kanzlei an? Sie möchten endlich wieder in einem positiven Arbeitsumfeld arbeiten, in dem Sie finanziell und persönlich wertgeschätzt werden? Sie suchen nach Tätigkeiten, die Sie auch wirklich weiterbringen?

Sofern Sie sich in mindestens einem der genannten Punkte wiederfinden, sollten Sie sich bei uns melden. Wir haben die attraktivsten Arbeitgeber der Steuerberatungsbranche in unserem Netzwerk und bringen zusammen, was zusammengehört. Grenzenlose Entwicklungschancen mit Partnermöglichkeiten, vielschichtige Tätigkeitsbereiche, Gehälter wie in der Industrie und vieles mehr – melden Sie sich bei uns und wir unterstützen Sie auf Ihrem weiteren Karriereweg!

Derzeit suchen wir nach einem Steuerberater (m/w/d) für eine unserer Partner-Kanzleien in Siegen

Bei Rückfragen kannst du dich gerne jederzeit (auch nach deinem Feierabend) direkt telefonisch an Herrn Becker-Koch über folgende Nummer wenden: 015901431130

Aufgaben

Wir bringen zusammen, was zusammengehört. Dabei spielt das passende Tätigkeitsprofil natürlich eine entscheidende Rolle. Bei unserer Partnerkanzlei können Sie sich Ihren Aufgabenbereich auf Basis Ihrer persönlichen Stärken und Schwächen selbst zusammenstellen.

  • Erstellung und Review von Jahresabschlüssen
  • Erstellung von Steuererklärungen für Personen- und Kapitalgesellschaften
  • Steuerliche Sonderberatungsprojekte auf Basis individueller QualifikationenB. in den Bereichen der Erbschaftsteuer oder des Umwandlungssteuerrechts
  • Begleitung von Betriebsprüfungen
  • Teamleitung und Personalverantwortung (optional)
  • Weitere individuell wählbare Tätigkeitsbereiche, die Ihnen Freude bringen

Qualifikation

Am Ende sollte es für beide Seiten passen. Deshalb wäre es gut, wenn Sie sich in den folgenden Punkten wiederfinden.

  • Kommunikative Art und Freude am Austausch mit Mandanten
  • Sorgfältige, effiziente und gewissenhafte Arbeitsweise
  • Offen für eine digitale Arbeitsweise
  • Führungsverständnis und Verantwortungsbewusstsein gegenüber Mitarbeitern (optional)
  • Ein erfolgreich abgeschlossenes Steuerberaterexamen
  • Leidenschaft für steuerliche Themen

Benefits

Sie haben genug von 0815 Benefits, von denen Sie nicht wirklich profitieren? Dann sollten Sie einen Blick auf die nachfolgenden Benefits werfen.

  • Außerordentliche Vergütung von 90.000 € bis 130.000 € / Jahr, auf Wunsch auch Partnerperspektive
  • Flexible Gestaltung der Arbeitszeiten sowie die Option auf Home-Office
  • Nettolohnoptimierung mit monatlichen 50,00€ Sachbezugsgutscheinen
  • Umfangreiche Unterstützung bei Weiterbildungsmaßnahmen wie z.B. Fachberater Qualifikationen
  • Modernste Ausstattung mit digitalen Prozessen
  • Starker Teamzusammenhalt und regelmäßige Teamevents

Schnell, unkompliziert und effizient Ihren Traumjob finden – ein Versprechen an Sie, dass wir aufgrund unseres selektiven, breit gefächerten und deutschlandweiten Kanzleinetzwerks halten werden. lhre Vorteile mit uns auf einen Blick:

  • Sie führen keine unsinnigen Bewerbungsgespräche mehr, bei denen Sie während des Bewerbungsprozesses merken, dass es (bspw. wegen des Gehalts) sowieso nicht passt - wir klären vor Ihrem Bewerbungsgespräch all Ihre mit uns besprochenen Kriterien mit der Kanzlei ab.
  • Wir führen Ihre Gehaltsverhandlungen und kennen die Gehaltsstrukturen der Branche dabei bestens.
  • 100% Anonymität – solange Sie uns nicht das „Go“ geben und einem Kennenlernen mit Ihrem neuen potentiellen Arbeitgeber zustimmen, erfährt niemand von Ihrem Namen oder Ihren bisherigen Arbeitgebern – Ihre Ihnen wichtigen Kriterien können wir auch zunächst anonym mit unseren Partnerkanzleien klären.
  • Attraktive Kanzleien – die Kanzleien in unserem breit gefächerten Kanzleinetzwerk sind selektiv ausgewählt und heben sich klar von “normalen” Kanzleien ab (z.B. hinsichtlich der Vergütung, Benefits, Hierarchien, Digitalisierungsgrad, Ausstattung etc.).
  • Und das Beste: Unser gesamter Service ist unverbindlich und völlig kostenfrei für Sie.

title: Senior Assistant - Mine Operations (Overman)
description:
About Business:

Adani Group: Adani Group is a diversified organisation in India comprising 10 publicly traded companies. It has created a world-class logistics and utility infrastructure portfolio that has a pan-India presence. Adani Group is headquartered in Ahmedabad, in the state of Gujarat, India. Over the years, Adani Group has positioned itself to be the market leader in its logistics and energy businesses focusing on large-scale infrastructure development in India with O & M practices benchmarked to global standards. With four IG-rated businesses, it is the only Infrastructure Investment Grade issuer in India.

Job Purpose: As an Overman, the primary responsibility is to ensure the safe and efficient operation of mining activities within the assigned area. Key tasks include taking over shift charge, supervising dump management, face management, drain management, dewatering, haul road maintenance, conducting inspections to ensure bench and OB dump stability, reviewing blasting schedules, and enforcing safety measures such as proper haul road maintenance and dust control. Additionally, the role involves monitoring manpower and equipment usage, maintaining records as per DGMS guidelines, and promptly addressing any safety hazards or incidents to ensure a secure working environment.

Overman - Coal Mining

Shift Operations Management:

Take over shift charge from the previous overman, ensuring a smooth transition and noting operational, safety, equipment, and manpower details.

Conduct rounds in the assigned area/district to inspect benches, OB dumps, face management, drain management, dewatering, and haul road maintenance, taking necessary actions to enhance stability and efficiency.

Safety and Blasting Operations:

Review daily blasting schedule and implement precautions to ensure safe blasting operations.

Monitor dust levels in the mine and implement dust control measures, such as sprinkling water, to maintain a safe working environment.

Ensure compliance with safety regulations and prevent overcrowding of personnel and machinery.

Equipment and Maintenance:

Monitor machinery and operators to ensure safe and secure operations, taking corrective actions as necessary.

Maintain records of operations, safety, equipment, and manpower in accordance with DGMS guidelines.

title: Responsable Contractualisation F/H
location: Le Mans, Pays de la Loire, fr
description:
Nous recherchons dans le cadre d'un CDI basé sur Le Mans, un(une) responsable contractualisation pour prendre en charge la rédaction et la négociation des contrats de partenariat et des contrats d’assurance.

Concrètement, ses missions :

  • Il/elle réalise ou supervise des études juridiques et techniques sur des sujets à forts enjeux (schémas de partenariats, rôles des intervenants (apporteur, distributeur, gestionnaire contrat, gestionnaire sinistre, réassureur ou captive…), contraintes règlementaires et juridiques locales, offres d’assurance acceptées par le distributeur).
  • Il/elle décline ses analyses, en rédigeant les contrats de partenariat et autres documents contractuels et techniques qu’il rédige et négocie sur un périmètre France / UE.
  • Il/elle assiste, conseille et accompagne ses interlocuteurs (partenaires, interne) sur les contraintes juridiques / contractuelles.
  • Il/elle initie et anime des relations avec des interlocuteurs internes et externes (cabinets d’avocats, agents locaux) en français, anglais ou dans la langue du partenaire.
  • Il/elle fait le lien entre les problématiques opérationnelles (flux, outil de gestion et de pilotage) et leur traduction juridique.
  • Il/elle assure la bonne intégration de l’ensemble des éléments contractuels et la bonne qualité des données saisies dans nos outils : Gestion ou GED.

Les avantages qui font la différence :

  • Notre direction possède une dimension internationale avec près de la moitié de ses contrats en Europe,
  • Elle est composée d’une centaine de collaborateurs solidaires et orientés client,
  • Ses activités sont diversifiées,
  • 13ème mois et la prime de vacances mensualisés et inclus dans le fixe brut annuel,
  • Primes d’Intéressement / de Participation liées au groupe Covéa,
  • Formation et accompagnement riche et complet,
  • Télétravail possible jusqu’à 2 jours par semaine (mis en œuvre selon votre degré d’autonomie),
  • Mutuelle avantageuse + régime sur complémentaire santé (prise en charge employeur 60%),
  • De nombreux avantages CE (chèque vacances, voyages, …),
  • Statut Cadre avec forfait jours avantageux (200 jours travaillés par an au lieu de 218) + 31 jours, de congés payés + différentes formules de RTT possibles,
  • Bénéfice du forfait mobilité durable permettant la prise en charge d’une partie des frais de déplacements réalisés en covoiturage, vélo ou autopartage.

Issu(e) d'une formation type Master 2 en Droit des Assurances ou Droit des obligations, vous justifiez d'une forte appétence forte pour les langues : la maîtrise de l’italien et/ou de l’espagnol est un vrai atout, à défaut l’anglais.

Vous avez des connaissances solides en matière de distribution d’assurance et de l’environnement DDA.

Esprit positif, vous appréciez pouvoir proposer des solutions aux problématiques que vous rencontrez dans votre activité et vous avez le sens de l'engagement et du respect des délais

Vous faîtes preuve de rigueur et de curiosité, de capacités rédactionnelles éprouvées et possédez un esprit d’analyse et de synthèse avéré.

Votre autonomie et votre capacité à travailler en mode projet et collaboratif font de vous un Business Partner engagé et efficient !

title: Senior Java Backend Entwickler (m/w/d)
description:
###### Über uns
Als mittelständisches Unternehmen und verlässlicher Partner der Industrie liefert **Schmitt Engineering** umfassende technische Expertise. Unsere Tätigkeiten erstrecken sich entlang der Prozesskette von der Planung und Projektierung über die Entwicklung und Konstruktion bis hin zur Fertigung, Montage und Inbetriebnahme.

Ist Technik auch Ihre Leidenschaft? Dann werden Sie Teil unseres Teams und entwickeln mit uns die Zukunft.
###### Ihre Aufgaben

  • Weiterentwicklung der Reservierungsplattform der Deutschen Bahn im Cluster Angebote sowie der vom Team „Ray“ verantworteten Reservierungskomponenten einschließlich Backend-Services und APIs
  • Programmierung, Implementierung und Wartung technischer Komponenten inklusive Schnittstellen, Module und Datenbanken sowie Umsetzung neuer fachlicher Anforderungen im Umfeld der Reservierungsprozesse
  • Analyse fachlicher Anforderungen und Entwicklung nachhaltiger technischer Lösungen gemeinsam mit Fachbereichen, Product Ownern und Entwicklungsteams unter Einhaltung von Entwicklungsstandards und Sicherstellung der technischen Zukunftsfähigkeit der Systeme
  • Verantwortung für Qualität, IT-Security und DevOps sowie Optimierung, Stabilisierung, Betrieb und Monitoring der Anwendungen; Durchführung von Code Reviews, Refactorings, CI/CD-Deployments und aktive Mitgestaltung der Scrum-Events
  • Fehlerbehebung und Qualitätssicherung durch Behebung von Fehlern aus Test- und Produktivphasen sowie Entwicklung von Teststrategien und Implementierung von Testautomatisierungen
  • Erstellung und Pflege technischer Dokumentationen für Komponenten, Architekturen und Systeme sowie Einsatz moderner, KI-gestützter Entwicklungswerkzeuge zur Analyse, Implementierung, Testautomatisierung und Dokumentation

###### Ihr Profil

  • Abgeschlossenes Studium im Bereich Informatik, Software-Engineering oder eine vergleichbare Qualifikation
  • Berufserfahrung als Softwareentwickler im agilen Umfeld \(Scrum/Kanban\) sowie in der Implementierung und Weiterentwicklung von REST-Schnittstellen, Continuous Integration und Continuous Delivery, Fehleranalyse, Monitoring, Performanceoptimierung, Pair Programming, Code Reviews sowie im Umgang mit Legacy Code und Refactoring
  • Erfahrung in der Testautomatisierung komplexer Workflows im Cloud- und Microservices-Umfeld sowie Kenntnisse in Container-Technologien \(Docker, Kubernetes\) und grundlegenden Security- und Autorisierungskonzepten
  • Fundierte Kenntnisse in der Java-/JavaEE-Backend-Entwicklung mit Spring Boot und Spring Framework sowie in Unit-, Integrations-, Acceptance-, Last- und Performance-Tests, testgetriebener Entwicklung \(TDD\) und methodischer Testkompetenz
  • Sicherer Umgang mit Java-Entwicklungswerkzeugen \(IntelliJ, Maven\), Versions- und Konfigurationsmanagement \(Git, Jira, Confluence\) sowie Linux-basierten Entwicklungs- und Laufzeitumgebungen
  • Verständnis für fachliche Anforderungen sowie die enge Zusammenarbeit mit Product Ownern und crossfunktionalen Teams; ausgeprägte analytische Fähigkeiten und Sensibilität für Abhängigkeiten in komplexen fachlichen und technischen Umfeldern
  • Sehr gute Deutsch- und gute Englischkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift

Note:
Please be aware that German is the working language in our project and good German language skills \(level B2+\) are a prerequisite for the position.
###### Wir bieten Ihnen folgende Benefits

  • Übertarifliche Vergütungsstruktur, Urlaubs- und Weihnachtsgeld, betriebliche Altersvorsorge
  • Unbefristeter Arbeitsvertrag
  • 30 Tage Urlaub
  • Flexible Arbeitszeitmodelle und Homeoffice-Möglichkeiten
  • Mitarbeiter-Empfehlungsprogramm
  • Mitarbeiterevents
  • Über 30 Jahre Know-how und abwechslungsreiche Projekte in Hochtechnologiebranchen

###### Mehr Informationen
Senden Sie uns bitte Ihre kompletten Bewerbungsunterlagen unter Angabe des frühestmöglichen Eintrittstermins und Ihrer Gehaltsvorstellung.

title: Financial Accountant (Real Estate)
description:
Reporting To: Financial Controller

A multi-asset family office is seeking a meticulous and discreet Financial Accountant to support its finance operations across a portfolio of holding companies, trusts and investment vehicles.

This is a hands-on role covering multi-entity accounting, consolidation, investment reporting, treasury and management reporting. The successful candidate will work closely with senior stakeholders and play an important role in maintaining accurate, timely and decision-useful financial information.

Key Responsibilities

  • Prepare monthly, quarterly and annual financial statements across multiple entities.
  • Support the preparation of consolidated reporting packages, including balance sheet, profit and loss, cash flow statements, variance analysis and supporting schedules.
  • Manage consolidation adjustments, intercompany balances and eliminations.
  • Maintain accurate accounting records and reporting structures within Xero.
  • Perform bank, credit card, investment and foreign exchange reconciliations.
  • Manage journals, accruals, prepayments, accounts payable, accounts receivable and fixed asset schedules.
  • Maintain investment records across listed securities, managed funds, private investments, real estate and cash instruments.
  • Track investment cost bases, acquisitions, disposals, valuations, distributions, capital calls and commitments.
  • Reconcile investment records against custodian and investment manager statements.
  • Prepare asset allocation, portfolio performance and returns reporting.
  • Monitor cash positions, liquidity requirements and investment funding obligations across entities and currencies.
  • Prepare cash flow forecasts and maintain foreign exchange exposure and revaluation schedules.
  • Track and report realised and unrealised foreign exchange gains and losses.
  • Support budgeting, forecasting, audit preparation and corporate tax compliance.
  • Assist with GST filings and coordinate statutory requirements with external advisers and corporate secretaries.
  • Prepare management reporting covering net worth, liquidity, cash runway, asset allocation and foreign exchange exposure.
  • Support reporting requirements relating to relevant Singapore family office and investment structures.
  • Coordinate with banks, investment managers, custodians and professional advisers.
  • Maintain the highest standards of confidentiality when handling financial, investment and personal information.

Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance or a related discipline.
  • CA, CPA or ACCA qualification, or currently progressing towards one, is preferred.
  • Three to seven years of relevant accounting experience.
  • Experience in multi-entity accounting, consolidation or management reporting.
  • Exposure to investment accounting, portfolio reporting, private wealth, family office or fund management environments would be advantageous.
  • Strong hands-on experience with Xero is essential.
  • Advanced Excel skills, including consolidation and financial reporting models.
  • Good understanding of foreign exchange accounting and revaluation.
  • Familiarity with Singapore accounting, tax and regulatory requirements.
  • Experience supporting a Section 13O or Section 13U structure, or a similar regulated investment platform, would be highly desirable.

Personal Attributes

  • Meticulous, organised and highly dependable.
  • Strong attention to detail and reconciliation discipline.
  • Able to translate financial and investment data into clear reporting.
  • Discreet and comfortable working directly with senior stakeholders.
  • Proactive, independent and able to manage multiple priorities.
  • Strong communication and deadline-management skills.

Why Join

This role offers broad exposure across accounting, investments, treasury and family office operations. It is well suited to a finance professional seeking a hands-on position with direct access to senior decision-makers and the opportunity to build deep expertise within a sophisticated investment environment.

All applications will be treated in the strictest confidence. Personal data provided will be used for recruitment purposes only.

Please apply with your CV in word document format. We regret toinform that only shortlisted candidates will be notified. For other positions related to real estate or otheralternative investments, please go to https://careers.tri-cap.com.sg/.
