title: Procurement Engineer - MEP
description:
Why This Role Matters

The Procurement Engineer – MEP (Mechanical) plays a critical role in ensuring the timely procurement of Mechanical, HVAC, Plumbing, and Fire Fighting materials and equipment required for successful project delivery. By leveraging technical expertise, market knowledge, and strong supplier relationships, the role contributes to cost optimization, quality assurance, and project schedule adherence across large-scale construction projects.

What You'll Drive

  • Manage the procurement of HVAC, Plumbing, and Fire Fighting materials, equipment, and subcontract packages.
  • Lead RFQ/RFP preparation, supplier engagement, and techno-commercial evaluations.
  • Develop and maintain strong relationships with local UAE suppliers and manufacturers.
  • Negotiate pricing, delivery schedules, warranties, and commercial terms to achieve best value for projects.
  • Coordinate with Engineering, Planning, Commercial, QA/QC, and Site teams to ensure procurement activities align with project requirements.
  • Monitor procurement schedules and proactively manage long-lead and critical items.
  • Identify value engineering opportunities and alternative sourcing solutions.
  • Ensure compliance with BESIX procurement procedures, governance, and quality standards.

You're a Great Fit If You Have

  • Bachelor's Degree in Mechanical Engineering.
  • 5–8 years of experience in MEP procurement within an MEP Contractor or Main Contractor MEP Division.
  • Strong technical knowledge of HVAC, Plumbing, and Fire Fighting systems.
  • Proven experience procuring chillers, AHUs, FCUs, pumps, ducting, piping, firefighting equipment, valves, and related MEP materials.
  • Strong network of local UAE suppliers and manufacturers.
  • Experience preparing RFQs, tender evaluations, procurement recommendations, and award documentation.
  • Strong negotiation and supplier management skills.
  • Experience working on high-rise, residential, commercial, hospitality, and mixed-use projects.
  • Ability to interpret drawings, specifications, BOQs, and technical submittals.
  • Familiarity with ERP systems such as SAP, Oracle, JDE, IFS, or similar.
  • Excellent communication, organizational, and stakeholder management skills.

Why You'll Enjoy Working with Us

  • Competitive Benefits
  • Positive Workplace Culture
  • Opportunity to work with a leading international construction group
  • Exposure to large-scale, high-impact projects in the Middle East
  • Professional growth and career development opportunities
  • Collaborative and diverse working environment
  • Commitment to innovation, sustainability, and operational excellence

title: Ausbilder*in/Lehrkraft für das Projekt „Startklar“ in Marzahn (m/w/d)
company: GBB Gesellschaft für berufliche Bildung mbH
description:
Die GBB Gesellschaft für berufliche Bildung mbH sucht Ausbilder*in/Lehrkraft für unser einzigartiges Projekt "Startklar"!
Unser Projekt zielt darauf ab, junge Erwachsene, die soziale oder psychische Schwierigkeiten haben, durch kreative-Projekte zu erreichen und zu unterstützen. Gemeinsam entwickeln wir nachhaltige Projekte und fördern die Selbstwirksamkeit und Integration unserer Teilnehmer*innen.

Deine Benefits
  • 30 Tage Urlaub
  • Flexible Arbeitszeiten, Sabbatical oder Jobsharing möglich
  • Familienfreundliche Regelungen bei erkrankten Kindern (Ausgleichszahlung von Kinderkrankengeld zu Nettoentgeld bis zu 10 Tage im Jahr)
  • Internes Gehaltsband: Steigendes Gehalt bei fortdauernder Betriebszugehörigkeit
  • Wir übernehmen einen Großteil deiner Urban Sports Club Flatrate
  • Deutschlandticket als BVG Jobticket / Diensthandy (Smartphone)
  • Regelmäßige Supervision
  • Umfangreiche jährliche Fortbildungsangebote
  • Firmeneigene Gesundheitskurse
  • Entwicklungs- und Karrieremöglichkeiten
  • Viele Gestaltungsmöglichkeiten, flache Hierarchien
  • Corporate Benefits - Zugang
  • Teamevents, wie Sommerfest und Teamtage
  • Hunde sind willkommen
  • Gehaltsband auch für Annerkennungsjahr
  • Firmeneigene Betriebssozialarbeiterin

Deine Aufgaben
  • Aufsuchende und mobile Sozialarbeit mit jungen Erwachsenen, die soziale oder psychische Schwierigkeiten haben
  • Intensive Beziehungsarbeit zur Unterstützung der Teilnehmer*innen in ihrer individuellen Lebenssituation
  • Sozialpädagogische Diagnostik und Entwicklung individueller Hilfepläne
  • Hilfe zur Selbsthilfe – Empowerment der Teilnehmer*innen, um ihre beruflichen und persönlichen Ziele zu erreichen
  • Verweisberatung und Vermittlung an weiterführende Unterstützungsangebote
  • Organisation und Durchführung von nachhaltigen und kreativen Projekten
  • Gestaltung und Leitung von sozialpädagogischen Gruppenangeboten
Abgeschlossenes Ausbildung in einem der folgenden Fächer:
  • abgeschlossenes Studium/Ausbildung und min. ein jahr pädagogische Erfahrung
  • Empathie und Professionalität bei der Kontaktaufnahme mit jungen Erwachsenen in schwierigen Lebenslagen
  • Wertneutralität und Verbindlichkeit
  • Motivationsfähigkeit und Fähigkeit zur Selbstmotivation
  • Flexibilität und Gestaltungswille
  • Bereitschaft zur engen Zusammenarbeit mit Netzwerkpartner*innen, Ämtern und Behörden
  • Interkulturelle Kompetenzen und Sensibilität im Umgang mit jungen Erwachsenen mit Migrationshintergrund
Warum Wir?

Unser Ziel ist es die Lebensqualität unserer Adressat*innen zu verbessern. Wir bieten ihnen professionelle und individuelle Unterstützung, um ein selbstbestimmtes Leben zu fördern und ihre vorhandenen Ressourcen und Talente zu stärken.

Dies gelingt uns durch vielfältige Hilfsangebote und die hervorragende Arbeit unserer multiprofessionellen Teams aus Sozialpädagog *innen, Coaches, Anleiter *innen und Psycholog *innen.
In unserem Arbeitsumfeld schaffen wir Raum für Mitgestaltung und kreative Lösungen und legen Wert auf flache Hierarchien, eine positive Fehlerkultur und vertrauensvolle Teamarbeit.

Wenn du Freude daran hast, andere Menschen zu unterstützen und Teil eines engagierten und multiprofessionellen Team sein möchtest, das nachhaltig positive Veränderungen bewirkt, dann bist du bei uns genau richtig!

Gehalt: ab 3.540 € pro Monat

Haben wir dein Interesse geweckt? Wir freuen uns auf deine Bewerbung!

title: IT Support
description:
Job Title: IT Support

Campus: Primary

Report to Director of IT Service


Job Summary:
We are seeking skilled and proactive IT Support to assist in the day-to-day IT operations of our schools. The successful candidate will be responsible for providing technical support, maintaining IT infrastructure, and ensuring the smooth operation of our Audio/Visual systems and POS systems. This role requires strong troubleshooting skills, the ability to manage networking support, and a willingness to support events with IT and AV needs.



Key Responsibilities:

  • Provide technical support to end-users, both remotely and on-site.
  • Install, configure, and maintain POS systems.
  • Troubleshoot and resolve hardware, software, and network issues.
  • Manage and maintain guest Wi-Fi access and ensure security protocols are in place.
  • Be on standby to provide technical assistance for events, including setting up IT and AV equipment and providing real-time support.
  • Maintain an inventory of IT assets and ensure proper documentation.
  • Conduct regular backups and ensure data security.
  • Liaise with third-party vendors and service providers for IT-related needs.
  • Keep update with the lastest IT trends and technologies to improve it efficiency within the schools.


Qualifications and Skills:

  • Diploma or degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field.
  • At least 1-2 years of experience in IT support or a similar role.
  • Strong knowledge of networking protocols (TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, VLAN).
  • Experience with troubleshooting and maintaining POS systems.
  • Familiarity with Audio/Visual systems and their setup.
  • Good problem-solving and analytical skills.
  • Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
  • Willingness to work flexible hours, including weekends or after hours, to support school events and IT emergencies.

This is an exciting opportunity for an IT professional who is eager to contribute to the school's technology environment and support its continuous growth. If you are a dedicated and skilled IT specialist, we encourage you to apply.



PBIS is totally committed to safeguarding the welfare of children and young people and expects the same from its employees. All new staff will be subject to enhanced pre-employment clearance, including identity check, criminal background checks, qualifications checks and employment checks to include an exploration of any gaps in employment and two satisfactory professional references which will be verified.

title: Senior/Staff Nurse, Diagnostic Imaging
description:
Job Description

The Nurse will be responsible to provide professional nursing service within Diagnostic Imaging Suite in accordance with established nursing policies and procedure and standard operating procedures of the nursing care and practices together high level of service quality, patient care, efficiency and productivity.


Roles and Responsibilities

  • To provide a high standard of care to patients through care management, assessment, planning, implementation and evaluation of nursing care to meet the needs of the patients.
  • Ensure that stocks are available for procedures when needed.
  • Explain the examination to patient, what he / she will be undergoing and the estimated duration of it, and obtain the necessary consent when required.
  • Assist Radiologist in Interventional procedures.
  • Ensure that precautions have been taken to protect patients, staff and public from unnecessary exposure to ionizing radiation.
  • Perform the documentation according to government legislation.
  • Perform any other duties as instructed by the Manager / Radiologist.

Requirements

  • Minimum Diploma / Degree in Nursing.
  • Candidate with Advanced Nursing Diploma or equipment will have an added advantage.
  • Registered with Singapore Nursing Board.
  • A meticulous and analytical team player with good interpersonal and communication skills.
  • Minimum 1 year of relevant experience in tertiary hospital.
  • Previous experience in Radiology department highly advantageous.
  • Able to commit to 5.5 day work week.

title: Electronics Technician (EP-CMS-ID-2026-147-LD)
description:
Introduction:

You will support the integration and commissioning of services and infrastructure for the CMS Tracker construction at CERN, with a focus on the preparation and validation of services, as well as the reception testing of components and detector assemblies. The role also includes the setup and operation of test electronics for the commissioning of detector services and the functional testing of detector components and assemblies.

Functions:

  • Prepare and support the installation and commissioning of services and infrastructure for large detector assemblies (e.g. cables, racks and test setups).
  • Set up and operate test electronics and commissioning setups (e.g. interlocks, sensor interfaces and thermal test configurations).
  • Perform reception testing of detector substructures and components, including power distribution hardware delivered to CERN.
  • Validate integrated electrical services (power, signal and grounding interfaces) installed on detector assemblies and troubleshoot issues during construction.
  • Maintain traceability by updating the production database with acceptance test reports and installation data.

Higher technical diploma or equivalent relevant experience in the field of Electronics or a related field.

Additional relevant certificates are considered an asset

Experience:

  • Proficiency in the assembly, installation and wiring of electronic components (e.g. cabling, soldering, SMD components, sensors, boards).
  • Hands-on experience with electrical testing and measurement techniques using laboratory and test equipment (e.g. multimeters, power supplies, oscilloscopes), including the preparation of test setups.
  • Experience in maintaining laboratory equipment and inventory, updating technical databases, and documenting testing procedures and results.

Technical competencies:

  • Assembly of electronic components.
  • Knowledge and application of instrumentation and measurement techniques.
  • Operation and maintenance of electrical/electronic systems.
  • Technical documentation of electric/electronics systems.

Behavioural competencies:

  • Working in Teams: building and maintaining constructive and effective work relationships.
  • Communicating Effectively: listening actively to others and letting others speak.
  • Demonstrating Flexibility: adapting quickly and resourcefully to shifting priorities and requirements.
  • Solving Problems: identifying, defining and assessing problems, taking action to address them.

Language skills:

  • Spoken and written English or French, with a commitment to learn the other language.

Eligibility and closing date:

Diversity has been an integral part of CERN's mission since its foundation and is an established value of the Organization. Employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We welcome applications from all Member States and Associate Member States.

This vacancy will be filled as soon as possible, and applications should normally reach us no later than 19.08.2026 at 23:59 CEST.

Employment Conditions:

Contract type: Limited duration contract (4 years). Subject to certain conditions, holders of limited-duration contracts may apply for an indefinite position.

Working Hours: 40 hours per week

Job Flexibility: Fully Onsite

This position involves:

  • Work in Radiation Areas.
  • Interventions in underground installations.
  • A valid driving licence.
  • Work during nights, Sundays and official holidays, when required by the needs of the Organization.
  • Shift work, when required by the needs of the Organization.

Job grade: 3-4

Job reference: EP-CMS-ID-2026-147-LD

Field of work: Electrical or Electronics Engineering

Benchmark Job Title: Electronics Technician

Global Benefits

  • A competitive salary (tax free), increasing in line with your years of relevant experience.
  • 30 days of paid leave per year plus 2 weeks annual closure.
  • Coverage by CERN’s comprehensive health insurance scheme (for yourself, your spouse and children), and membership of the CERN Pension Fund.
  • Family, child and infant monthly allowances depending on your individual circumstances.
  • A relocation package (installation grant, removal, travel expenses) depending on your individual circumstances.
  • Possibility to extend your contract up to 8 years + eligibility for indefinite contract tenure.

Overview of CERN - Discover a world where the impossible is made possible!

At CERN, the European Organization for Nuclear Research, we are pushing the frontiers of science and technology. Our groundbreaking work brings together not only physicists but also a diverse range of professionals from engineering, technical, scientific, and administrative fields. Together, we foster an environment where innovation and collaboration thrive.

Every day, we face exciting new challenges and opportunities to contribute to cutting-edge research that shapes our understanding of the universe. We meet these challenges through the diverse perspectives within our teams, ensuring every contribution is valued and driving our shared sense of inclusion and purpose. Diversity is a core value of CERN since its foundation, and it remains central to our mission and continued success.

If you are ready to be part of a dynamic, inclusive community pushing the boundaries of knowledge, CERN is the place where your curiosity and skills can thrive. Be part of our mission to uncover what lies at the heart of the universe! TAKE PART!

More information about us, here: careers.cern

title: Mitarbeiter (m/w/d) Verwaltung & Kundenbetreuung
description:
Wir, die Flemming Gruppe, laden Dich ein, Teil unseres deutschlandweit agierenden Verbunds zahntechnischer Labore zu werden. Mit einer Gemeinschaft von über 1.500 Mitarbeitenden sind wir der größte Ausbilder für zukünftige Zahntechniker (m/w/d) und setzen Maßstäbe in der Branche. Bei uns hast Du die Möglichkeit, Dein Talent zu entfalten.

Organisation und empathische Kommunikation sind Deine Stärken?

In unserem Dentallabor bist Du die zentrale Schnittstelle zwischen Team, Zahnarztpraxen und Logistik. Du sorgst dafür, dass Aufträge reibungslos koordiniert werden, Informationen zur richtigen Zeit am richtigen Ort sind und unsere Abläufe effizient ineinandergreifen.

Zur Verstärkung unseres Teams in Mering suchen wir Unterstützung als Mitarbeiter (m/w/d) in der Verwaltung & Kundenbetreuung in Vollzeit. Idealerweise hast Du bereits Erfahrung im Umfeld von Dentallaboren oder mit anderen Medizinprodukten sammeln können.
  • Organisation & Koordination: Du bist die zentrale Ansprechperson in unserer Verwaltung und sorgst dafür, dass im Hintergrund alles strukturiert und reibungslos läuft.
  • Arbeitseingang & Produktsteuerung: Du behältst den Überblick über den Ein- und Ausgang unserer Dentalarbeiten und stellst sicher, dass alle Aufträge korrekt erfasst und termingerecht weitergeleitet werden.
  • Kundenkommunikation: Als erste Kontaktperson am Telefon betreust Du unsere Zahnarztpraxen kompetent, freundlich und serviceorientiert.
  • Logistik & Tourenplanung: Du koordinierst unsere Botenlogistik und planst die Touren effizient – damit jede Arbeit zur richtigen Zeit am richtigen Ort ist.
  • Qualifikation: Du verfügst über eine abgeschlossene Ausbildung oder Berufserfahrung im kaufmännischen oder administrativen Bereich – vorzugsweise in einem zahntechnischen oder zahnmedizinischen Umfeld.
  • Kommunikationsstärke: Du kommunizierst empathisch, transparent und zielgruppengerecht. Der Kontakt mit Zahnarztpraxen bereitet Dir Freude und Du bringst idealerweise Erfahrung in der Kundenbetreuung oder -beratung mit.
  • Digitale Kompetenz: Du gehst sicher und routiniert mit den gängigen MS-Office-Anwendungen um und arbeitest Dich schnell in neue Systeme ein.
  • Arbeitsweise: Du arbeitest strukturiert, selbstständig und verantwortungsbewusst und behältst auch in einem dynamischen Arbeitsalltag den Überblick.
  • Serviceorientierung: Organisationstalent, Zuverlässigkeit und ein ausgeprägtes Servicebewusstsein zeichnen Dich aus und machen Dich zu einer geschätzten Ansprechperson für Kund und Kolleg.
  • Sicherer Arbeitsplatz: Bei uns erwartet Dich eine unbefristete Festanstellung mit langfristiger Perspektive
  • Faire Vergütung: Wir schätzen Deine Arbeit und sorgen für eine leistungsgerechte Bezahlung – vermögenswirksame Leistungen inklusive
  • Modernes Arbeitsumfeld: Modernes, klimatisiertes und sehr gut erreichbares Labor durch optimale Verkehrsanbindungen
  • Flexibilität: Du hast unter der Woche einen privaten Termin? Wir finden gemeinsam eine passende Lösung
  • Ermäßigung auf zahntechnische Leistungen: Gerne unterstützen wir Dich, auch wenn es um Deine eigenen Zähne geht
  • Corporate Benefits: Ermäßigung auf Elektrogeräte, Kleidung, Reisen und vieles mehr
  • Weiterbildung: Fachliche und persönliche Weiterentwicklung durch interne und externe Fortbildungen, u.a. in unserem modernen Technologiezentrum und echten Experten (m/w/d) aus der Dentalbranche
  • Starkes Netzwerk: Werde Teil eines einzigartigen Netzwerks in einer zukunftssicheren Branche – beim größten Zahntechnikerverbund Deutschlands
  • Onboarding: Eine strukturierte Einarbeitung in Deine Bereiche sowie eine feste Ansprechperson für Deine Fragen
  • Verantwortungsvolle Tätigkeit: Abwechslungsreiche und anspruchsvolle Aufgaben mit echter Verantwortung und Sinn
  • Gelebte Unternehmenskultur: Ein wertschätzendes Umfeld, in dem Fairness, Ehrlichkeit und Teamgeist großgeschrieben werden
  • Wir-Gefühl: Regelmäßige Teamevents und gemeinsame Aktivitäten (z.B. Sommerfeste und Weihnachtsfeiern)
Neugierig geworden? Warum wir gerne bei Flemming Dental arbeiten, findest Du hier auf unserer Karriereseite!
​Noch mehr Einblicke in unseren Alltag? Dann schau gerne auf unseren Social-Media-Kanälen vorbei!​​​

title: Space Tech Co-Founder / CSO (100 % remote) (m/f/d)
description:
We are looking to hire ambitious entrepreneurs to start and scale their own startups.

We are serial entrepreneurs, for example Paul Müller (founder Adjust, €1.2B exit) and Petter Made (founder SumUp, €8B) who are eager to support outlier personalities and serial entrepreneurs to build €1B+ companies.

Our offer:

  • A salary while you build your startup as you will directly be employed by us. Alternatively, you can opt for up to €500k in funding.

  • 1:1 sparring with unicorn founders on a weekly basis

  • Community: Access to the top 0.1% of founders, peers and investors

  • Team building: Hiring top notch talent supported through our network (over 50,000 professionals)

  • Distribution: Support in reaching product-market-fit and building up a sales force / marketing machine

  • Funding support for securing a multi-million euro funding round within 12 months (on average, EWOR Fellows raise > €2M after our Grand Pitch)

One of our fellows set a record for Europe’s largest pre-seed round by a first-time founder, securing a €12M pre-seed investment.

Tasks

  • You will own, build, and run your startup in fields such as Space Tech

  • You will embark on an extensive personal development journey crafted by unicorn founders and follow a fully customised programme enhancing your goal, time, and energy management

  • You will receive support in hiring through our network to over 50,000 professionals and advice as well as best practices from serial entrepreneurs

  • You will receive intensive coaching to make your startup ready to raise millions in funding

  • You will iterate your product with us until having reached product-market-fit and receive support in building up a sales force or creating a marketing engine respectively

  • You are based in Europe or the Americas or open to relocate

  • You are willing to take full responsibility for your own startup and scale it to €100M+ in revenues

  • You have excellent communication skills in the English language

title: Sales Development Representative - PMI
description:
Chi siamo
Stiamo ridisegnando il sistema operativo finanziario per PMI e commercialisti.
Oggi aziende e studi lavorano con strumenti frammentati e inefficienti. Noi siamo qui per cambiarlo: uniamo fatturazione, pagamenti, tesoreria e contabilità in un’unica piattaforma moderna, restituendo tempo e creando valore reale.
Siamo ambiziosi, pragmatici ed efficienti. Costruiamo velocemente e puntiamo sempre al massimo.
Siamo una realtà in forte crescita, supportata da alcuni dei migliori investitori internazionali — tra cui Keen Venture Partners (Fiscozen), Founders (Pleo), Exor Ventures (Qonto, Alan), Notion Capital e Creandum (Klarna, Spotify).


Questo è solo l’inizio.


Se vuoi costruire qualcosa che può cambiare il modo in cui lavora il 90% delle aziende in Italia, questo è il posto giusto.

Il ruolo

Stiamo cercando un/una Sales Development Representative da inserire nel nostro team Sales.

Sarai il primo punto di contatto tra Sibill e centinaia di PMI italiane — molte non hanno ancora chiari i propri problemi, e il tuo lavoro è capirli prima di loro e guidarle verso la soluzione giusta. Se fatto bene, questo ruolo ha un impatto diretto sulla crescita dell'azienda.

Non è un ruolo entry-level tranquillo. È per chi vuole imparare in fretta, spingere forte e performare sopra la media. Non è per tutti.

Cosa farai

  • Diventare esperto del prodotto: padroneggerai il prodotto Sibill e i suoi casi d'uso reali, per parlare con le aziende da una posizione di competenza

  • Qualificare in modo rigoroso: ogni giorno parlerai con decine di PMI italiane, identificando quelle con il problema giusto e il momento giusto

  • Ingaggiare prospect al telefono: contatti, ascolti, attivi — con volumi alti e standard ancora più alti

  • Organizzare demo di qualità: il tuo output non è una call prenotata, ma un'opportunità reale per l'Account Executive

  • Gestire il tuo pipeline in autonomia: tieni il flusso costante, senza aspettare che qualcuno ti dica cosa fare

Sei la persona giusta se

Prima di continuare a leggere, se il tuo profilo non corrisponde al 100% a quello descritto, ma riconosci in queste attività le tue capacità e quello che stai cercando, prosegui lo stesso!

  • Hai già fatto almeno un'esperienza sales in ambienti fast-paced

  • Ti senti a tuo agio con ritmi alti e volumi elevati (70+ interazioni al giorno non ti spaventano)

  • Hai standard alti per te stesso — il "sufficiente" non ti basta, vuoi overperformare

  • Ti piace parlare con imprenditori, capire velocemente problemi complessi e trovare il filo

  • Sei resiliente: un "no" al telefono ti spinge a fare la prossima chiamata, non a rallentare

  • Prendi ownership: non aspetti istruzioni, trovi soluzioni

  • Vuoi crescere velocemente — non in anni, ma in mesi

Cosa offriamo

  • €36–40K OTE (fisso + variabile)

  • Variabile senza tetto massimo, con acceleratori per chi supera gli obiettivi

  • Ticket restaurant (8€/giorno)

  • Lavoro ibrido (basato a Milano) con 3 giorni/settimana di presenza in ufficio

  • Budget welfare

In Sibill si lavora tanto, ma con impatto reale.

E sì — le persone qui tendono ad essere felici. Non è scontato.

Cultura aziendale

  • Un team smart, motivato e collaborativo

  • Tanta autonomia, visibilità e crescita personale rapida

  • Un prodotto che fa davvero la differenza

Processo di selezione

  1. Colloquio con Lucia, del team People (15')

  2. Colloquio con Massimiliano, SDR Team Leader (60')

  3. Colloquio con Andrea, Head of Sales (60')

  4. Colloquio con Mattia, CEO (30')

  5. Offerta

By applying, you consent to Sibill’s processing of your personal data for recruitment and hiring purposes, in accordance with our Privacy Policy available at: https://sibill.com/trattamento-dei-dati/

title: Responsabile Ufficio Tecnico Meccanico
description:
IDM Automation società del Gruppo ILPRA specializzata nella progettazione e realizzazione di sistemi di automazione, riempimento e confezionamento nell’industria cosmetica, per potenziare la nostra struttura tecnica siamo alla ricerca di un Responsabile Ufficio Tecnico Meccanico.

La risorsa, riportando direttamente alla Direzione, avrà la responsabilità di coordinare l'Ufficio Tecnico Meccanico, contribuendo attivamente alle attività di progettazione e garantendo il corretto sviluppo delle commesse nel rispetto degli standard qualitativi, dei tempi e dei costi definiti.

Attività principali

  • Progettare e sviluppare soluzioni meccaniche per macchine automatiche e impianti speciali.

  • Coordinare, supportare e supervisionare il team composto da due progettisti/disegnatori meccanici.

  • Gestire i carichi di lavoro e monitorare l'avanzamento dei progetti.

  • Interfacciarsi con uffici tecnici esterni e partner di progettazione per lo sviluppo delle commesse.

Cosa cerchiamo

  • Laurea in Ingegneria Meccanica oppure Diploma Tecnico ad indirizzo meccanico.

  • Ottima conoscenza e utilizzo quotidiano di Autodesk Inventor.

  • Esperienza nella progettazione di macchine di assemblaggio, sistemi di dosaggio e/o macchine di riempimento.

  • Conoscenza delle tecnologie di automazione industriale e robotica.

  • Buona conoscenza della lingua inglese tecnica.

  • Leadership e capacità di coordinamento delle persone.

  • Orientamento al risultato e problem solving.

Cosa offriamo

  • Inserimento in un contesto dinamico e in forte crescita.

  • Possibilità di contribuire allo sviluppo di progetti innovativi e tecnologicamente avanzati.

  • Ambiente di lavoro collaborativo e orientato al miglioramento continuo.

  • Pacchetto retributivo commisurato all'esperienza e alle competenze maturate.

Le ricerche sono rivolte a candidati di entrambi i sessi (L. 903/77 e D.Lgs. 198/2006).

title: Responsable Offre assurances Affinitaires - Spécialiste Pannes mécaniques F/H
description:
Nous recherchons notre Responsable Marketing & Offre F/H dans le cadre d'un CDI basé à Paris Montparnasse !

Au sein de l’équipe Marketing, vous rejoignez une équipe en charge de la conception et de la mise en place des nouvelles offres de Covéa Affinity ainsi que de l’évolution des offres existantes en prenant en compte toutes les dimensions de la proposition de valeur. Vous serez particulièrement en charge des offres de panne mécanique, un secteur où Covéa Affinity dispose de positions fortes en France et en Europe.
Il s’agit d’un poste à dimension à la fois stratégique et opérationnelle, au cœur de l’activité de Covéa Affinity, en interactions permanente avec les équipes en interne et avec une grande proximité avec les clients, prospects et prestataires.

Le Responsable de l’offre identifie les besoins et les attentes des partenaires et prospects selon les marchés, en France et à l’international, dans le cadre des programmes d’assurance affinitaire B2B2C. Pour ce faire il s’appuie sur les études internes ou externes, les échanges avec les équipes Développement et ses propres contacts sur le terrain.

  • Il évalue la compétitivité, l’attractivité et le positionnement des offres actuelles. Afin d'identifier les forces / faiblesses et les innovations intéressantes à dupliquer, il mène le processus d’idéation interne et externe, collecte des informations de terrain auprès des commerciaux et aussi ponctuellement directement auprès des partenaires selon différentes approches (sondage, groupe de travail…).
  • Il définit et cadre les nouvelles offres et les évolutions des offres existantes. Outre les aspects purement assurantiels, il étudie les offres / partenariats d’assurance et de services proposées par d’autres sociétés en France et à l’international pour bâtir des offres packagées assurance + services, ou afin d’améliorer l’expérience client si elles répondent aux besoins de nos clients ou permettent de conquérir des cibles à potentiel ou des marchés visés. Il éclaire et propose le business model possible en collaborant avec les autres services. Il rédige une expression de besoins afin que les autres équipes (Actuariat, Produit, Contrat) disposent d’une feuille de route claire.
  • Il anime et pilote la mise en place des offres (priorités, cibles, objectifs, livrables, planning…). Il assure la communication interne pour mobiliser et fédérer les contributeurs, coordonne les contributions des acteurs internes (Développement, Produits, Juridique, Actuariat), pilote et contribue à la mise en marché interne et externe des offres (supports de formation, argumentaire, support commercial, fiche produits, formation des distributeurs, communication…).

• Vous êtes un spécialiste de la garantie panne mécanique et vous avez une expérience d’au moins 5 ans auprès d’un assureur, garantisseur, courtier, insurtech, acteur bancaire, captive ou constructeur auto, impérativement dans le domaine des assurances affinitaires ou de la panne mécanique où, en tant que responsable marketing, marché, produit ou offre, vous avez développé et mis en place de nouvelles offres.
• Vous mettez en œuvre d’excellentes qualités d’analyse et de synthèse, vous avez l'habitude de travailler en toute autonomie et faites preuve d'imagination et d'audace.
• Vous avez une excellente capacité relationnelle afin de susciter les échanges avec vos collègues, les experts avec lesquels vous serez amené(e) à collaborer pour éclairer votre vision du marché ainsi que les prospects, les clients et autres acteurs du marché avec lesquels vous serez en contact
• Vous possédez une bonne maîtrise de l'anglais, indispensable compte tenu de notre activité internationale.

Les avantages qui font la différence :

  • Salaire négociable en fonction de l’expérience incluant le 13ème mois et la prime de vacances mensualisés,
  • Primes d’Intéressement / de Participation liées au groupe Covéa,
  • Formation et accompagnement riche et complet,
  • Télétravail possible jusqu’à 2 jours par semaine (mis en œuvre selon votre degré d’autonomie),
  • Mutuelle avantageuse + régime sur complémentaire santé (prise en charge employeur 60%),
  • Forfait Cadre avantageux : 200 jours travaillés / an (au lieu de 218!) + 31 jours de congés payés + différentes formules de RTT possibles,
  • Restaurant d'entreprise
  • Bénéfice du forfait mobilité durable permettant la prise en charge d’une partie des frais de déplacements réalisés en covoiturage, vélo ou autopartage.

description:

  • Bearbeiten und Steuern von Projekten mit Schnittstellen außerhalb des eigenen Geschäftsbereiches einschließlich internationaler Projekte mit Abstimmung zu Kunden/ Lieferanten

Dein Profil

  • Gute Kenntnisse in JIRA, POLARION, HP ALM QC, CSharp

  • Gute Englischkenntnisse

Was bieten wir?

  • Unbefristete Festanstellung
  • persönlichen Betreuung

  • Flache Hierarchien und kurze Entscheidungswege

Wer sind wir?
Die STEPPS Projekt & Personal Service GmbH ist ein modernes Unternehmen mit Niederlassungen in Coburg, Emsdetten und Suhl. title: Delivery Truck Driver (Class 3) / 5.5 days week
description:
We are looking for a responsible and experienced Class 3 Truck Driver to join our logistics and delivery team. The ideal candidate will ensure safe, timely, and professional delivery of goods to customers while maintaining the company’s service standards.


**Warehouse near Joo Koon MRT - 5.5 day work**

Key Responsibilities:

  • Operate Class 3 trucks to deliver goods safely and on time to customers.

  • Load and unload cargo with care to prevent damage.

  • Perform daily vehicle inspection and ensure the truck is in good working condition.

  • Follow assigned routes and delivery schedules.

  • Maintain delivery records, job sheets, and ensure all paperwork is properly signed.

  • Comply with all traffic laws and company safety regulations.

  • Report any vehicle defects, accidents, or delivery issues promptly.

  • Assist with warehouse or logistics support when required.

Requirements:

  • Valid Singapore Class 3/4 Driving Licence.

  • Familiar with Singapore roads and industrial areas.

  • Able to handle loading/unloading tasks.

  • Good driving record with no major traffic offences.

  • Responsible, punctual, and has a positive work attitude.

Working Hours:

Monday to Friday: 8:30 AM – 5:30 PM

  • Saturday: 8:30 AM - 12.30 PM

Benefits:

  • Competitive salary (based on experience)

  • Overtime pay and allowances

  • Annual leave, medical benefits, and 13th Month prorated Bonus

  • Friendly and supportive work environment

title: Commercial Partnerships Manager (Japanese OR Korean Speaker)
description:
Here at AppsFlyer, it’s all about the people; each and every one of us has our own specialty, a unique flavor that we bring to the table. We are all driven individuals whose interests are just as diverse as we are. You could say we’re #PeopleObsessed. When we say obsession, we mean we will do everything to make you feel those AF vibes; whether it’s company breakfasts, happy hours, and parties, our connection to each other is always a core focus.

Few markets in the world demand the level of commercial sophistication, cultural fluency, and strategic agility that Korea and Japan do. As the Commercial Partnership Manager, you will manage AppsFlyer's partner growth across Korea and Japan, shaping an ecosystem at the heart of our Asia-Pacific ambitions.

This is a role is based in Bangkok, Thailand for someone who thrives on ownership. You will manage relationships from first contact to signed agreements, co-build go-to-market plans with key partners, and be the person who makes things happen in one of our most important global markets.

What you'll do:

Commercial Growth and Revenue

  • Drive partner-led revenue by identifying, developing, and closing high-value commercial partnerships across the Korea and Japan mobile ecosystem
  • Own partner-driven pipeline, including new partner acquisition, activation, and retention initiatives
  • Develop and execute joint business plans with key partners to unlock new revenue streams
  • Negotiate and close commercial agreements and partnership contracts
  • Execute go-to-market strategies for new products and market opportunities within Korea and Japan

Partnership Development and Ecosystem Expansion

  • Build and grow relationships with strategic partners: including DSPs, media networks, agencies, OEMs, and technology platforms active in Korea and Japan.
  • Identify emerging trends, distribution channels, and niche partnership opportunities specific to the Korea and Japan markets
  • Represent AppsFlyer at industry events, conferences, and partner summits across the region
  • Drive co-marketing initiatives, cross-promotions, and strategic alliances

Cross-functional Execution and Alignment

  • Work closely with Sales, Marketing, Product, and Legal teams to align partnership strategies with broader business priorities
  • Lead partner integration discussions and support product adoption across the Korea and Japan ecosystem
  • Provide ongoing partner enablement, training, and performance reviews
  • Maintain clear and consistent reporting on pipeline, partner health, and growth metrics

Market Intelligence and Continuous Improvement

  • Translate Korea and Japan market dynamics, partner feedback, and competitive intelligence into actionable internal recommendations
  • Leverage AI-powered analytics and data-driven insights to prioritize partnership efforts, spot emerging opportunities, and continuously optimize commercial outcomes across the Korea and Japan ecosystem.
  • Ensure compliance with local regulations and maintain strong commercial discipline.

Who you are:

  • 5+ years in partnerships, business development, or commercial sales within mobile AdTech, SaaS, or digital advertising
  • Proven revenue growth through partnerships and complex deal execution
  • Deep knowledge of the Japan & Korea mobile ecosystem - platforms, Ad tech players, and local business culture
  • Korean OR Japanese fluency (written and spoken) and strong English proficiency - both required
  • Solid grasp of Korea and Japan markets - App Ecosystem, SDK data practices
  • Daily AI user - you embed AI into research, prioritization, and decision-making as a matter of habit, not curiosity
  • Entrepreneurial, self-directed, and able to present complex ideas simply to any audience

Preferred Requirements

  • Direct experience managing MMP, DSP, Ad Network, or agency partnerships in the Korea and Japan market
  • Experience with SaaS product partnerships or mobile analytics platforms
  • Strong existing network within the Korea and Japan mobile advertising or marketing technology ecosystem
  • Being introduced by an AppsFlyer team member

AppsFlyer is a global company with 20 offices worldwide. Through mental health programs like Be Well, the Global Employee Exchange Program, and fitness programs, we empower our people to thrive physically, mentally, and professionally.

Here, titles don’t define us—ideas do. You’ll thrive in a culture where everyone’s input shapes the future.

title: Manual QA Engineer
description:
Join a Company That Invests In You

Seeking Alpha is the worldâs leading community of engaged investors. Weâre the go-to destination for investors looking for actionable stock market opinions, real-time market analysis, and unique financial insights. At the same time, weâre also dedicated to creating a workplace where our team thrives. Weâre passionate about fostering a flexible, balanced environment with remote work options and an array of perks that make a real difference.

Here, your growth matters. We prioritize your development through ongoing learning and career advancement opportunities, helping you reach new milestones. Join Seeking Alpha to be part of a company that values your unique journey, supports your success, and champions both your personal well-being and professional goals.

What Weâre Looking For

We are looking for a talented and experienced Manual QA Engineer to join our QA team. In this role, you will be responsible for executing manual testing of a web and mobile application and creating and maintaining test documentation. You will work closely with product owners, developers, and customer support representatives to ensure product quality, reliability, and seamless user experience.

This role is 100% remote, offering flexibility to work from home.

The Manual QA Engineer will be engaged with the company as a contractor (Private Entrepreneur).





What You'll Do:

  • Work in close cooperation with product owners, developers, and customer support representatives
  • Create and maintain test documentation (checklists, test cases)
  • Estimate the execution time of testing activities
  • Execute manual testing of web and mobile application: functional, cross-platform, UI (responsive design)
  • Document and maintain defect reports in Jira
  • Analyze and evaluate business requirements with product owners
  • Communicate on any risks from a QA perspective that could affect feature delivery
  • Report to stakeholders on the test execution results
  • Provide support in issues investigation

Requirements:

  • 3+ years of professional experience in software QA
  • Experience in web and mobile applications testing (end-to-end, UI)
  • Strong knowledge of software QA methodologies, tools, and processes
  • Understanding of SDLC in Agile/Scrum
  • Solid knowledge of test design techniques
  • Understanding web technologies: HTML, CSS, client-server architecture, API, JavaScript
  • Good knowledge of SQL for testing purposes is a plus
  • Upper-intermediate level of English

Personal skills:

  • Good analytical skills
  • Team player with the ability to work independently
  • Self-motivated, self-disciplined, goal-driven
  • Strong attention to detail and accuracy
  • Problem-solving mindset
  • Good communication skills

title: Accounts Executive
description:
Company Overview

We are a Singapore-incorporated investment and operations management platform with a focus on long-term investment activities, asset-related projects, and operational support functions. We operate with a startup culture — dynamic, lean, and collaborative — where team members are encouraged to grow beyond their defined roles and take on expanding responsibilities over time.

The Role

We are looking for a motivated and adaptable Accounts Executive to support our daily finance and accounting operations. This role goes beyond routine accounting — we are looking for someone who is eager to learn, comfortable with change, and ready to take ownership as the business evolves.

This role is well-suited for candidates who value long-term professional development and want to contribute meaningfully in a growing organisation.

Key Responsibilities

  • Manage full sets of accounts including accounts payable, accounts receivable, general ledger, and month-end closing
  • Prepare invoices, payment vouchers, bank reconciliations, and accounting schedules
  • Maintain accurate and organised financial records and documentation for compliance purposes
  • Assist in preparing management reports and financial statements
  • Liaise with banks, auditors, tax agents, and external service providers
  • Maintain data integrity across accounting systems
  • Support ad-hoc finance tasks and take on responsibilities as business needs grow

Requirements

  • Diploma or higher qualification in Accounting, Finance, or a related field
  • Minimum 2 years of relevant accounting experience, preferably with full set accounts
  • Proficient in Microsoft Excel and accounting software (e.g. Xero, QuickBooks, or similar)
  • Strong attention to detail and organisational skills
  • Able to work independently and handle confidential information with discretion
  • Adaptable, proactive, and open to taking on evolving responsibilities in a startup-style environment

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Experience in investment management, financial services, or private equity
  • Exposure to multi-entity accounting or GST filing
  • Familiarity with process improvement initiatives

title: Full-Stack-Entwickler (m/w/d)
description:
**Driving Digital Technologies.**
Den digitalen Wandel begleiten und aktiv mitgestalten – unsere Mission bei citema. Mit unseren innovativen Ansätzen beraten und unterstützen wir unsere Kunden in den Technologiefeldern Cyber Security, KI und Blockchain. Ebenso gehört die Umsetzung system- und sicherheitsrelevanter Softwareprojekte zu unserem Portfolio. So verbinden wir die neuen Technologien mit der klassischen Softwarewelt. Bei uns wird ein professionelles, kollegiales Miteinander mit Du-Kultur gelebt, denn unser exzellenter Teamgeist und die offene Kommunikation sind der Spirit unseres Unternehmens. Als sehr erfolgreiches und kontinuierlich wachsendes Unternehmen mit solider Basis, bieten wir Dir vielfältige Möglichkeiten in einem hochinteressanten, dynamischen Umfeld. Werde Teil unseres Erfolgs, bring Deine Expertise mit ein und gestalte gemeinsam mit uns die Zukunft verantwortungsvoll.

**Deine Mission**
Wir suchen Dich als **Full-Stack-Entwickler (m/w/d) am Standort Regensburg (hybrid) für das Verfahren BayBAS**.

Dich erwartet ein spannendes Modernisierungsprojekt: Ein bestehendes VB6-System wird schrittweise in eine moderne Webanwendung überführt. Dabei hast Du die Möglichkeit, die technische Weiterentwicklung einer zentralen Fachanwendung aktiv mitzugestalten und Deine Ideen in Konzeption und Umsetzung einzubringen.

Deine Aufgaben dabei sind:

  • Selbstständige Umsetzung fachlicher und technischer Anforderungen sowie Änderungsaufträge
  • Mitarbeit bei der Erstellung technischer Konzeptionen – beratend oder bei Bedarf auch federführend
  • Erstellung und Pflege technischer Dokumentationen
  • Technische Unterstützung der Teilprojektleitung
  • Sicherstellung und Überwachung der Einhaltung technischer Standards
  • Mitarbeit an der Modernisierung einer bestehenden Fachanwendung hin zu einer zeitgemäßen Webarchitektur
  • Entwicklung im Backend mit C# sowie im Frontend mit React

**Deine Profil**
Folgende Kenntnisse und Fähigkeiten solltest Du auf jeden Fall mitbringen:

title: Personal Assistant to a Manager | Legal, Finance & HR Support
description:
• 5 Work Days Per Week
  • Current Office Near to Kaki Bukit MRT, Singapore
  • Will Relocate to Tai Seng MRT in August 2026
  • Medical & Dental Benefits Provided
  • Entitled to Yearly Bonus & Performance Bonus

ROLE PURPOSE

  • The Executive Secretary provides comprehensive administrative, secretarial, and reception support to the Singapore International Headquarters (IHQ), serving as a key administrative partner to the Legal, Finance, and Human Resources (HR) functions.
  • The role is responsible for coordinating legal and corporate documentation, executive administration, front-of-house reception, and general office operations, while supporting regional activities across the APAC entities to ensure efficient day-to-day business operations and a professional workplace environment.

LEGAL & DISCIPLINARY SECRETARIAT SUPPORT (50%)

  • Prepare, format, proofread, and file legal documents, contracts, NDAs, board resolutions, and corporate templates in line with group standards.
  • Maintain and organize the group's contract register, legal document repository, and corporate secretarial records across all APAC entities.
  • Support corporate secretarial matters including board minutes, statutory filings, entity KYC documentation, and coordination with company secretaries in each jurisdiction.
  • Track key contract dates, renewal deadlines, and compliance timelines, and flag upcoming actions to Legal Management.
  • Liaise with external law firms, notaries, and government agencies (e.g., ACRA, IRAS-related filings where applicable) on administrative matters.
  • Assist with trademark, IP, and licensing administration, including maintaining registers and supporting renewal / filing processes.
  • Assist with data gathering and document compilation for ongoing corporate matters, including transfer pricing documentation, entity restructuring, and regulatory correspondence, as directed.
  • Perform other duties as assigned by Legal Management to support the broader Finance, Legal and HR function of the Singapore IHQ.

ADMINISTRATION (50%)

  • Provide day-to-day administrative and secretarial support to the General Manager, APAC Legal Manager and HR Manager, including calendar management, meeting scheduling, and correspondence handling.
  • Manage front-desk / reception duties including greeting visitors, clients, and external counsel, and maintaining visitor sign-in and access records.
  • Coordinate meeting room bookings, set-up, and hospitality arrangements for internal meetings, board meetings, and external visits.
  • Liaise with building management, landlord, and facilities vendors on office maintenance, repairs, security access, and workplace safety matters.
  • Assist in organizing internal events, staff engagement activities, and off-site meetings.
  • Support ad hoc office matters

REQUIREMENTS

  1. Diploma on Business Administration, Paralegal Studies, or a related field.
  2. Minimum 2 – 4 years of experience in an executive assistance, legal assistant, paralegal, corporate secretarial, or legal administrative support role, ideally within a multinational or group corporate environment.
  3. Prior exposure to corporate secretarial practices and familiarity with ACRA / Singapore company law requirements is an advantage.
  4. Strong interpersonal skills, with the ability to liaise professionally with internal stakeholders, external counsel, and government agencies across multiple jurisdictions.

title: Klaviyo Email Marketing Assistant (Part-Time)
description:
About Us

Buddle was founded to address the growing demand for reliable and efficient staffing solutions across diverse industries globally. Our mission is to seamlessly connect businesses with skilled professionals, fostering long-term partnerships that benefit both parties. At Buddle, we prioritise trust, value, and sustainability in every staffing solution we provide.

About the Role

We are looking for a detail-oriented and reliable Klaviyo Email Marketing Assistant to support our client's marketing team on a part-time basis (1 day / 8 hours per week). This role is ideal for someone with hands-on experience building email campaigns in Klaviyo who enjoys creating polished, responsive email campaigns while ensuring every detail is accurate before launch.

You'll work from provided campaign briefs, approved copy, and creative assets to build engaging email campaigns that are optimized for both desktop and mobile devices. A strong eye for detail and commitment to quality assurance are essential, as you'll play an important role in ensuring campaigns are delivered accurately and professionally.

Key Responsibilities

  • Build email campaigns in Klaviyo using supplied campaign briefs, approved copy, and creative assets.
  • Format emails to ensure a consistent and visually appealing experience across desktop and mobile devices.
  • Add and verify alt text, hyperlinks, and other campaign elements.
  • Conduct preview sends and perform comprehensive quality assurance (QA) checks prior to campaign deployment.
  • Identify and resolve formatting or content issues before campaigns go live.
  • Maintain a high level of accuracy and consistency across all email campaigns.
  • Collaborate with the marketing team to ensure campaigns are delivered according to specifications and deadlines.

Other Responsibilities

  • Make necessary process suggestions and improvements which can help the team.
  • Contributes to team effort by accomplishing related results as needed.
  • Perform other related tasks and duties that may be assigned by the client later on.


About You

  • Previous experience building email campaigns in Klaviyo.
  • Strong attention to detail with the ability to identify formatting and content issues before launch.
  • Understanding of email marketing best practices, including responsive design and accessibility considerations such as alt text.
  • Experience working with campaign briefs, approved copy, and creative assets.
  • Excellent organizational and time management skills, with the ability to meet deadlines independently.
  • A proactive mindset and commitment to delivering high-quality work.
  • Strong written communication skills and the ability to collaborate effectively with remote teams

Nice to Have

  • Experience working with eCommerce brands.
  • Familiarity with email marketing metrics and campaign performance.
  • Experience with other email marketing platforms is an advantage.

Finer Details

Schedule: 8am - 5pm AEST
Available to work 1 day a week, (8 hours)

Start Date:
TO BE AMENDED

title: Registered Nurse
description:

title: 🏗️ Certifikatsvejsere søges i København – vær med til at bygge fremtidens fjernvarmenet
description:
Vi søger flere erfarne certifikatsvejsere til spændende fjernvarmeprojekter på Sjælland.

Der er noget særligt ved at arbejde på projekter, der gør en forskel.

Fjernvarmenettet er en vigtig del af fremtidens infrastruktur, og som certifikatsvejser er du med til at sikre, at anlæggene bliver udført med den kvalitet og præcision, som branchen stiller krav om.

Hos os bliver du en del af en entreprenørvirksomhed med stærke kompetencer inden for forsynings- og anlægsprojekter. Du får en hverdag med spændende opgaver, dygtige kollegaer og et højt fagligt niveau, hvor kvalitet aldrig er en tilfældighed.

Dine arbejdsopgaver vil blandt andet omfatte:

🔥 Svejsning og montage af fjernvarmeledninger

🛠 Etablering, renovering og vedligeholdelse af fjernvarmeanlæg

⚙️ Arbejde med præisolerede fjernvarmerør

📋 Svejsearbejde efter gældende standarder og kvalitetskrav

🤝 Samarbejde med montører, maskinførere og øvrige faggrupper på projekterne

Vi forventer, at du:

✔ Er uddannet smed eller har en tilsvarende faglig baggrund

✔ Har erfaring med fjernvarmearbejde

✔ Har gyldige svejsecertifikater

✔ Arbejder kvalitetsbevidst og tager ansvar for dit håndværk

✔ Har fokus på sikkerhed og godt samarbejde

✔ Har kørekort B

Vi tilbyder:

💰 Løn efter kvalifikationer og erfaring

🚀 Hurtig opstart

🏗️ Spændende fjernvarmeprojekter på tværs af Sjælland

🤝 Et stærkt fagligt miljø med erfarne kollegaer

📈 Gode muligheder for en stabil og langsigtet ansættelse

😄 Kort fortalt

Hvis du trives med teknisk krævende svejseopgaver, sætter en ære i dit håndværk og gerne vil være en del af projekter, der får betydning mange år frem, så tror vi, at du vil føle dig godt tilpas hos os.

Lyder det spændende, så tøv ikke med at sende dit CV på mail eller ringe på telefon – vi glæder os til at høre fra dig.

📞 +45 93 96 03 42

✉️ simon@entreprisegruppen.com

title: Tech Writer (News)
description:
About US

Sportskeeda - For the hardcore sports fan

Established in 2009, Absolute Sports is the parent company of Sportskeeda.com, ProFootballNetwork.com, SoapCentral.com and Deltiasgaming.com. We are a subsidiary of Nazara Technologies, the only publicly listed Indian gaming / diversified media company.

Sportskeeda is a global sports content platform that covers the world's biggest sports and esports subjects and serves over 100 Million fans every month. Our passionate team comprises top content creators from around the world who produce hundreds of well-researched content pieces on a daily basis. Sportskeeda has market leadership in multiple sports in the US, being #10 in Comscore rankings and a very close #2 in India (All Sports).

ProFootballNetwork.com is a NFL-focused property in the US with +11M monthly users.

SoapCentral.com is a leading soap opera content destination in the US.

Deltiasgaming.com is a dynamic and thriving online platform dedicated to providing gamers of all skill levels with top-notch content, valuable resources, and an engaging community.

The Opportunity
Experience: 1-2 years of experience in tech journalism
Role: Contract

Key Responsibilities

  • Write and publish timely, accurate, and engaging tech news articles on a daily basis.

  • Output of 4-5 articles daily (300~600 words per article, depending on the topic and format.)

  • Achieve a monthly output of 90 articles across all formats.

  • Cover breaking news across smartphones, gaming, GPUs, laptops, and consumer electronics.

  • Monitor industry trends, product launches, leaks, and official announcements.

  • Optimize articles for search engines using relevant keywords, metadata, and content structure.

  • Verify facts, specifications, and claims using credible sources.


Requirements

  • 1-2 years of experience in tech journalism or content writing.

  • Strong understanding of consumer technology, especially smartphones, laptops, and PC components.

  • Ability to write quickly without compromising accuracy or clarity.

  • Ability to maintain neutral, non-promotional tone where required.

  • Basic understanding of benchmarking, specifications, and performance metrics is a plus.

  • Comfortable using CMS platforms.

  • Ability to embed charts, reference sources, and format cleanly.

  • Verify claims and avoid misinformation by properly researching sources.

  • Basic SEO understanding:

    • Keyword placement & density

    • Meta descriptions

    • Skimmable formatting

  • Ability to translate complex concepts into accessible language.


Prefered Skills:

  • Ability to have a quick turnover time for articles.

  • Experience covering smartphones, laptops, gaming hardware, GPUs, and performance analysis.

  • Ability to interpret and translate technical terms into reader-friendly content.

  • Strong writing and content structuring skills.

title: Werkstudent Bauüberwachung (m/w/d)
description:
Ein Team, in dem man sich wohlfühlt:

Wir sind ein mittelständisches Familienunternehmen mit mehr als 500 Mitarbeitenden an verschiedenen Standorten in Deutschland. Als Ingenieurs- und Beratungsdienstleister sind wir weltweit in Projekten tätig, welche die Energiewende vorantreiben, den Schutz der Umwelt fördern und zur Verbesserung unser aller Lebensqualität beitragen. Die Position ist in unserer Abteilung Transport & Urban Spaces angesiedelt, die aktuell ca. 40 Mitarbeiter umfasst. Wir suchen Sie als Werkstudent Bauüberwachung(m/w/d) an unserem Standort Essen, um mit Ihnen anspruchsvolle und vielseitige Infrastrukturprojekte zu meistern!

Aufgaben, die motivieren:

  • Unterstützung des Projektmanagementteams hinsichtlich Termin- und Qualitätskontrolle für Tiefbauprojekte

  • Mitwirkung in der koordination eines interdisziplinären Projektteams

  • Dokumentenaufbereitung

  • Baustellenbegehungen mit Dokumentation

  • Unterstützung in laufenden Projekten von Aquisition bis Abwicklung ja nach Bedarf

  • Chancen zur eigenverantwortlichen Abwicklung von Teil- bzw. Kleinprojekten

Qualifikationen, die überzeugen:

  • Abgeschlossenes Studium im Bereich Bauingenieurwesen (BA)

  • Erfahrungen im Bereich Tiefbau, KIB, Wasserbau, Wasserwirtschaft

  • Eigenverantwortliche Arbeitsweise, sowie ausgeprägte Organisations- und Kommunikationsfähigkeiten

  • Sicherer Umgang mit MS Projects

  • Reisebereitschaft notwendig

  • Führerschein B notwendig

  • Sehr gute Deutschkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift

Worüber wir uns freuen: Wenn Sie für Ihren Job brennen, egal welcher ethnischen Herkunft, Religion oder Weltanschauung Sie angehören. Auch Geschlecht, Behinderung, Alter oder sexuelle Identität spielen für uns keine Rolle. Hauptsache, Sie passen zu uns!

91% unserer Mitarbeitenden stimmen der Aussage zu, dass ILF in Deutschland ein "Great Place to work" ist:

  • Sympathische Unternehmenskultur und gelebte VIeLFalt: Viele lokale aber auch überregionale Live-Events prägen unser Miteinander und der Großteil der Mitarbeitenden ist per "Du". Besonders stolz macht uns die Internationalität unseres Teams mit mehr 30 unterschiedlichen Nationen.

  • Moderne Arbeitsumgebung: An allen Standorten sind unsere Arbeitsplätze technisch hochwertig und mit höhenverstellbaren Schreibtischen ausgestattet. Auch wenn es uns von anderen Unternehmen vielleicht nicht unterscheidet: Wir bieten freie Getränke, den obligatorischen Obstkorb und weitere Snacks für Zwischendurch inklusive Eis im Sommer.

  • Es erwarten dich interessante Aufgaben in einem abwechslungsreichen technischen Umfeld mit der Möglichkeit, einen guten Überblick über die verschiedenen Felder des Bauingenieurwesens zu bekommen.

  • Du arbeitest in einem dynamischen jungen Team und eignest dir fundiertes fachliches Wissen an.

  • Du hast die Möglichkeit als Werkstudent:in Verantwortung zu übernehmen.
    Wir bieten dir ein angenehmes soziales Umfeld sowie flexibles und mobiles Arbeiten innerhalb eines weltweit agierenden Unternehmens.

  • Nimm an diversen Freizeitaktivitäten des Club of Young Engineers der ILF teil und baue dein berufliches Netzwerk aus.

  • Internationalität & Vielfalt: Wir sind Teil der von den Gründerfamilien geführten ILF Gruppe mit über 45 Standorten und mehr als 3.700 Mitarbeitenden und arbeiten in nationalen sowie internationalen Projekten mit diversen Teams aus über 30 Nationen.

Überzeugt? Dann werde Teil von Engineering Excellence und sende uns deine Bewerbung über den untenstehenden Button!

Weitere Fragen? Noch mehr über uns und unseren Bewerbungsprozess erfährst du hier.

Ihr Ansprechpartner: Frau Delband Tamjidi (+4920189096469 / jobs.ger@ilf.com)

title: Product Marketing Manager
description:
Neptune is redefining how organizations build Applications & AI Agents for SAP. Our platform helps customers modernize SAP ECC, accelerate S/4HANA adoption, embrace Clean Core, and build the next generation of AI-powered business applications.

We're looking for a Product Marketing Manager with deep, demonstrated SAP experience to own the narrative that brings this vision to market.

This isn't a traditional PMM role focused on launch checklists and collateral. You will become one of Neptune's foremost experts on the SAP market: understanding where customers are on their SAP journey, how SAP's strategy is evolving, where competitors position themselves, and how Neptune creates differentiated value.

You will sit at the intersection of Product, Sales, Marketing and Customer Success. Reporting to the Product Marketing Director, you'll work daily with Marketing, Product Management, Engineering, Sales Leadership and Executive Management to shape how Neptune is understood by customers, analysts, partners and the market.

This is an individual contributor role, not a people-management position. You lead by example across the business — owning outcomes and driving cross-functional virtual teams with a company-wide mandate. Leadership here means getting work done as an owner, not building headcount.

Location: UK, Benelux, DACH or Nordics — remote-first, with European travel.


Your responsibilities

  • You own the positioning and messaging for Neptune DXP: You translate product capabilities into compelling customer value, helping organizations understand how Neptune accelerates every stage of the SAP journey, from ECC modernization to the SAP Autonomous Enterprise. You continuously refine messaging & content, based on customer feedback, market shifts and competitive movements.
  • You understand SAP customer buying journeys, SAP ECC and S/4HANA, Clean Core, SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP), SAP Business AI, SAP Build, Fiori and SAPUI5, SAP development, SAP partners and GSIs.
  • You don't simply know the products, you understand why customers make technology decisions. You monitor SAP announcements, analyst research, competitors and customer trends, and translate them into clear guidance, sales plays and intelligence for GTM teams.
  • Every (major) product release and new product introduction becomes a commercial event. You lead Product launches from a Product Marketing/Marketing perspective, industry & persona based messaging, product positioning & platform messaging, Sales enablement, demo narratives, battlecards, website content, campaign messaging, customer presentations, Executive decks.
  • You enable Revenue teams to win: You build the core sales toolkit like battlecards for each major competitor (SAP Build, Microsoft Power Platform, Mendix, OutSystems), objection-handling guides, ROI/value narratives, and discovery questions that help reps qualify SAP modernization opportunities early.
  • You join key sales calls, executive briefings, and QBRs when Sales needs help articulating Neptune's differentiation to a skeptical CIO or a technical SAP architect.
  • You keep the field current. SAP's roadmap, pricing, and competitive landscape shift constantly - you're the one who translates a SAP TechEd announcement or a competitor's new feature into "here's what this means for our deals in flight" within days.
  • You partner with Solution Consulting and Business Value Consulting and you make sure the story they tell matches the narrative Marketing and Product are pushing externally.
  • You measure yourself by whether Sales actually uses what you build (adoption of sales tools, battlecards, requests for your involvement in deals) rather than just shipping assets and moving on.
  • You don't simply explain Neptune as a product, you explain where enterprise software is going. You'll regularly create Executive blogs, whitepapers, analyst briefings, webinar content, keynote presentations, industry research, customer success stories and strategic messaging.
  • You are AI-native and AI is part of your daily workflow to accelerate research, competitive analysis, writing, content creation, messaging development, market analysis and content production. We expect you to demonstrate this during the interview process.
Required
  • 7+ years of Product Marketing, Product Management, Solution Consulting or related experience within the SAP ecosystem.
  • Deep understanding of SAP ECC, SAP S/4HANA and enterprise application development.
  • Demonstrated knowledge of SAP modernization, Clean Core and SAP Business Technology Platform.
  • Exceptional writing and communication skills in English.
  • Experience translating complex technical capabilities into compelling customer value.
  • Experience creating messaging, positioning and Sales enablement for enterprise software.
  • Proven stakeholder management and the ability to influence without authority across Product, Sales, Customer Success, Executive leadership, analysts and partners.
  • Strong presentation skills, including Executive audiences.
  • AI-native ways of working, with concrete examples of how AI has fundamentally improved your speed and quality.
  • Hands-on experience with AI platforms, AI agents or enterprise automation, with concrete examples of applying them to real work.

Strong Plus
  • Strong understanding of SAP development technologies including ABAP, SAPUI5, Fiori or SAP Build.
  • Experience briefing industry analysts such as Gartner, IDC or Forrester.
  • Experience supporting enterprise software Sales teams.
  • Experience working in a scale-up or high-growth B2B SaaS company.
  • Familiarity with low-code, application development platforms or developer tooling.
Note on Applications
We encourage applicants from all backgrounds—even if you don’t tick every box above.
Research shows that underrepresented candidates often hesitate to apply unless they meet every requirement. If you’re passionate about the role and feel you’d be a strong fit, we’d love to hear from you.

Our interview process is designed to assess how you think, not just what you've done. Rather than focusing on your CV, we'll ask you to tackle challenges similar to those you'll face at Neptune. This includes a positioning and messaging exercise, translating a recent SAP announcement into customer value, and discussing how AI supports your day-to-day work.

What We Offer
  • Competitive base salary with uncapped performance-based bonuses.
  • Career growth in a fast-scaling international company.
  • A collaborative company culture rooted in Norwegian values—trust, transparency, and work-life balance.
  • Be part of a diverse, global team spanning 36+ countries, including the UK, Ireland, Norway, Sweden, Germany, and the US.
  • Flexibility and autonomy to shape your work, strategy, and impact.
  • Enjoy Benefits

title: Sales Advisor  | Part Time 20 ore | Cremona
description:
COSA FARAI:​
Come Sales Advisor in H&M, avrai un ruolo fondamentale nel creare un’eccezionale esperienza al cliente. Accoglierai i clienti, li guiderai all’interno del negozio e li supporterai nella scelta, valorizzando i nostri prodotti. Agendo in linea con i nostri valori, contribuirai al tuo successo e a quello dell’azienda.

Ti occuperai di:

  • Condividere la tua conoscenza della moda e dei prodotti per aiutare i clienti a fare scelte accurate.
  • Collaborare con il tuo team per offrire un servizio eccezionale in ogni fase del percorso del cliente.
  • Garantire che l’area vendita e il magazzino siano sempre ben forniti, ordinati e accoglienti.
  • Supportare le attività di apertura e chiusura del negozio.
  • Rappresentare te stesso e il brand in modo positivo durante tutte le interazioni con i clienti.

CON CHI LAVORERAI
I nostri negozi sono il cuore pulsante della nostra azienda, dove i clienti vivono in prima persona l’esperienza del brand. Come parte del dinamico Team del negozio, ogni ruolo - Sales Advisor, Department Manager, Store Manager e Visual Merchandiser - contribuisce a creare un ambiente ispirante e accogliente. Avrai anche l’opportunità di collaborare con il Team di Area, condividendo idee e strategie per raggiungere insieme il successo.

Con il tuo team, giocherai un ruolo fondamentale nell’aiutare i clienti a sentirsi sicuri di sé ed esprimere la propria individualità, grazie alle ultime tendenze e agli stili intramontabili.
Creando connessioni autentiche con i clienti nei nostri negozi, rendiamo la moda accessibile per tutti.

CHI SEI
Cerchiamo persone con:

  • Esperienza nel servizio al cliente, preferibilmente nel settore moda, retail o ambiti affini.

E persone che siano:

  • Appassionate di fashion e orientate a offrire un’eccezionale esperienza in-store, promuovendo i nostri prodotti e contribuendo a raggiungere gli obiettivi di vendita.
  • Proattive e capaci di lavorare in ambienti collaborativi e dinamici.
  • Comunicative, creative, curiose nell’utilizzo della tecnologia in negozio, con una forte motivazione ad apprendere e svilupparsi.
  • Flessibili e orientate all’azione.

CHI SIAMO
H&M Group è un’azienda globale che riunisce diversi brand di moda e business ventures. Il nostro obiettivo è dimostrare che non esiste compromesso tra design eccezionale, prezzi accessibili e soluzioni sostenibili. Vogliamo rendere la moda libera e accessibile a tutti, mettendo i nostri clienti al centro di ogni decisione. Siamo migliaia di colleghi appassionati e di talento, uniti dalla nostra cultura e da valori condivisi. Insieme, vogliamo usare la nostra forza, la nostra conoscenza e le nostre competenze per guidare l’industria della moda verso un futuro più inclusivo e sostenibile.

​PERCHÉ TI PIACERÀ LAVORARE CON NOI
In H&M Group siamo orgogliosi di essere un’azienda dinamica e inclusiva. L’esperienza che i nostri colleghi contribuiscono a creare ogni giorno è stata anche riconosciuta attraverso premi come:

  • Europe’s Best Employers 2026 – Financial Times
  • Top 10 Diversity Brand Index Italia.

Offriamo ai nostri dipendenti benefit vantaggiosi e numerose opportunità di sviluppo a livello globale.

  • Sconto del 25% per i dipendenti su tutti i brand di H&M Group, sia nei negozi fisici che online (H&M, COS, Weekday, Monki, H&M HOME, & Other Stories e ARKET).
  • Programma di Incentivi H&M (HIP) – un piano di incentivi globale che premia la dedizione a lungo termine.
  • Buoni pasto di 6 euro per ogni giornata lavorativa di almeno 6 ore.
  • Accesso al portale aziendale dedicato ai benefit, con oltre 1500 sconti su prodotti e servizi per il benessere e la vita quotidiana.
  • Formazione iniziale dedicata, per accompagnarti al meglio nel tuo percorso in azienda.
  • Crescita e sviluppo - In H&M investiamo nello sviluppo dei talenti attraverso formazione continua e percorsi strutturati come training, e-learning, Talent Day, Skill Seminar e dialoghi individuali. Crediamo nella crescita professionale come parte integrante dell’esperienza lavorativa.

UNISCITI A NOI
La nostra unicità nasce dalla combinazione di molti elementi: una cultura inclusiva e collaborativa, valori forti e reali opportunità di crescita. Sono soprattutto le persone a renderci ciò che siamo. Fai il prossimo passo nella tua carriera insieme a noi.

Il viaggio inizia qui.

Offriamo contratto a tempo determinato.

Retribuzione: per questo ruolo offriamo una retribuzione annua lorda di € 23'212,14 (equivalente Full-Time), corrispondente al livello di inquadramento 5° (CCNL di riferimento: Commercio) + terzo elemento provinciale, variabile in funzione della provincia sede di lavoro. In caso di Part-Time, la retribuzione effettiva sarà riproporzionata in base all’orario contrattuale.

*Valutazione per Ruoli in store: per gestire l'alto volume di candidature per il ruolo di Sales Advisor, utilizziamo un metodo di valutazione online per il reclutamento basato sulle competenze nei nostri negozi. Dovrai completarlo come parte del processo di candidatura e selezione. Le tue risposte saranno valutate da uno strumento di valutazione che applica criteri predefiniti stabiliti da H&M Group. Dopo aver completato la valutazione, avrai l'opportunità di condividere feedback e fare domande. Se riscontri difficoltà o preferisci un metodo di valutazione alternativo, contatta recruitment_support@hm.com. Scegliere un'alternativa non influirà sulla tua candidatura. Per ulteriori informazioni su come trattiamo i tuoi dati personali, consulta la nostra Informativa sulla Privacy.

** Ci impegniamo in un processo di recruitment che sia equo, imparziale e basato sulle competenze.

title: Fintech Co-Founder / CEO (100 % remote) (m/f/d)
description:
We are looking to hire ambitious entrepreneurs to start and scale their own startups.

We are serial entrepreneurs, for example Paul Müller (founder Adjust, €1.2B exit) and Petter Made (founder SumUp, €8B) who are eager to support outlier personalities and serial entrepreneurs to build €1B+ companies.

Our offer:

  • A salary while you build your startup as you will directly be employed by us. Alternatively, you can opt for up to €500k in funding.

  • 1:1 sparring with unicorn founders on a weekly basis

  • Community: Access to the top 0.1% of founders, peers and investors

  • Team building: Hiring top notch talent supported through our network (over 50,000 professionals)

  • Distribution: Support in reaching product-market-fit and building up a sales force / marketing machine

  • Funding support for securing a multi-million euro funding round within 12 months (on average, EWOR Fellows raise > €2M after our Grand Pitch)

One of our fellows set a record for Europe’s largest pre-seed round by a first-time founder, securing a €12M pre-seed investment.

Tasks

  • You will own, build, and run your startup in fields such as Fintech

  • You will embark on an extensive personal development journey crafted by unicorn founders and follow a fully customised programme enhancing your goal, time, and energy management

  • You will receive support in hiring through our network to over 50,000 professionals and advice as well as best practices from serial entrepreneurs

  • You will receive intensive coaching to make your startup ready to raise millions in funding

  • You will iterate your product with us until having reached product-market-fit and receive support in building up a sales force or creating a marketing engine respectively

  • You are based in Europe or the Americas or open to relocate

  • You are willing to take full responsibility for your own startup and scale it to €100M+ in revenues

  • You have excellent communication skills in the English language
