title: Product Manager
description:
AppTweak is on a mission to help mobile teams win in the app stores. Our platform gives ASO specialists, growth leads, and app marketers at companies like Uber, Zynga, and The North Face the intelligence they need to grow their apps, from keyword insights and market data to competitive analysis and store performance. We move fast, we care about craft, and we build tools that people in the mobile industry genuinely rely on. If you want to work on a product that matters to the people who use it, come build with us.

We're looking for a Product Manager to own a product area end-to-end and drive its growth. As part of AppTweak's Product team, you'll be fully accountable for outcomes — from identifying the right problems to shipping solutions customers actually use. That includes the growth too: activation, engagement, monetisation, and expansion across Enterprise and PLG. You'll work closely with our Engineering, Design, and Product Marketing teams to make sure what you build is meaningful and converts to revenue.

You'll report to the VP of Product.

Location: Brussels - hybrid setting, min. 3 days per week at the office.

What you'll do

  • Own a product area end-to-end, from discovery and problem definition through design, engineering, shipping, and iteration.

  • Map how AI is reshaping Mobile Marketing, form a clear point of view, and translate it into a differentiated product direction — including identifying 0-to-1 opportunities and driving them from blank page to launch

  • Talk to customers regularly and synthesise what you learn into clear, prioritised product bets.

  • Define success metrics upfront and use them to evaluate whether what you shipped actually worked.

  • Partner closely with engineering and design to move quickly from concept to shipped product.

  • Use AI tools actively to prototype ideas, explore concepts, and validate direction before a spec is written.

  • Make hard prioritisation calls with limited information and defend them clearly.

  • Own activation, engagement, and monetisation for the product area. Define what good adoption looks like and build the path that takes customers from trial to expansion, across both PLG and Enterprise motions.

  • Partner with Product Marketing and Product Growth to design and execute go-to-market, from positioning and pricing decisions to in-product activation and long-term retention.

Must-have

  • 3+ years in a Product Manager role at a B2B SaaS company. You've owned a product area independently, shipped end-to-end, and operated without hand-holding in complex situations.

  • Bachelor’s or Master’s Degree in Business Administration, Computer Sciences, Engineering, or another relevant field.

  • Experience owning a growth or monetisation outcome: not just shipping features, but driving activation, conversion, or revenue, and understanding what moves the needle.

  • Comfortable operating across both PLG and Enterprise motions: you understand how product decisions play out differently in each, and how to build for both simultaneously.

  • Hands-on experience using AI tools in your product process: whether that's prototyping with Lovable, exploring ideas in Cursor or Claude Code, or using AI to validate direction before a spec exists.

  • Strong analytical instinct: you pull insights from product data, use them to challenge assumptions, and know the difference between a trend and noise.

  • Clear communicator at every level: crisp specs that engineers trust, presentations that land with leadership, conversations with customers that lead to strong product discovery.


Nice-to-have

  • Experience with App Stores, Mobile Marketing, ASO or, SEO.

  • Background at a company with PLG and/or Enterprise motions.

  • A working understanding of how AI-powered search and ranking systems work under the hood.

  • Experience with pricing and packaging decisions, understanding how product and monetisation interact.

[Please note you will need a Belgian valid visa/work permit to be eligible for the role].

What's in it for you

  • Grow your career with one of Belgium's top tech scale-ups.

  • Competitive and optimized salary package, structured to make the most of what you earn.

  • Meal vouchers and eco-vouchers.

  • Complementary Health Insurance Plan.

  • 12 RTT days per year, on top of regular holidays.

  • Flexible, hybrid work setup.

  • Opportunities for continuous learning and creative thinking.

  • Quarterly team-building events and a yearly company-wide retreat.

  • One volunteer day every quarter to give back to the community.

  • Serious about food. From themed lunches to spontaneous kitchen moments, food is genuinely part of how we connect at AppTweak. 🍴

  • Opportunity to connect with a variety of exciting mobile businesses across different verticals.

Who are we?

At AppTweak, we are a team of more than 130 people, spread across Brussels, San Francisco, London, Tokyo, Seoul, Bengaluru, Ho Chi Minh, and Beijing.

We build the platform that helps mobile leaders win in the app stores. More than 2,000 customers, like Uber, Zynga, and The North Face trust us to do that.

We started in Brussels in 2014. It began with a small team and a simple bet: the best ASO insights come from people who go deeper into app store data than anyone else.

We move fast, we speak up and push each other to do better. We keep learning, even on the days we are already good at our jobs. None of that happens by accident, but because people here take ownership. They show up for each other too, across offices and timezones.

If that sounds like the kind of place you want to grow, we would love to hear from you!


At AppTweak, our first spoken language is English, from our Belgian HQ, to our teams all over the world.

To ensure a smooth review process, please submit your application in English.

title: Cleaner
description:
ACDC Express is looking for a dependable and hard-working Cleaner to maintain a clean, safe, and welcoming environment for our customers and employees. The successful candidate will be responsible for the daily cleaning and housekeeping of the store, offices, kitchen, restrooms, and storerooms while ensuring high standards of cleanliness and hygiene is maintained at all times.

  • Clean and maintain the sales floor, offices, storerooms, kitchen, and restrooms.

  • Ensure the kitchen is stocked with essential refreshments.
  • Replenish restroom supplies, including toilet paper, hand towels, and other necessities.
  • Keep the store entrance clean and welcoming.

  • Greet customers politely and provide friendly service.

Requirements

  • 1–2 years' cleaning or housekeeping experience.
  • Experience in a retail environment will be advantageous.
  • Good communication and interpersonal skills.
  • Strong attention to detail.
  • Reliable and trustworthy.
  • Physically fit and able to perform cleaning duties.
  • Clear criminal and credit record.
  • Legally authorised to work in Namibia.

title: Secondary School Chemistry Tutor
description:
Responsibilities

· Plan and deliver engaging Chemistry lessons aligned with Singapore MOE secondary syllabus.

·Assess students’ learning needs and customise lesson plans to maximise learning outcomes.

·Teach scientific concepts in Chemistry, and/or lower-secondary Science according to the tutor’s expertise.

· Develop students’ understanding of scientific inquiry, experimental methods, data analysis, and practical applications.

· Guide students in answering structured, application-based, and calculation questions accurately.

· Mark assignments, monitor student progress, and provide timely, constructive feedback.

· Prepare students for school assessments, practical assessments, and national examinations.

· Develop students’ curiosity, critical thinking, scientific reasoning, and problem-solving skills.

· Create a positive, engaging, and disciplined learning environment.

· Communicate professionally with parents regarding students’ academic progress.

· Develop teaching resources, lesson materials, and practical learning activities.

· Uphold ATOP Academy’s teaching standards, values, and commitment to academic excellence.

Requirements

· GCE A-Level, Diploma, Degree, or equivalent qualification in Education, Science, Engineering, or a related field.

· Good command of spoken and written English.

· Strong subject knowledge in Chemistry, and/or lower-secondary Science.

· Familiarity with Singapore MOE Secondary Science syllabus and assessment requirements.

· Passion for teaching and supporting secondary school students.

· Strong communication, interpersonal, and classroom management skills.

· Responsible, patient, enthusiastic, and committed to student success.

· Prior teaching or tutoring experience is an advantage but not required.

Interested applicants are invited to submit their resume. Thank you.

title: Senior Business Consultant cum QA Tester
description:
Why This Role Matters

This role blends Business Analysis/Consultant and QA Tester, focusing on gathering requirements, proposing solutions, and ensuring system quality through testing. It supports end-to-end project delivery, including documentation, implementation, and issue resolution, while working closely with stakeholders and developers.

How You’ll Make a Difference

1. Business Consultant/Analyst

  • Conduct business requirements gathering through customer interactions and discussions and prepare appropriate gap or delta analysis document.
  • Advise and propose business solution that is aligned with market trends and international standards including sound alternative solutions that will allow the customer to respond to the business challenges faster.
  • Prepare appropriate business specifications document with details of the data, flow of operations and processing required to produce desired business need of the customer as gathered.
  • Review and identify the potential scope, risk and opportunities for improvement of the proposed business requirements and prepare appropriate document as needed.
  • Involved in project implementation in various capacities such as configuration setup, user training, functional support and other relevant activities that will ensure smooth deployment of the feature or product to production.
  • Develop and present strategic recommendations and business cases
  • Support change management initiatives and process improvements
  • Facilitate workshops, stakeholder interviews, and meetings
  • Prepare User Guide and other documentations relevant to the product and project implementation as requested by the customer.
  • Provide 1st and 2nd level of support across all supported applications, developing a resolution for customer issues based on product and industry knowledge.
  • Provide adhoc business consultancies such as sales support and proof of concept and project management support.
  • Work under direct supervision of senior team member to acquire functional knowledge, development methodology and the product to build specialized skills and expertise on the job.
  • Assist with ad-hoc projects and assignments as required.
  • Apply functional and operational knowledge of core banking modules, including, but not limited to, Deposits and Lending, when analyzing requirements, designing solutions, troubleshooting issues, and supporting implementation activities.

2. QA Tester:

  • Create detailed, comprehensive and well-structured test plans and test cases by identifying test scope and requirements from business specifications.
  • Maintain functional test cases, test data and test scripts. Develop and keep them up to date as new features are introduced in the system.
  • Execute and evaluate manual or automated test cases. Report bugs and errors with accurate definition of severity and priority.
  • Perform manual and/or automated testing (functional, regression, integration, UAT)
  • Identify, document, and track defects using defect tracking tools
  • Collaborate with developers to reproduce issues and verify fixes
  • Conduct test result analysis and provide clear status reports
  • Participate in sprint planning, reviews, and retrospectives (if Agile)
  • Investigate causes of software non-conformance during development, implementation and maintenance. Isolate, replicate, and report bugs and verify fixes.
  • Propose acceptable walk-around solutions to address an issue during implementation allowing to manage potential showstopper.
  • Stay up-to-date with new testing tools and test strategies.

What You’ll Bring

  • Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Management, Finance, Computer Science or a related field
  • Minimum 10 years of related working experience combination of Business Analyst/Consultant and QA Tester.
  • Attention to detail and strong analytical, problem-solving, and critical-thinking skills
  • Strong understanding of software testing methodologies and SDLC.
  • Good communication and documentation skills
  • Experience with business process modeling and documentation tools
  • Experience in digital transformation or system implementation projects
  • Knowledge of SQL and database testing
  • Experience in Agile/Scrum environments
  • Basic understanding of APIs and API testing tools
  • Industry-specific experience (e.g. finance, healthcare, technology).
  • Functional and experiential knowledge of core banking systems and banking domains such as Deposits and Lending, is an advantage.
  • Experience with test automation tools(e.g., Selenium, Cypress, Playwright) is a plus
  • Professional certification is a plus
  • Willing to travel and accept overseas assignments.

title: Cost & Contracts Executive
description:
Job Summary

The Cost & Contracts Executive manages project costing, tender submissions, procurement support, contract administration, and commercial activities to ensure project profitability through effective cost control, contract compliance, and variation order management.

Responsibilities

  • Prepare detailed cost estimates, bills of quantities (BOQs), and project budgets to support accurate financial planning
  • Source and evaluate quotations from suppliers, subcontractors, and technology partners to ensure competitive pricing
  • Analyze tender requirements, specifications, and commercial risks to develop compliant and competitive proposals
  • Prepare and submit tenders, requests for quotations (RFQs), and proposals aligned with project objectives
  • Collaborate with sales and presales teams to provide accurate project costing and commercial insights

Good negotiation and analytical skills.

Strong proficiency in Microsoft Excel

title: Commercial Partnerships Manager (Bangkok Based)
description:
Here at AppsFlyer, it’s all about the people; each and every one of us has our own specialty, a unique flavor that we bring to the table. We are all driven individuals whose interests are just as diverse as we are. You could say we’re #PeopleObsessed. When we say obsession, we mean we will do everything to make you feel those AF vibes; whether it’s company breakfasts, happy hours, and parties, our connection to each other is always a core focus.

Few markets in the world demand the level of commercial sophistication, cultural fluency, and strategic agility that Korea and Japan do. As the Commercial Partnership Manager, you will manage AppsFlyer's partner growth across Korea and Japan, shaping an ecosystem at the heart of our Asia-Pacific ambitions.

This is a role is based in Bangkok, Thailand for someone who thrives on ownership. You will manage relationships from first contact to signed agreements, co-build go-to-market plans with key partners, and be the person who makes things happen in one of our most important global markets.

What you'll do:

Commercial Growth and Revenue

  • Drive partner-led revenue by identifying, developing, and closing high-value commercial partnerships across the Korea and Japan mobile ecosystem
  • Own partner-driven pipeline, including new partner acquisition, activation, and retention initiatives
  • Develop and execute joint business plans with key partners to unlock new revenue streams
  • Negotiate and close commercial agreements and partnership contracts
  • Execute go-to-market strategies for new products and market opportunities within Korea and Japan

Partnership Development and Ecosystem Expansion

  • Build and grow relationships with strategic partners — including DSPs, media networks, agencies, OEMs, and technology platforms active in Korea and Japan.
  • Identify emerging trends, distribution channels, and niche partnership opportunities specific to the Korea and Japan markets
  • Represent AppsFlyer at industry events, conferences, and partner summits across the region
  • Drive co-marketing initiatives, cross-promotions, and strategic alliances

Cross-functional Execution and Alignment

  • Work closely with Sales, Marketing, Product, and Legal teams to align partnership strategies with broader business priorities
  • Lead partner integration discussions and support product adoption across the Korea and Japan ecosystem
  • Provide ongoing partner enablement, training, and performance reviews
  • Maintain clear and consistent reporting on pipeline, partner health, and growth metrics

Market Intelligence and Continuous Improvement

  • Translate Korea and Japan market dynamics, partner feedback, and competitive intelligence into actionable internal recommendations
  • Leverage AI-powered analytics and data-driven insights to prioritize partnership efforts, spot emerging opportunities, and continuously optimize commercial outcomes across the Korea and Japan ecosystem.
  • Ensure compliance with local regulations and maintain strong commercial discipline.

Who you are:

  • 5+ years in partnerships, business development, or commercial sales within mobile AdTech, SaaS, or digital advertising
  • Proven revenue growth through partnerships and complex deal execution
  • Deep knowledge of the Japan & Korea mobile ecosystem - platforms, Ad tech players, and local business culture
  • Korean and Japanese fluency (written and spoken) and strong English proficiency - both required
  • Solid grasp of Korea and Japan markets - App Ecosystem, SDK data practices
  • Daily AI user - you embed AI into research, prioritization, and decision-making as a matter of habit, not curiosity
  • Entrepreneurial, self-directed, and able to present complex ideas simply to any audience

Preferred Requirements

  • Direct experience managing MMP, DSP, Ad Network, or agency partnerships in the Korea and Japan market
  • Experience with SaaS product partnerships or mobile analytics platforms
  • Strong existing network within the Korea and Japan mobile advertising or marketing technology ecosystem
  • Being introduced by an AppsFlyer team member

Requisition ID: 2862

AppsFlyer is a global company with 20 offices worldwide. Through mental health programs like Be Well, the Global Employee Exchange Program, and fitness programs, we empower our people to thrive physically, mentally, and professionally.

Here, titles don’t define us—ideas do. You’ll thrive in a culture where everyone’s input shapes the future.

title: ABM & Lead Gen Manager (Bangkok-based, relocation provided)
description:
About Agoda

At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.

Today, we are part of Booking Holdings [NASDAQ: BKNG], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide.

No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.

About the role
A build role that owns the entire acquisition funnel for the named universe - from top-of-funnel demand generation to the deepest 1:1 account plays - weighted toward ABM depth. You run one tiered account-based motion: 1:1 & 1:few (ABM) where the value is, and a capped 1:many (Lead Gen) engine over the tail of the same named list. The art of the role is allocating finite team capacity across tiers - protecting 1:1 depth (the deep committee deals fund the whole program) while running an efficient 1:many engine. Player-coach: with a two-person team you personally carry the top 3–5 marquee accounts. Expect roughly 60% leadership / 40% own book; the discipline is protecting the leadership half when your own accounts heat up.

What you will do
  • Own the target universe and the full funnel: tier the named list with BD; decide 1:1, 1:few, or 1:many treatment; set goals, capacity allocation across tiers (~70% toward ABM), and operating rhythm.
  • Run a capped 1:many Lead Gen engine over the tail - templated, archetype-segmented campaigns built with the shared Marketing Ops Specialist, routed cleanly to BD - deliberately bounded so it cannot crowd out the deep work.
  • Carry the marquee accounts yourself (player-coach); co-own named accounts with BD; guide committee mapping; own the multi-product narrative and land-and-expand path.
  • Direct bespoke content and exec engagement; build the playbook; define and own account-level and funnel measurement with MarOps/RevOps; lead and grow the team; sell the program internally.
What you will need (required)
  • 6+ years in B2B marketing and/or sales, with 3+ years in ABM or named-account field marketing.
  • Full-funnel range - you can run both deep 1:1 ABM and scaled 1:many demand generation against a named list, with the judgment to allocate finite capacity (purely high-volume demand gen with no account depth is not the profile).
  • Player-coach appetite; demonstrated BD partnership; buying-committee fluency; multi-product selling; account + funnel measurement literacy; CRM/MAP fluency; people leadership; comfort building from scratch.
Nice to have
  • Travel/fintech/loyalty/marketplace or partnership-led experience; ABM-platform exposure; self-serve funnels; ITSMA/ABM certification; new-function or post-merger experience.
Why 70/30 (best-practice rationale)
At the leadership level, 70/30 keeps the function’s identity anchored in depth: the committee deals carry the revenue and are the fragile, hard-to-rebuild capability, while the scaled engine is a controlled feeder rather than a competing P&L. Capping Lead Gen at ~30% of team capacity lets one Marketing Ops Specialist and a bounded automation motion serve the tail without pulling strategists off marquee accounts. Recommended default when the strategic named list is the primary prize.

How we will measure success
Primary (70%): committee engagement depth, joint account plans adopted, exec milestones, pipeline influenced, multi-product expansion, and deal velocity on strategic accounts. Secondary (30%): qualified pipeline and meetings from the capped 1:many tier, funnel conversion, and graduation of warming tail accounts. Plus team growth and playbook quality.

title: Bauingenieur:in Stationsumbauten
description:
Für die BEW Berliner Energie und Wärme GmbH suchen wir dich zum nächstmöglichen Zeitpunkt als Bauingenieur:in Stationsumbauten für den Bereich Hausstationsbau am Standort Berlin für das Berliner Fernwärmenetz in unbefristeter Anstellung.

Deine Aufgaben:

  • Du gibst Auskunft über Möglichkeiten der Veränderung der Haus- und Übergabestation
  • Du planst die Veränderungen von Haus- und Übergabestationen (Vor-Ort Begehungen und Planung)
  • Du erstellst Kostenschätzungen für die Veränderungen/ den Umbau der Station
  • Du bist für die Absprache mit dem Kunden oder Planungsunternehmen des Kunden zu der Umgestaltung der Anlagenteile zuständig
  • Du stimmst Dich projektbeteiligten Personen / Fachbereichen ab
  • Du verantwortest die Beauftragung von ausführenden Firmen aus dem Jahreskontrakt (Mittelabruf)
  • Du übernimmst die Planung der Umbauphase von der Außerbetriebnahme bis zur Wiederinbetriebnahme der Haus- und Übergabestation
  • Du bist für die Überwachung und Abnahme der erbrachten Bauleistungen verantwortlich
  • Du bist für die Aufmaß- und Abrechnungsprüfung​ zuständig
  • Du überprüfst und übergibst die Dokumentation​

Dein Profil:

  • Du hast ein abgeschlossenes Fachhochschul-/Hochschulstudium in Ingenieurswissenschaften oder einer vergleichbaren Fachrichtung ("Muss")
  • Du hast erste Kenntnisse in der Fernwärmeversorgung
  • Du konntest bereits erste Erfahrungen im genannten Aufgabengebiet sammeln
  • Du verfügst über eine sehr gute Kommunikations- und Teamfähigkeit und arbeitest gerne selbstständig und eigeninitiativ
  • Du verfügst über ein gutes Durchsetzungsvermögen
  • Du hast ein ausgeprägtes analytisches und strukturiertes Denkvermögen
  • Du besitzt fließende Deutschkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift ("Muss")

Du erfüllst ungefähr 70 Prozent der Anforderungen? Dann bewirb Dich!

Benefits:

  • Flexible Gestaltung des Arbeitsalltags (37-Stunden-Woche, Teilzeitmöglichkeiten, flexible Arbeitszeiten, Führen von Zeitkonten, Home-Office-Regelung)
  • 30 Tage Urlaub, arbeitsfreie Tage am 24.12. und 31.12. sowie Freistellungsmöglichkeiten
  • Förderung der individuellen Entwicklung, u.a. durch kostenfreie Trainings und Unterstützung bei berufsbegleitender Weiterqualifizierung
  • 13 Monatsgehälter für tariflich Angestellte und zusätzliche Vergütungsbestandteile
  • Betriebliche Altersversorgung
  • ÖPNV-Firmenticket bzw. Deutschlandticket (50% Arbeitgeberzuschuss) und Jobrad-Angebot
  • Mitarbeiterstromtarif nach 12 Monaten Betriebszugehörigkeit
  • Diverse Angebote zum Thema Gesundheit, u.a. Urban Sports Club Mitgliedschaft und PME-Familienservice

Du möchtest alle unsere Benefits kennenlernen? Dann sprich uns darauf an, was wir zu bieten haben!

Deine Bewerbung:

Wir freuen uns auf Deine Bewerbung in deutscher Sprache – bitte sende uns Deine vollständigen Bewerbungsunterlagen im PDF-Format, einschließlich eines lückenlosen Lebenslaufs, bis spätestens zum 21.08.2026.

Für weitere Informationen zu dieser Position kannst Du dich an die Managerin Sabrina Poweleit unter der Nummer +49 30 587585067 wenden. Fragen zum Bewerbungsprozess beantwortet dir Marco Schürer unter der Telefonnummer +49 30 374396765.

Du hast Interesse an diesem Angebot und möchtest gemeinsam mit uns die Berliner Wärmewende gestalten? Dann freuen wir uns auf deine Bewerbung!

Hinweise

Wir sind davon überzeugt, dass Vielfalt dazu beiträgt, unser Unternehmen leistungsfähiger und attraktiver zu machen. Bewerbungen zum Beispiel von Personen jeglichen Alters, geschlechtlicher Identität, sexueller Orientierung, ethnisch-kulturellen Hintergrunds sind herzlich willkommen. Schwerbehinderte Menschen werden bei gleicher fachlicher Eignung besonders berücksichtigt.

Die Sicherheit der BEW Berliner Energie und Wärme GmbH und ihrer Beschäftigten ist von grundlegender Bedeutung. Aus diesem Grund ist ein Pre-Employment Screening Teil des Rekrutierungsprozesses. Der Umfang der Überprüfung variiert je nach Funktion und Einsatzbereich. Das Screening wird von einem Drittanbieter, DISA, durchgeführt.

title: Steuerberater (m/w/d) in Emskirchen, auf Wunsch mit Partnerperspektive, gesucht - mindestens 90.000€
description:
TaxTalente ist die Nr. 1 Job-Matching Plattform für Jobsuchende in der Steuerberatung.

Sie suchen eine positive berufliche Veränderung? Sie möchten den nächsten Schritt in Ihrer Karriere gehen und streben möglicherweise sogar eine Partnerschaft in einer zukunftsorientierten Kanzlei an? Sie möchten endlich wieder in einem positiven Arbeitsumfeld arbeiten, in dem Sie finanziell und persönlich wertgeschätzt werden? Sie suchen nach Tätigkeiten, die Sie auch wirklich weiterbringen?

Sofern Sie sich in mindestens einem der genannten Punkte wiederfinden, sollten Sie sich bei uns melden. Wir haben die attraktivsten Arbeitgeber der Steuerberatungsbranche in unserem Netzwerk und bringen zusammen, was zusammengehört. Grenzenlose Entwicklungschancen mit Partnermöglichkeiten, vielschichtige Tätigkeitsbereiche, Gehälter wie in der Industrie und vieles mehr – melden Sie sich bei uns und wir unterstützen Sie auf Ihrem weiteren Karriereweg!

Derzeit suchen wir nach einem Steuerberater (m/w/d) für eine unserer Partner-Kanzleien in Emskirchen

Bei Rückfragen kannst du dich gerne jederzeit (auch nach deinem Feierabend) direkt telefonisch an Herrn Becker-Koch über folgende Nummer wenden: 015901431130

Aufgaben

Wir bringen zusammen, was zusammengehört. Dabei spielt das passende Tätigkeitsprofil natürlich eine entscheidende Rolle. Bei unserer Partnerkanzlei können Sie sich Ihren Aufgabenbereich auf Basis Ihrer persönlichen Stärken und Schwächen selbst zusammenstellen.

  • Erstellung und Review von Jahresabschlüssen
  • Erstellung von Steuererklärungen für Personen- und Kapitalgesellschaften
  • Steuerliche Sonderberatungsprojekte auf Basis individueller QualifikationenB. in den Bereichen der Erbschaftsteuer oder des Umwandlungssteuerrechts
  • Begleitung von Betriebsprüfungen
  • Teamleitung und Personalverantwortung (optional)
  • Weitere individuell wählbare Tätigkeitsbereiche, die Ihnen Freude bringen

Qualifikation

Am Ende sollte es für beide Seiten passen. Deshalb wäre es gut, wenn Sie sich in den folgenden Punkten wiederfinden.

  • Kommunikative Art und Freude am Austausch mit Mandanten
  • Sorgfältige, effiziente und gewissenhafte Arbeitsweise
  • Offen für eine digitale Arbeitsweise
  • Führungsverständnis und Verantwortungsbewusstsein gegenüber Mitarbeitern (optional)
  • Ein erfolgreich abgeschlossenes Steuerberaterexamen
  • Leidenschaft für steuerliche Themen

Benefits

Sie haben genug von 0815 Benefits, von denen Sie nicht wirklich profitieren? Dann sollten Sie einen Blick auf die nachfolgenden Benefits werfen.

  • Außerordentliche Vergütung von 90.000 € bis 130.000 € / Jahr, auf Wunsch auch Partnerperspektive
  • Flexible Gestaltung der Arbeitszeiten sowie die Option auf Home-Office
  • Nettolohnoptimierung mit monatlichen 50,00€ Sachbezugsgutscheinen
  • Umfangreiche Unterstützung bei Weiterbildungsmaßnahmen wie z.B. Fachberater Qualifikationen
  • Modernste Ausstattung mit digitalen Prozessen
  • Starker Teamzusammenhalt und regelmäßige Teamevents

Schnell, unkompliziert und effizient Ihren Traumjob finden – ein Versprechen an Sie, dass wir aufgrund unseres selektiven, breit gefächerten und deutschlandweiten Kanzleinetzwerks halten werden. lhre Vorteile mit uns auf einen Blick:

  • Sie führen keine unsinnigen Bewerbungsgespräche mehr, bei denen Sie während des Bewerbungsprozesses merken, dass es (bspw. wegen des Gehalts) sowieso nicht passt - wir klären vor Ihrem Bewerbungsgespräch all Ihre mit uns besprochenen Kriterien mit der Kanzlei ab.
  • Wir führen Ihre Gehaltsverhandlungen und kennen die Gehaltsstrukturen der Branche dabei bestens.
  • 100% Anonymität – solange Sie uns nicht das „Go“ geben und einem Kennenlernen mit Ihrem neuen potentiellen Arbeitgeber zustimmen, erfährt niemand von Ihrem Namen oder Ihren bisherigen Arbeitgebern – Ihre Ihnen wichtigen Kriterien können wir auch zunächst anonym mit unseren Partnerkanzleien klären.
  • Attraktive Kanzleien – die Kanzleien in unserem breit gefächerten Kanzleinetzwerk sind selektiv ausgewählt und heben sich klar von “normalen” Kanzleien ab (z.B. hinsichtlich der Vergütung, Benefits, Hierarchien, Digitalisierungsgrad, Ausstattung etc.).
  • Und das Beste: Unser gesamter Service ist unverbindlich und völlig kostenfrei für Sie.

title: IT Helpdesk Support Technician
description:
Zeeco fosters a robust work environment where employees, from engineering teams to support groups, benefit from a strong culture, trained leadership, and opportunities for growth. Zeeco collaborates with the biggest names in the industry, enabling individuals to broaden their skills alongside teams of subject matter experts.

Zeeco is a global leader in combustion and environmental solutions, renowned for our expertise in designing, engineering, and manufacturing advanced burners, incinerators, and environmental control systems. Serving a wide array of industries such as oil and gas, petrochemicals, and power generation, we deliver innovative technologies that enhance operational efficiency, safety, and environmental compliance.

We have an exciting new opportunity based in our offices near Stamford, for a proactive and customer-focused IT Desktop Support Technician to deliver first-line IT support across the business. This role is responsible for ensuring employees have reliable access to systems, applications, hardware, and services while providing timely resolution of technical issues both remotely and in person.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Provide first-line technical support for hardware, software, network, and Microsoft 365 issues.
  • Troubleshoot, diagnose, and resolve incidents via phone, email, ticketing systems, MS Teams, and face-to-face support.
  • Install, configure, and maintain desktops, laptops, mobile devices, printers, and peripherals.
  • Manage user accounts, access permissions, and password administration.
  • Support IT onboarding and offboarding processes for new starters and leavers.
  • Maintain accurate documentation of support requests and resolutions.
  • Escalate complex issues where required and work with senior IT staff or external vendors to ensure successful resolution.
  • Follow IT policies, security standards, and best practices to maintain a secure and reliable technology environment.

Skills and experience required:

  • Experience providing first- and/or second-line IT support in a business environment.
  • Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving skills with a proactive approach.
  • Good knowledge of Windows 10/11, Microsoft 365, Active Directory, and IT service management systems.
  • Understanding of networking fundamentals including TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, VPNs, routers, switches, and wireless technologies.
  • Excellent communication skills and the ability to explain technical concepts to non-technical users.
  • Customer-focused, organised, and able to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.
  • Professional, adaptable, and committed to delivering excellent service.

Why join Zeeco?

At Zeeco, we value our employees and are committed to offering a comprehensive benefits package to support your well-being and professional growth, see below some of the great things we offer:

  • BUPA, Medicash, Employee Assistance Program to support your wellbeing.
  • 12% Employer contribution to company pension scheme to help you plan confidently for the future.
  • 27 days holiday (plus bank holidays)so you can recharge and maintain a healthy work–life balance.
  • Life insurance for added peace of mind.
  • Professional growth opportunities, including training, development, and the chance to work alongside world class engineering teams.
  • A supportive, safety driven culture where your expertise is valued and your voice matters.
  • Regular social events to have fun, and enjoy team camaraderie and to promote and protect our culture.
Working at Zeeco means being part of a people-centric culture and environment built on mutual respect, personal encouragement, professional integrity, and limitless opportunity. Join Zeeco and embark on a fulfilling journey where innovation, collaboration, and personal and professional growth converge.

title: Subsidieadviseur | Amsterdam
description:
32 - 36 uur | Amsterdam | Tot €6.171,-

Bouw als Subsidieadviseur mee aan de toekomst van de zorg in Amsterdam door subsidiekansen te verbinden aan de ambities van Amsta. Jij ziet kansen, brengt mensen samen en maakt financiering mogelijk voor projecten die bijdragen aan betere zorg en de ontwikkeling van collega's. Zo geef je richting aan vernieuwing binnen onze organisatie.

Jouw rol als Amstadammer

Als Subsidieadviseur ondersteun je Amsta bij het verwerven, beheren en verantwoorden van subsidies die bijdragen aan de koers van Amsta. Je speelt een belangrijke rol in het realiseren van strategische ambities op het gebied van zorg, innovatie en de ontwikkeling van collega's. Daarbij beweeg je je moeiteloos tussen strategie en uitvoering. Je kijkt actief naar buiten om kansen te signaleren, weet mensen binnen de organisatie te verbinden en durft met lef nieuwe mogelijkheden onder de aandacht te brengen. Vanuit jouw expertise denk je mee over de strategische inzet van subsidies en draag je bij aan de verdere ontwikkeling van het subsidiebeleid binnen Amsta. Dit doe jij door:

  • Relevante subsidiekansen te signaleren en deze te vertalen naar mogelijkheden voor de ontwikkeling van collega's, innovatie en strategische projecten binnen Amsta.

  • Collega's en managers te informeren en adviseren over subsidieregelingen, voorwaarden en financieringsmogelijkheden.

  • Subsidieaanvragen te schrijven, Inhoudelijke en financiële rapportages te coördineren, subsidievoorwaarden te bewaken en daarmee zorg te dragen voor een juiste subsidieverantwoording.

  • De voortgang van subsidieprojecten en bijbehorende deadlines te monitoren.

  • Contact te onderhouden met subsidieverstrekkers, samenwerkingspartners en andere externe stakeholders.

  • Strategische subsidieoverleggen te begeleiden en relaties te onderhouden met subsidieverstrekkers en samenwerkingspartners.

Hier gebeurt het

Als Subsidieadviseur werk je voor de hele organisatie. Van zorgteams en programmamanagers tot HR, Leren & Ontwikkelen, Strategische Propositie en Finance, met deze collega’s werk je intensief samen. Collega's weten jou te vinden met vragen over subsidiemogelijkheden, voorwaarden en lopende aanvragen. Je bent de vraagbaak én het gezicht van subsidies binnen Amsta.

Je werkt vanuit onze locaties Jan Bonga en Dr. Sarphatihuis in Amsterdam. De ene dag denk je mee over de financiering van een innovatief project. De andere dag bespreek je een subsidieverantwoording met collega's of onderzoek je nieuwe subsidiemogelijkheden. Daarnaast is hybride werken mogelijk.

Je maakt onderdeel uit van de afdeling Finance en rapporteert aan de Manager Financiën.

Daarom pas jij bij Amsta

Je houdt overzicht en bewaart de voortgang, ook wanneer deadlines dichterbij komen. Je beweegt moeiteloos tussen strategie en uitvoering en weet mensen met verschillende belangen te verbinden. Daarnaast heb je:

  • Hbo werk- en denkniveau.

  • Ervaring met het adviseren, aanvragen, coördineren of verantwoorden van subsidies.

  • Ervaring met het coördineren van projecten of organisatiebrede trajecten.

  • Financieel en analytisch inzicht.

  • Het vermogen om strategische doelen te vertalen naar concrete resultaten.

Zo zorgen wij voor jou

Voor Amsta zijn jullie – Amstadammers – ons grootste goed. Jij zorgt met aandacht voor anderen, wij zorgen dat jij dit met plezier doet. Bij Amsta bieden wij jou een fijne werkplek waar jij goed kan werken én gezond blijft. Dat merk je in alles wat we je bieden:

  • Een salaris volgens FWG 60 van de cao VVT, tot €6.171,- bruto per maand op basis van 36 uur.

  • Een jaarcontract voor 32-36 uur per week. Zijn we allebei enthousiast, dan zetten we samen de stap naar een vast contract.

  • 8% vakantiegeld en 8,33% eindejaarsuitkering.

  • Reiskostenvergoeding van € 0,21 netto per km, max. 40 km enkele reis.

  • Uitstekende pensioenregeling bij PFZW.

  • Een combinatie van werken op locatie en thuiswerken.

  • Veel ruimte voor eigen initiatief en professionele groei.

  • Een gevarieerd en compleet aanbod om lichamelijk en mentaal gezond te blijven via het Zorg voor jou-platform. Van online groepssessies mindfulness, masterclass financieel welzijn tot psychische hulp van OpenUp.

  • Profiteer van een fietsplan, korting op je zorgverzekering, sportschoolabonnement, Amsta Pas met korting voor uitjes en (online) aankopen én een Preventief Medisch Onderzoek voor een volledige check-up.

  • Een warme, liefdevolle organisatie waar je jezelf kunt zijn en waarin iedereen telt.

Amsta: zorgen op zijn Amsterdams

Amsta is een Amsterdamse zorginstelling, met locaties door de hele stad. We ondersteunen en helpen Amsterdammers met complexe zorgvragen. Zoals ouderen en mensen met een verstandelijke beperking. Dat doen we liefdevol en met oprechte aandacht voor wat elke bewoner of cliënt nodig heeft. We werken hierin nauw samen met familie, naasten en vrijwilligers.

Als Amstadammer in de ondersteunende diensten ben je onmisbaar voor goede zorg. Achter de schermen werk je aan slimme oplossingen, efficiënte processen en een sterke organisatie. Zo zorg je ervoor dat onze collega’s in de zorg hun werk zo goed mogelijk kunnen doen. Je krijgt ruimte om te leren en met jouw expertise impact te maken op de kwaliteit van zorg.

Bij Amsta kan iedereen zichzelf zijn. Cliënten en bewoners, maar ook jíj als Amstadammer. Je achtergrond, karakter, lef en creativiteit doen ertoe. We geloven in jouw warme, persoonlijke en professionele aanpak.

Enthousiast?

Laat het ons weten! We maken graag tijd om je vragen te beantwoorden. Voor inhoudelijke vragen kun je contact opnemen met Nanda Pit-Heeres via n.heeres@amsta.nl.

Het aanleveren van een Verklaring Omtrent Gedrag (VOG) en het opvragen van een referentie zijn onderdeel van de selectieprocedure.

Met deze vacature willen wij zelf onze nieuwe collega werven. Acquisitie door werving- en selectie-, detachering- of uitzendbureaus wordt daarom niet op prijs gesteld.

title: Accounts Assistant (Maternity Cover)
description:
Make your mark as a Accounts Assistant at Boskalis! The Accounts Assistant supports with maintaining accurate financial records, transactions and reports for companies within the UK Group. This involves tasks related to accounts receivable, accounts payable, invoicing and general bookkeeping.

The role is key in ensuring financial records are accurate, up-to-date, and compliant with regulatory requirements, whilst also providing day-to-day support within the finance team and wider business, helping to ensure queries are resolved efficiently and processes run smoothly.

Main Tasks:

  • Oversee cashbook preparations and cashbook posting.
  • Process and post petty cash and vessel cash returns.
  • Administration of the prepaid expense cards, including issuing new cards, arranging top ups and processing and posting card expense returns.
  • Reconcile cash advance ledger accounts.
  • Maintain sales ledger and prepare the debtors reports for chasing of overdue invoices.
  • Other sales and purchase ledger support tasks as required.
  • Prepare and process intercompany recharges.
  • Balance sheet reconciliations, including intercompany recharges, prepayments, other debtors and bank & cash.
  • Maintain fixed asset register and oversee depreciation posting.
  • Ad hoc support to Finance Manager and Project Controllers where required.
  • Other accounting and administrative tasks as required.

Required Knowledge & Experience:

  • Minimum 2+ years’ experience in a finance or accounting environment.
  • AAT or similar qualifications desirable, or qualified by experience
  • Good knowledge of general accounting principles and procedures
  • Experience with cashbook postings and expense processing
  • Experience with bank and ledger reconciliations and control activities
  • Basic knowledge of purchase ledger related taxes (VAT, CIS etc.)
  • Good IT skills (including Excel) and experience using accounting or ERP systems
  • Proficient in data entry and data management, with a high level of accuracy.
  • Confident dealing with colleagues across a variety of company locations

What you can expect:

  • A dynamic environment: A job where you can make an impact as part of a diverse, international team of experts.
  • Rewarding conditions: As well as offering a competitive salary we give industry leading benefits, including 25 days holiday plus bank holidays (based on a full-time contract), a generous pension package, with the opportunity to add flexible benefits, free parking and beverages. Conveniently located office with a friendly, supportive team.
  • Career development: Plenty of opportunities to realise your full potential with training and development through our Boskalis Academy

Extra Information:

  • Your team: Reporting to the Finance Manager, you will work as a Accounts Assistant, in the Finance Business Unit.
  • Where you will work: You will be working predominantly at Westminster House in Fareham, Hampshire, UK. Whilst the role is based in Fareham, we offer up to 2 days a week hybrid working.
  • Full/part-time job: The position of Accounts Assistant is a full-time job - 37.5 hours a week.
  • Permanent/Fixed Term: This is a 1 year fixed term position.
  • Next steps: Apply easily by completing the online application form. Interviews are held online and in the office. Once it’s clear we’re a good match, we’ll make you an offer – and look forward to welcoming you to the company.

Interested?

Please apply by filling in your details and by uploading your motivation letter and CV on our careers site.

We will be reviewing applications and conducting interviews on a rolling basis, so we encourage you to apply early. Please note that the position may be closed as soon as a suitable candidate is found.

Disclaimer for recruitment and selection agencies
We don’t accept any unsolicited applications or CVs from recruitment and selection agencies.

title: AI Co-Founder / CTO (100 % remote) (m/f/d)
description:
We are looking to hire ambitious entrepreneurs to start and scale their own startups.

We are serial entrepreneurs, for example Paul Müller (founder Adjust, €1.2B exit) and Petter Made (founder SumUp, €8B) who are eager to support outlier personalities and serial entrepreneurs to build €1B+ companies.

Our offer:

  • A salary while you build your startup as you will directly be employed by us. Alternatively, you can opt for up to €500k in funding.

  • 1:1 sparring with unicorn founders on a weekly basis

  • Community: Access to the top 0.1% of founders, peers and investors

  • Team building: Hiring top notch talent supported through our network (over 50,000 professionals)

  • Distribution: Support in reaching product-market-fit and building up a sales force / marketing machine

  • Funding support for securing a multi-million euro funding round within 12 months (on average, EWOR Fellows raise > €2M after our Grand Pitch)

One of our fellows set a record for Europe’s largest pre-seed round by a first-time founder, securing a €12M pre-seed investment.

Tasks

  • You will own, build, and run your startup in fields such as AI

  • You will embark on an extensive personal development journey crafted by unicorn founders and follow a fully customised programme enhancing your goal, time, and energy management

  • You will receive support in hiring through our network to over 50,000 professionals and advice as well as best practices from serial entrepreneurs

  • You will receive intensive coaching to make your startup ready to raise millions in funding

  • You will iterate your product with us until having reached product-market-fit and receive support in building up a sales force or creating a marketing engine respectively

  • You are based in Europe or the Americas or open to relocate

  • You are willing to take full responsibility for your own startup and scale it to €100M+ in revenues

  • You have excellent communication skills in the English language

title: Engineering Manager
description:
Galileo is a fast-growing renewable energy IPP, investor and operator, currently in the very dynamic start-up phase. Since our foundation in 2020, we have secured a pipeline of over 16 GW of solar PV, onshore wind, offshore wind and storage projects across 10 markets in Europe.

We are looking for an Engineering Manager to lead the company’s engineering team across the development and delivery of utility-scale renewable energy projects. This person will be based in our office in Milan (with the possibility of hybrid remote working) and report to the EPC Director.


What you’ll do

  • Act as the EPC Director’s key technical partner, supporting strategic and operational decisions across the project portfolio.
  • Oversee engineering activities throughout the full project lifecycle, from early-stage development and feasibility through procurement, construction, commissioning and operations.
  • Review and approve technical studies, layouts, designs, energy-yield assessments and risk analyses, ensuring quality, consistency and compliance with applicable standards.
  • Play a central role in site engineering activities for utility-scale renewable energy projects, supporting both pre-construction and construction phases, ensuring that technical design, site constraints and constructability requirements are properly integrated into project execution.
  • Work closely with Development, Procurement, Construction, Investment, Legal and Asset Management teams to support project delivery, financing and divestment.
  • Lead the technical aspects of tenders, bid evaluations, equipment selection and support the negotiations with EPC contractors, consultants and suppliers.
  • Manage external technical advisors and monitor market, regulatory and technology developments to identify risks and improvement opportunities.
  • Lead, manage and develop the engineering team, defining priorities, responsibilities, technical standards and ways of working.

#LI-Hybrid​

Requirements

What you’ll need


  • Bachelor's or Master’s degree in Engineering (Electrical Engineering will be considered a plus).
  • At least 8 years of experience in renewable energy engineering and project delivery, with strong exposure to utility-scale solar PV.
  • Strong knowledge of the renewable energy project lifecycle, including development, design, procurement, construction and commissioning.
  • Experience with technical due diligence, tender processes, contractor selection and EPC or equipment supply negotiations.
  • Strong leadership, analytical and communication skills, with the ability to combine technical detail with commercial and strategic thinking.
  • Full professional proficiency in English; Italian or other European languages will be considered an advantage.


Benefits

What we offer:

  • Competitive compensation: 85,000 – 95,000 € gross annual total compensation package, composed of fixed gross annual salary (RAL) and annual performance bonus, based on experience, skills and role responsibilities.
  • Collective agreement: Quadro CCNL Commercio.
  • Comprehensive healthcare screening and healthcare insurance.
  • Flexibility: a hybrid remote-working policy designed for autonomy and outcomes — plus a strong Diversity & Inclusion focus to support different needs and life situations.
  • Growth: continuous learning & development opportunities and a supportive environment that fosters initiative and ownership.
  • Front-row seat to the energy transition: you’ll be at the forefront of Galileo's developments, with the chance to influence decisions and outcomes.
  • International environment: you’ll collaborate with colleagues across Europe and thrive in an informal culture that values collaboration, ownership, and innovation.


Our commitment to diversity and inclusion: Galileo is a new and flexible employer, committed to providing equal opportunities, an inclusive work environment, and fairness for all. We encourage everyone who applies to emphasize what their passion, skills and mindset can bring to our company. In return we commit to evaluating your application fairly and objectively. This is the case no matter your race, gender identity, sexuality, age, family or civil status, disability, religion, or ethnicity.

title: Project Coordinator for Shared Support Team, JR522
description:
ELEKS Project Management Office is looking for a Project Coordinator in Poland.
ABOUT PROJECT
In ELEKS Support team, we aim to deliver exceptional managed services that extend beyond traditional break-and-fix support. We focus on fostering partnerships and being proactive in our approach to help our clients grow from startups to enterprises. Our goal is to build strong relationships with our clients by combining reliable support with developmental practices that enhance system reliability and adapt functionality to meet their evolving business needs.
This role will require working on several projects simultaneously.

REQUIREMENTS

  • 1+ year of experience in IT project management
  • Prior experience with support environments and/or ITIL framework is a strong advantage
  • Good understanding of IT system and project life-cycles in general
  • Knowledge of theoretical or practical aspects of Waterfall/Agile Project Management as well as IT Service Management.
  • Understanding of project financial area – project profitability, revenue, margins, bill rates, and resources utilization
  • Understanding of offshore and remote teams management.
  • Knowledge of project management tools: JIRA Service Management, MS Project, MS Excel
  • Strong planning, organization, and decision-making skills
  • Ability to multitask, prioritize, and work under pressure
  • Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills
  • Advanced English

    • RESPONSIBILITIES

  • Direct and manage operations and feature development from initiation to closure within budget, schedule, and resource limits
  • Organize the team to help restore normal production operations in case of failure, collaborate with stakeholders to ensure timely resolution and status updates
  • Understand and communicate client business needs to project team
  • Negotiate, define, communicate and manage the scope of the project
  • Develop, maintain and effectively execute project plan throughout the project life. Ensure timely revision of project plan to meet changing needs and requirements
  • Forecast, track and manage budgets, ensure timely invoicing
  • Define, communicate, implement and monitor quality standards on all project deliverables
  • Manage day-to-day operational aspects of the service operations
  • Plan and manage internal and external project communications, ensuring effective exchange of project information and deliverables
  • Continually seek opportunities to increase customer satisfaction and deepen customer relationships
  • Identify, analyze, prioritize, mitigate and communicate project risks
  • Identify project resources necessary and partner with other company managers to acquire resources
  • Build and nurture an effective and collaborative project team. Promote effective individual and team performance
  • Mentor team members and support their professional growth

    • WHAT YOU WILL GET WITH ELEKS

  • Close cooperation with a customer
  • Challenging tasks
  • Competence development
  • Team of professionals
  • Dynamic environment with low level of bureaucracy
    • ABOUT ELEKS

    ELEKS is a custom software development company. We deliver value to our clients, thanks to our expertise and experience gained from working as a software innovation partner since 1991.

    Our 2000+ professionals located in the Delivery Centers across Eastern Europe and sales offices in Europe and North America, provide our clients with a full range of software engineering services. These include product development, QA, R&D, design, technology consulting and dedicated teams.

title: Secondary School Biology Tutor
description:
Responsibilities

· Plan and deliver engaging Biology lessons aligned with Singapore MOE secondary syllabus.

· Assess students’ learning needs and customise lesson plans to maximise learning outcomes.

· Teach scientific concepts in Biology, and/or lower-secondary Science according to the tutor’s expertise.

· Develop students’ understanding of scientific inquiry, experimental methods, data analysis, and practical applications.

· Guide students in answering structured, application-based, and calculation questions accurately.

· Mark assignments, monitor student progress, and provide timely, constructive feedback.

· Prepare students for school assessments, practical assessments, and national examinations.

· Develop students’ curiosity, critical thinking, scientific reasoning, and problem-solving skills.

· Create a positive, engaging, and disciplined learning environment.

· Communicate professionally with parents regarding students’ academic progress.

· Develop teaching resources, lesson materials, and practical learning activities.

· Uphold ATOP Academy’s teaching standards, values, and commitment to academic excellence.

Requirements

· GCE A-Level, Diploma, Degree, or equivalent qualification in Education, Science, Engineering, or a related field.

· Good command of spoken and written English.

· Strong subject knowledge in Biology, and/or lower-secondary Science.

· Familiarity with Singapore MOE Secondary Science syllabus and assessment requirements.

· Passion for teaching and supporting secondary school students.

· Strong communication, interpersonal, and classroom management skills.

· Responsible, patient, enthusiastic, and committed to student success.

· Prior teaching or tutoring experience is an advantage but not required.

Interested applicants are invited to submit their resume. Thank you.

title: Steuerberater (m/w/d) in Weitersburg, auf Wunsch mit Partnerperspektive, gesucht - mindestens 90.000€
description:
TaxTalente ist die Nr. 1 Job-Matching Plattform für Jobsuchende in der Steuerberatung.

Sie suchen eine positive berufliche Veränderung? Sie möchten den nächsten Schritt in Ihrer Karriere gehen und streben möglicherweise sogar eine Partnerschaft in einer zukunftsorientierten Kanzlei an? Sie möchten endlich wieder in einem positiven Arbeitsumfeld arbeiten, in dem Sie finanziell und persönlich wertgeschätzt werden? Sie suchen nach Tätigkeiten, die Sie auch wirklich weiterbringen?

Sofern Sie sich in mindestens einem der genannten Punkte wiederfinden, sollten Sie sich bei uns melden. Wir haben die attraktivsten Arbeitgeber der Steuerberatungsbranche in unserem Netzwerk und bringen zusammen, was zusammengehört. Grenzenlose Entwicklungschancen mit Partnermöglichkeiten, vielschichtige Tätigkeitsbereiche, Gehälter wie in der Industrie und vieles mehr – melden Sie sich bei uns und wir unterstützen Sie auf Ihrem weiteren Karriereweg!

Derzeit suchen wir nach einem Steuerberater (m/w/d) für eine unserer Partner-Kanzleien in Weitersburg

Bei Rückfragen kannst du dich gerne jederzeit (auch nach deinem Feierabend) direkt telefonisch an Herrn Becker-Koch über folgende Nummer wenden: 015901431130

Aufgaben

Wir bringen zusammen, was zusammengehört. Dabei spielt das passende Tätigkeitsprofil natürlich eine entscheidende Rolle. Bei unserer Partnerkanzlei können Sie sich Ihren Aufgabenbereich auf Basis Ihrer persönlichen Stärken und Schwächen selbst zusammenstellen.

  • Erstellung und Review von Jahresabschlüssen
  • Erstellung von Steuererklärungen für Personen- und Kapitalgesellschaften
  • Steuerliche Sonderberatungsprojekte auf Basis individueller QualifikationenB. in den Bereichen der Erbschaftsteuer oder des Umwandlungssteuerrechts
  • Begleitung von Betriebsprüfungen
  • Teamleitung und Personalverantwortung (optional)
  • Weitere individuell wählbare Tätigkeitsbereiche, die Ihnen Freude bringen

Qualifikation

Am Ende sollte es für beide Seiten passen. Deshalb wäre es gut, wenn Sie sich in den folgenden Punkten wiederfinden.

  • Kommunikative Art und Freude am Austausch mit Mandanten
  • Sorgfältige, effiziente und gewissenhafte Arbeitsweise
  • Offen für eine digitale Arbeitsweise
  • Führungsverständnis und Verantwortungsbewusstsein gegenüber Mitarbeitern (optional)
  • Ein erfolgreich abgeschlossenes Steuerberaterexamen
  • Leidenschaft für steuerliche Themen

Benefits

Sie haben genug von 0815 Benefits, von denen Sie nicht wirklich profitieren? Dann sollten Sie einen Blick auf die nachfolgenden Benefits werfen.

  • Außerordentliche Vergütung von 90.000 € bis 130.000 € / Jahr, auf Wunsch auch Partnerperspektive
  • Flexible Gestaltung der Arbeitszeiten sowie die Option auf Home-Office
  • Nettolohnoptimierung mit monatlichen 50,00€ Sachbezugsgutscheinen
  • Umfangreiche Unterstützung bei Weiterbildungsmaßnahmen wie z.B. Fachberater Qualifikationen
  • Modernste Ausstattung mit digitalen Prozessen
  • Starker Teamzusammenhalt und regelmäßige Teamevents

Schnell, unkompliziert und effizient Ihren Traumjob finden – ein Versprechen an Sie, dass wir aufgrund unseres selektiven, breit gefächerten und deutschlandweiten Kanzleinetzwerks halten werden. lhre Vorteile mit uns auf einen Blick:

  • Sie führen keine unsinnigen Bewerbungsgespräche mehr, bei denen Sie während des Bewerbungsprozesses merken, dass es (bspw. wegen des Gehalts) sowieso nicht passt - wir klären vor Ihrem Bewerbungsgespräch all Ihre mit uns besprochenen Kriterien mit der Kanzlei ab.
  • Wir führen Ihre Gehaltsverhandlungen und kennen die Gehaltsstrukturen der Branche dabei bestens.
  • 100% Anonymität – solange Sie uns nicht das „Go“ geben und einem Kennenlernen mit Ihrem neuen potentiellen Arbeitgeber zustimmen, erfährt niemand von Ihrem Namen oder Ihren bisherigen Arbeitgebern – Ihre Ihnen wichtigen Kriterien können wir auch zunächst anonym mit unseren Partnerkanzleien klären.
  • Attraktive Kanzleien – die Kanzleien in unserem breit gefächerten Kanzleinetzwerk sind selektiv ausgewählt und heben sich klar von “normalen” Kanzleien ab (z.B. hinsichtlich der Vergütung, Benefits, Hierarchien, Digitalisierungsgrad, Ausstattung etc.).
  • Und das Beste: Unser gesamter Service ist unverbindlich und völlig kostenfrei für Sie.

title: Stellvertretende Filialleitung NRW (m/w/d)
description:
Kundenkontakt, Verantwortung & neue Perspektiven!
Du möchtest den nächsten Schritt gehen und mehr Verantwortung übernehmen? Du hast Freude am Umgang mit Menschen, behältst auch in anspruchsvollen Situationen den Überblick und möchtest ein Team im Tagesgeschäft unterstützen?

Wir wachsen weiter und suchen Dich als stellvertretende Filialleitung (m/w/d) für unsere Filialen in NRW im Raum Köln bis Gelsenkirchen.

Idealerweise bringst Du Erfahrungen aus dem Einzelhandel, der Gastronomie, der Kundenberatung oder einer vergleichbaren Branche mit und hast bereits erste Erfahrungen in der Organisation von Abläufen oder in einer fachlichen Führungsrolle gesammelt.


Deine Aufgaben:
  • Du koordinierst den operativen Filialalltag und sorgst für strukturierte Abläufe.
  • Du unterstützt und begleitest das Team im Tagesgeschäft.
  • Du bist erste Ansprechperson für operative Fragestellungen.
  • Du betreust unsere Kunden professionell und lösungsorientiert.
  • Du bearbeitest anspruchsvolle Kundenanliegen und Beschwerden.
  • Du führst Pfandgeschäfte eigenständig durch und stellst die Einhaltung unserer Qualitäts- und Sicherheitsstandards sicher.
  • Du unterstützt bei der Einarbeitung neuer Mitarbeitender.
  • Du organisierst Kassenabschlüsse, unterstützt bei Inventuren und sorgst für einen sicheren Umgang mit Bargeld und Wertgegenständen.
  • Du bringst Verbesserungsideen aus dem Tagesgeschäft ein und unterstützt die Filialleitung bei deren Umsetzung.
  • Bei Abwesenheit der Filialleitung übernimmst Du die operative Steuerung der Filiale innerhalb Deines Verantwortungsbereiches.
  • Eine abgeschlossene Berufsausbildung (z. B. Einzelhandel, Gastronomie, Juwelier, Goldschmied, Pflege etc.) oder eine vergleichbare Berufserfahrung.
  • Idealerweise bereits erfolgreiche Erfahrung in der fachlichen Anleitung oder Organisation eines Teams.
  • Ein aktuelles einwandfreies Führungszeugnis.
  • Freude am direkten Kundenkontakt sowie ein souveränes und verbindliches Auftreten.
  • Organisationsgeschick und die Fähigkeit, auch in stressigen Situationen den Überblick zu behalten.
  • Eine strukturierte, sorgfältige und eigenverantwortliche Arbeitsweise.
  • Lernbereitschaft und Interesse daran, Verantwortung zu übernehmen.
  • Sehr gute Deutschkenntnisse in Wort und Schrift (mindestens B2).für eine reibungslose Kommunikation mit Kunden und Kollegen
  • Reisebereitschaft in der Einarbeitungsphase
  • Intensive Einarbeitung und Schulung durch ein erfahrenes Kollegium
  • Vergütung: 3.200-3.683€ pro Monat
  • 30 Tage Urlaub
  • 20% Arbeitgeberzuschuss zur betrieblichen Altersvorsorge + 30 € zusätzlicher Zuschuss nach Abschluss der Probezeit
  • Monatlich 50 € steuerfreier Sachbezug über die Pluxee-Guthabenkarte
  • Jobticket oder einen Fahrtkostenzuschuss im Wert von bis zu 63 € im Monat
  • Rabatt in unserem Onlineshop nach Abschluss der Probezeit
  • Einen sicheren Arbeitsplatz mit Perspektive auch ohne Branchenerfahrung
  • Mitarbeiter werben Mitarbeiter Programm mit einem Bonus von bis zu 1000€
Wenn du einen sicheren Arbeitsplatz bei einem Arbeitgeber suchst, der Innovation und Entwicklung konsequent vorantreibt, bist du bei uns richtig. Unsere Branche ist stabil und zukunftsfähig, unsere Organisation wächst und entwickelt sich kontinuierlich weiter. Veränderung verstehen wir dabei als Chance. Grundlage unseres Erfolgs sind klar definierte, gemeinsam gelebte Werte, die Orientierung geben und eine Zusammenarbeit auf Augenhöhe ermöglichen.
Der Beruf des Pfandleihers ist kein klassischer Ausbildungsberuf, deshalb setzen wir auch auf Fachkräfte aus anderen Branchen und bringen Dir alles bei, was Du brauchst. Ob aus dem Einzelhandel, der Gastronomie oder einer ganz anderen Branche z. B. aus dem Schmuckbereich (Juwelier, Goldschmied), aus der Kundenberatung oder aus der Pflege - wichtig ist, dass Du Lust auf Menschen, Verantwortung und Vielfalt hast.

Bereit für den nächsten Schritt, dann freuen wir uns auf Deine Bewerbung!
Sende uns Deinen Lebenslauf und Dein frühestmögliches Startdatum.

Dein Recruiting-Team von GRÜNE’S LEIHHÄUSER

title: 🚛 Chauffører med C-kørekort søges i Vejle – bliv en del af et stærkt team 🤝
description:

Et godt flyttehold bliver ikke kun bygget af dygtige chauffører.

Det bliver bygget af kollegaer, der hjælper hinanden.

Hos os løfter vi i flok.

Vi planlægger sammen.

Vi hjælper hinanden, når opgaverne kræver det.

Og vi ved, at de bedste resultater bliver skabt af et stærkt hold.

Derfor søger vi flere chauffører, som både trives bag rattet og som en del af et team.

Dine arbejdsopgaver bliver blandt andet:

🚛 Flytte- og transportopgaver

📦 Læsning og aflæsning

🏢 Flytning af inventar for private og erhverv

🤝 Kundekontakt

💪 Samarbejde med dine kollegaer

Vi håber, at du:

▪ Har kørekort C

▪ Er en holdspiller

▪ Er mødestabil

▪ Har en god fysik

▪ Møder kunder og kollegaer med et smil

Vi tilbyder:

💰 Løn efter kvalifikationer og erfaring

🚀 Hurtig opstart

🤝 Et stærkt sammenhold

🚛 En moderne vognpark

📈 En virksomhed med mange års erfaring

title: Logistics Co-Founder / CSO (100 % remote) (m/f/d)
description:
We are looking to hire ambitious entrepreneurs to start and scale their own startups.

We are serial entrepreneurs, for example Paul Müller (founder Adjust, €1.2B exit) and Petter Made (founder SumUp, €8B) who are eager to support outlier personalities and serial entrepreneurs to build €1B+ companies.

Our offer:

  • A salary while you build your startup as you will directly be employed by us. Alternatively, you can opt for up to €500k in funding.

  • 1:1 sparring with unicorn founders on a weekly basis

  • Community: Access to the top 0.1% of founders, peers and investors

  • Team building: Hiring top notch talent supported through our network (over 50,000 professionals)

  • Distribution: Support in reaching product-market-fit and building up a sales force / marketing machine

  • Funding support for securing a multi-million euro funding round within 12 months (on average, EWOR Fellows raise > €2M after our Grand Pitch)

One of our fellows set a record for Europe’s largest pre-seed round by a first-time founder, securing a €12M pre-seed investment.

Tasks

  • You will own, build, and run your startup in fields such as Logistics

  • You will embark on an extensive personal development journey crafted by unicorn founders and follow a fully customised programme enhancing your goal, time, and energy management

  • You will receive support in hiring through our network to over 50,000 professionals and advice as well as best practices from serial entrepreneurs

  • You will receive intensive coaching to make your startup ready to raise millions in funding

  • You will iterate your product with us until having reached product-market-fit and receive support in building up a sales force or creating a marketing engine respectively

  • You are based in Europe or the Americas or open to relocate

  • You are willing to take full responsibility for your own startup and scale it to €100M+ in revenues

  • You have excellent communication skills in the English language
